name: Lamisa
subject: Ban Congressional Stock Trading NOW
body:
Members of Congress serve the People - not their stock portfolios. | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114494927/567207023/-458594157?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhMTYzNTExLTU5ODgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LRoTIywTa_Iumxrwi9svubRpSPJ_3BP8yScWWVDmlu8=&emci=e01c1ce6-3588-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3a163511-5988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=14405814)
---
| |
---
| | Friend, While everyday people are working just to make ends meet, too many politicians are **using their public office to make themselves rich**. They put their own stock portfolios and their special interest donors ahead of the working families they represent. That’s why this September, Congress could finally take up a bill to**ban members of Congress from trading stocks** –a _major_ step forward in our fight against corruption. **[This is where we need your help. We need to get as many signatures as possible to demand Congress put constituents first and end stock trading in Congress. Sign out petition now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114494930/567207025/1135441608?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhMTYzNTExLTU5ODgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LRoTIywTa_Iumxrwi9svubRpSPJ_3BP8yScWWVDmlu8=&emci=e01c1ce6-3588-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3a163511-5988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=14405814)**
---
[ **SIGN NOW** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114494932/567207028/1135441608?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhMTYzNTExLTU5ODgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LRoTIywTa_Iumxrwi9svubRpSPJ_3BP8yScWWVDmlu8=&emci=e01c1ce6-3588-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3a163511-5988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=14405814)
---
But here's the reality: some leaders in Congress would rather protect their ability to trade stocks than put constituents first. There are also several competing bills on the table, and things can get messy once negotiations start.1 We need to show overwhelming support to keep the pressure on. [**Friend, add your name today. Together, we'll show that the American people are united in demanding accountability.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114494933/567207031/1135441608?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhMTYzNTExLTU5ODgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LRoTIywTa_Iumxrwi9svubRpSPJ_3BP8yScWWVDmlu8=&emci=e01c1ce6-3588-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3a163511-5988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=14405814)
---
[ **SIGN NOW** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114494934/567207032/1135441608?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhMTYzNTExLTU5ODgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LRoTIywTa_Iumxrwi9svubRpSPJ_3BP8yScWWVDmlu8=&emci=e01c1ce6-3588-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3a163511-5988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=14405814)
---
**This about trust in our democracy. **The only way to stop insider trading in Congress is to stop members of Congress from trading stocks. Period. Banning stock trading by members would go a long way toward restoring trust in government and fixing what’s broken in Washington.

Let’s make sure Congress hears us loud and clear: **public service should NOT be a platform for personal gain.**
**[ADD YOUR NAME: Ban congressional stock trading NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114494935/567207033/1135441608?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhMTYzNTExLTU5ODgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LRoTIywTa_Iumxrwi9svubRpSPJ_3BP8yScWWVDmlu8=&emci=e01c1ce6-3588-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3a163511-5988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=14405814)** Thank you for taking action, The End Citizens United Team
---
| | 1[Politico, “A Senate committee voted to advance a bill that would ban stock trading by lawmakers, presidents and vice presidents — over objections from most Republicans and with a limited carve-out for President Donald Trump.” (July 29, 2025)](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114494936/567207034/1124766487?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhMTYzNTExLTU5ODgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LRoTIywTa_Iumxrwi9svubRpSPJ_3BP8yScWWVDmlu8=&emci=e01c1ce6-3588-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3a163511-5988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=14405814)

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: This bill attacks voting rights, full stop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Sean Wilentz, a professor of American History at Princeton University, makes the stakes of the SAVE Act clear: “ It’s the most extraordinary attack on voting rights in American history .”
We MUST stop this bill in the Senate and more like it, but we need to unite and fight now, before opponents of voting rights in Congress start checking voter suppression bills off their to-do list.
RUSH $25 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=090225_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
CBS: Experts warn the proposed SAVE Act could make it harder for some married women to vote. Here's who could be affected. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=090225_2&amount=25]
The SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights and passed the U.S. House of Representatives. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law, folks.
Don’t be fooled by the name. This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register -- something millions of eligible Americans don’t have on hand. And that’s the point.
PITCH IN $25 RIGHT NOW TO STOP THE SAVE ACT NOW ➜ [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=090225_2&amount=25]
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=090225_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=090225_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=090225_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=090225_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=090225_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=090225_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=090225_2&amount=35]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=090225_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=090225_2&amount=20]

name: Naomi at Grijalva HQ
subject: 🗳️Ballots are out, ⏰ Time is ticking, 💪WE NEED YOU!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by La Gente for Grijalva_
body:
There are 21 days left until election day, to make a difference, to elect the first Latina to Congress! 🤩

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/dff47dfc8b6a/weekend-of-action-for-adelita-10308901?e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=978511ea34&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | | | | |
# IT’S BALLOT DROP WEEK!
Adelita for Congress Newsletter
---
| | Hi Peter,
**⏳ Just 21 days left until Election Day...** Time is running out to make history by electing the first Latina to represent Southern Arizona in Congress!
We’ve come a long way since May, and if you’ve been with us since then, thank you from the bottom of our hearts. We could not have done this without you all. Now, it all comes down to these final days. This is our moment — and we can’t do it without **YOU.**
Adelita is a proven fighter, ready to deliver for our community from Day One. But to get her to Congress, we need all hands on deck right now.
So, here’s the question: **Will you step up and join us in these critical final days?** 👊🏽
---
| | **Here’s what’s happening this week:****Canvassing Door to Door!** Help us make phone calls, go door-to-door and connect with voters face-to-face.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=4241993437&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | **Saturday Canvass in Tucson: Pro-Choice Canvass** Saturday, September 6th @ 8:30 AM2720 E Broadway Blvd. Tucson, AZ
---
| [RSVP to Tucson Canvass!](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=b6dd5678d4&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=78fc478753&e=f7c3700ccb)

---
| [RSVP to WEST VALLEY Canvass!](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=94c298edc9&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=a123807544&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | **CARPOOL CANVASS TO NOGALES AZ****JOIN US!** Sunday September 7th @ 3:00 PM
---
| [RSVP for NOGALES!](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=66ef19c5e0&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=45924f5d64&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | **VIRTUAL PHONE BANK****JOIN US** Tuesdays-Thursdays @ 5:30PM
---
| [RSVP to VIRTUAL PHONE BANK](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=b796933e15&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
| | For a smoother experience, please**download MiniVAN ahead of your canvass**. [Here](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=845d779ae0&e=f7c3700ccb) is a guide if you need any help. MiniVAN is the program we use to share your list of doors to knock and where we log responses. **Download links** : MiniVAN for [iPhone](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=07ff0fde29&e=f7c3700ccb) and [Android](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=73507c0138&e=f7c3700ccb).
---
| | Will you be joining us this weekend? 🤩
Thank you for all the energy you’ve brought so far—your time, your voice, and your presence are making a real difference. As we head into these final weeks, let’s stay grounded in our shared purpose and continue showing up for one another.
If you have any questions or need anything from our team, we’re here to support you. Reach out anytime at **volunteer@adelitaforcongress.com**
Let’s keep learning, growing, and building—together.
**Naomi De La Rosa Arellano**

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: ME + NC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
These are two of our MUST-WIN Senate seats in 2026.
#

There are TWO U.S. Senate seats that we MUST flip in order to restore our Democratic Senate majority next year. **Maine and North Carolina.** **[If you’re ready to help us flip these seats, please consider chipping in now. Otherwise, please keep reading to learn more about both of these important races.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94388?refcode=em20250902-9367&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9367%2E614464%2Ez3qrWf)** **[CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94388?refcode=em20250902-9367&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9367%2E614464%2Ez3qrWf)**
---

**— North Carolina —** _GOP U.S. Senator Thom Tillis announced that he will NOT seek re-election in 2026._ **After this news, Cook Political Report upgraded North Carolina’s U.S. Senate race from Leans Republican to a _TOSS UP!_** **And now, former Democratic governor of North Carolina, Roy Cooper, is officially running for the open seat!** _This Senate race will be one of the nation’s top battlegrounds next year._ **[Please consider making a donation today to help us flip North Carolina’s Senate seat blue and restore our Democratic majority:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94388?refcode=em20250902-9367&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9367%2E614464%2Ez3qrWf)** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94389?refcode=em20250902-9367&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9367%2E614464%2Ez3qrWf) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94389?refcode=em20250902-9367&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=9367%2E614464%2Ez3qrWf) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94388?refcode=em20250902-9367&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=9367%2E614464%2Ez3qrWf)
---

**— Maine —** Republican U.S. Senator Susan Collins is running for re-election in 2026. **Maine will be one of the most _expensive_ and _competitive_ races in the country!** Cook Political Report AND the Center for Politics rate Maine’s U.S. Senate race as _Lean Republican._ But right now, with faith in the GOP at an all-time low, just about anything could tip the scales and make this race a TOSS UP! **[Please consider making a donation today to help us flip Maine blue and restore our Democratic majority in the Senate:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94388?refcode=em20250902-9367&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=9367%2E614464%2Ez3qrWf)** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94389?refcode=em20250902-9367&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=8&akid=9367%2E614464%2Ez3qrWf) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94389?refcode=em20250902-9367&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=9&akid=9367%2E614464%2Ez3qrWf) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94388?refcode=em20250902-9367&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9367%2E614464%2Ez3qrWf)
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdc-email-footer?refcode=em20250902-9367-footer&t=11&refcode2=9367_614464_z3qrWf&akid=9367%2E614464%2Ez3qrWf)**

name: Camille Alcala
subject: Two months before this new election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
because of you, we’re entering the fight for Prop 50 with momentum |
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114496233/567249164/-1175830425?refcode=header&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDIwNTVhYi02YTg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y8lk7M_GYvBmjuZ3rvp6MzveILCdzOvjEi3Vr6YF5yQ=)
---
| Dear friends, When we started August, _we didn’t quite know_ what was ahead of us. Donald Trump and his Republican allies were working to rig our democracy by redrawing maps and stripping away Democratic seats in Texas. Under the leadership of Gov. Newsom, we responded with the Election Rigging Response Act — which is now going before voters in November as Proposition 50. **And now, because of you, we’re entering the fight for Proposition 50 with real momentum**. This ballot measure is our chance to stop Trump’s plot in its tracks and ensure that California continues to lead the way in protecting fair elections. **Here’s the truth** : Campaigns like this aren’t easy. They require organizers on the ground, voter protection hotlines, conversations with undecided neighbors, and thousands of phone calls reminding folks to vote on November 4. _And we have only two months before this new election._ But thanks to your commitment, we are able to launch this fight with confidence. I cannot overstate it: Your support is why we still have a shot at winning in November — ensuring Democrats still have a path to retake the U.S. House. There is much more to come, but please know we would not be in this fight without you. With deep gratitude, Camille Alcala
Finance Director, California Democratic Party
---
| | **[DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114496234/567249165/-1175830425?refcode=20250902_FR_45DO_ThankYou&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDIwNTVhYi02YTg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y8lk7M_GYvBmjuZ3rvp6MzveILCdzOvjEi3Vr6YF5yQ=) **

Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — **California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.**

If this email was forwarded to you, **_[please sign up for our email list here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114496235/567249166/-429635304?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDIwNTVhYi02YTg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y8lk7M_GYvBmjuZ3rvp6MzveILCdzOvjEi3Vr6YF5yQ=&emci=c83e6ba5-4085-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=4d2055ab-6a88-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=560478)_**

clean_body: because of you, we’re entering the fight for Prop 50 with momentum | = | Dear friends, When we started August, we didn’t quite know what was ahead of us. Donald Trump and his Republican allies were working to rig our democracy by redrawing maps and stripping away Democratic seats in Texas. Under the leadership of Gov. Newsom, we responded with the Election Rigging Response Act — which is now going before voters in November as Proposition 50. And now, because of you, we’re entering the fight for Proposition 50 with real momentum. This ballot measure is our chance to stop Trump’s plot in its tracks and ensure that California continues to lead the way in protecting fair elections. Here’s the truth : Campaigns like this aren’t easy. They require organizers on the ground, voter protection hotlines, conversations with undecided neighbors, and thousands of phone calls reminding folks to vote on November 4. And we have only two months before this new election. But thanks to your commitment, we are able to launch this fight with confidence. I cannot overstate it: Your support is why we still have a shot at winning in November — ensuring Democrats still have a path to retake the U.S. House. There is much more to come, but please know we would not be in this fight without you. With deep gratitude, Camille Alcala Finance Director, California Democratic Party | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. > Read the most recent FREE subscriber email [here](https://substack.com/redirect/35154142-7a46-416c-9d78-c5ccd2fc1aa0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
> Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr [here](https://substack.com/redirect/8390d624-08d8-4d23-a500-141fecd53a69?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

**" State Sen. Brandon Creighton expected to be sole finalist for Texas Tech chancellor," **Texas Tribune's **Jessica Priest** \-- "State Sen. **Brandon Creighton** , the architect of major higher education reforms that banned diversity programs, limited faculty influence and tightened rules on campus protests, is poised to become the next chancellor of the Texas Tech University System.

The Texas Tech Board of Regents is set to "publicly name Creighton as the sole finalist for the position" on Thursday morning, according to the board's [agenda](https://substack.com/redirect/92d486ca-a272-44a2-bec9-365e2119352e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But Chair **Cody Campbell** signaled the board's decision earlier when he posted Sunday on X that he expects the regents to unanimously select the Conroe Republican.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/c418898f-c7c4-4e2c-8609-e3d973d716ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Creighton "has been a strong voice in the fight to get our colleges and universities back on track and clearly shares the values and vision of the Texas Tech community," Campbell [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/7e5c9c10-a204-440c-95ed-3cf904f1b3e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). "Texas Tech stands at a pivotal crossroads and is poised to accelerate the pace of massive growth and progress that we have achieved. We are confident that Senator Creighton will continue to advance our mission of serving students, driving research, and strengthening communities across the State, and especially in West Texas. He is, unquestionably, the right person for the job, and we all look forward to working with him."

Board Vice Chair **Dustin Womble** echoed Campbell's message in his own****[post](https://substack.com/redirect/0c1ef159-be7c-498f-91aa-135eb4680c99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) while House Speaker **Dustin Burrows** , a Texas Tech alum, congratulated Creighton.

"Senator Creighton's leadership and expertise on higher education matters will be a tremendous benefit to Texas Tech," the Lubbock Republican wrote.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/c418898f-c7c4-4e2c-8609-e3d973d716ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
U.S. Rep. **Jodey Arrington** , R-Lubbock, who was also considered for the role, offered his congratulations, as well.

"To my fellow West Texans and Red Raiders, please join me in congratulating our next Chancellor, @SenCreighton," Arrington [wrote on X](https://substack.com/redirect/028e21b6-b327-4939-96a6-e527318d8ccf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). "I am at the ready to help Brandon 'bear our banners far and wide' in our nation's capital and beyond as he leads the greatest University System in all the land. Guns up, and Go West Texas!!"

In a [separate post on X](https://substack.com/redirect/73a00f03-7614-4ff9-83fa-ff269d6318cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Sunday evening, Creighton said he is honored that Texas Tech regents have expressed confidence in him.

"Serving as Chairman of the Senate Education Committee and the Budget Subcommittee has been the honor of a lifetime--especially to help deliver that success for Texas Tech and its regional universities," he said. "I feel very blessed to have been considered for the role of Chancellor."

In the last three years, Creighton, who chairs the Texas Senate's education committee, has authored some of the most impactful legislation for Texas higher education in decades: Senate Bill 17, which bans diversity, equity and inclusion offices at public universities; Senate Bill 37, which gives governor-appointed regents more authority over university operations and limits faculty's influence on their schools; and Senate Bill 2972, which sets new rules on when, where and how protests can take place on campuses.

Together, these measures have significantly shifted control over higher education from campus leaders to regents and state lawmakers, upending a longstanding balance of power that has traditionally given universities greater autonomy. ...

Creighton's appointment could strengthen Texas Tech's political influence at the Capitol. He helped create the [Texas University Fund](https://substack.com/redirect/c142115d-a6ce-416c-b9ed-60cbccd00c6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a $3.9 billion endowment approved by voters in 2023 that sends hundreds of millions of dollars to Texas Tech, the University of Houston, Texas State University and the University of North Texas. Lawmakers established the fund to help these schools compete with the state's two flagship university systems, the University of Texas and Texas A&M, which draw billions in support from the [Permanent University Fund](https://substack.com/redirect/147bf225-05ad-4c01-89de-8453fa05c1e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a $39.5 billion oil-and gas-funded endowment that other emerging research universities cannot access.

Creighton would be new to Raider Country. A graduate of the University of Texas at Austin, he earned his law degree from Oklahoma City University. He was a state representative for seven years before winning a Senate Seat in 2014, representing Chambers, Galveston, Harris, Jefferson and Montgomery counties. His current term runs through January 2027. He would have to vacate his seat before then, at which point Abbott would be authorized to call a special election to fill the vacancy.

The Texas Tribune [first reported](https://substack.com/redirect/a08fcf1f-fa90-478b-b91f-61158e980876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on Thursday that Creighton and Arrington were in the running to succeed Chancellor Tedd Mitchell, who announced his retirement in July. The board met behind closed doors for four hours on Saturday and then adjourned without taking any action. The earliest the board could meet next would be Thursday. By law, the board must wait 21 days before finalizing Creighton's appointment. If confirmed, Creighton would become the sixth chancellor since the system's creation in 1996." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/b645f088-0b84-4e50-bf10-7407e39061a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* **2026**

Read the most recent FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr . TOP NEWS " State Sen. Brandon Creighton expected to be sole finalist for Texas Tech chancellor," Texas Tribune's Jessica Priest \-- "State Sen. Brandon Creighton , the architect of major higher education reforms that banned diversity programs, limited faculty influence and tightened rules on campus protests, is poised to become the next chancellor of the Texas Tech University System. The Texas Tech Board of Regents is set to "publicly name Creighton as the sole finalist for the position" on Thursday morning, according to the board's . But Chair Cody Campbell signaled the board's decision earlier when he posted Sunday on X that he expects the regents to unanimously select the Conroe Republican. Creighton "has been a strong voice in the fight to get our colleges and universities back on track and clearly shares the values and vision of the Texas Tech community," Campbell . "Texas Tech stands at a pivotal crossroads and is poised to accelerate the pace of massive growth and progress that we have achieved. We are confident that Senator Creighton will continue to advance our mission of serving students, driving research, and strengthening communities across the State, and especially in West Texas. He is, unquestionably, the right person for the job, and we all look forward to working with him." Board Vice Chair Dustin Womble echoed Campbell's message in his own** while House Speaker Dustin Burrows , a Texas Tech alum, congratulated Creighton. "Senator Creighton's leadership and expertise on higher education matters will be a tremendous benefit to Texas Tech," the Lubbock Republican wrote. U.S. Rep. Jodey Arrington , R-Lubbock, who was also considered for the role, offered his congratulations, as well. "To my fellow West Texans and Red Raiders, please join me in congratulating our next Chancellor, @SenCreighton," Arrington . "I am at the ready to help Brandon 'bear our banners far and wide' in our nation's capital and beyond as he leads the greatest University System in all the land. Guns up, and Go West Texas!!" In a Sunday evening, Creighton said he is honored that Texas Tech regents have expressed confidence in him. "Serving as Chairman of the Senate Education Committee and the Budget Subcommittee has been the honor of a lifetime--especially to help deliver that success for Texas Tech and its regional universities," he said. "I feel very blessed to have been considered for the role of Chancellor." In the last three years, Creighton, who chairs the Texas Senate's education committee, has authored some of the most impactful legislation for Texas higher education in decades: Senate Bill 17, which bans diversity, equity and inclusion offices at public universities; Senate Bill 37, which gives governor-appointed regents more authority over university operations and limits faculty's influence on their schools; and Senate Bill 2972, which sets new rules on when, where and how protests can take place on campuses. Together, these measures have significantly shifted control over higher education from campus leaders to regents and state lawmakers, upending a longstanding balance of power that has traditionally given universities greater autonomy. ... Creighton's appointment could strengthen Texas Tech's political influence at the Capitol. He helped create the , a $3.9 billion endowment approved by voters in 2023 that sends hundreds of millions of dollars to Texas Tech, the University of Houston, Texas State University and the University of North Texas. Lawmakers established the fund to help these schools compete with the state's two flagship university systems, the University of Texas and Texas A&M, which draw billions in support from the , a $39.5 billion oil-and gas-funded endowment that other emerging research universities cannot access. Creighton would be new to Raider Country. A graduate of the University of Texas at Austin, he earned his law degree from Oklahoma City University. He was a state representative for seven years before winning a Senate Seat in 2014, representing Chambers, Galveston, Harris, Jefferson and Montgomery counties. His current term runs through January 2027. He would have to vacate his seat before then, at which point Abbott would be authorized to call a special election to fill the vacancy. The Texas Tribune on Thursday that Creighton and Arrington were in the running to succeed Chancellor Tedd Mitchell, who announced his retirement in July. The board met behind closed doors for four hours on Saturday and then adjourned without taking any action. The earliest the board could meet next would be Thursday. By law, the board must wait 21 days before finalizing Creighton's appointment. If confirmed, Creighton would become the sixth chancellor since the system's creation in 1996." name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt8iuopuglqobnfq8eskh9ddskdv9n5ca46liteg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3iecor6c3h2bs)
---
My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is virtually tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
[ **DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt45k3n7m9rgbecire9ve8pcuj64eg0lj3hq6d60_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3iecor6c3h2bs)
---
Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Friend, I **know** we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. __[_**I 'm not asking you to cut a big check, all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfh89ojajvem9pisa6lvgcuqrftfeoqai5uhpir0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3iecor6c3h2bs "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!")

But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is virtually tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Friend, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!" If you can't afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, "please keep me and my team in your prayers and add your endorsement today:" I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward, Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from Your America is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7vm5qhu1njkmeg0hdnrrfjs5pqt7j591jrm18l8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3ie2pb6clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4aknl6707sen0932pi46ku0g0ra4ba0rfoonja0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3ie2pb6clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1egbrsj8vr14pdj2bei71hnstchuu4a5aj0j6i8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3ie2pb6clh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z24o21qke31gcabr9qnl10248n39k8eo4iqg77rg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3ie2pb6clh2bs)**

# Elon Musk Warns of America’s $36 Trillion Dollar Debt Bomb
# The system is crumbling, protect your wealth or suffer the fallout.
---
Elon Musk has avoided two major financial crises before. He pulled Tesla and SpaceX back from the brink of collapse and built two of the most valuable companies in history.

Now, he’s sounding the alarm about America’s $36 trillion debt time bomb that could destroy the fabric of our society.

While head of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) under President Trump, Musk exposed just how bad things are:

✅ Runaway government spending has pushed national debt to unsustainable levels
✅ The Federal Reserve’s rate hikes are squeezing the economy, making inflation irreversible
✅ The stock market is on shaky ground, putting traditional 401(k)s, IRAs, and TSPs at risk

With Trump back in charge, major spending cuts are coming. While necessary, these cuts may send shockwaves through Wall Street, creating unpredictable market turbulence.

That’s why financial elites aren’t waiting to react, they're moving their wealth now.

For the everyday American who’s worked hard to build their nest egg, Trump preserved a IRS loophole that allows you to protect your retirement savings before billions in American wealth are lost.

name: Troy Downing
subject: My story’s a little different than most.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Here's 8 photos from the scrapbook.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwM19BMi1KSy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDAzODgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDNfQTItSksuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzAwMzg4LTI4OTkifQ/8oLZdJFv1DbvYLHjxEXRzQ)
---
Never could this young boy have imagined he’d one day be sending an email like this.

Peter, it's Troy Downing.

If you don’t have much time, all you need to know about me is that **I only care about three things: God, family, and country.** **[I’m fighting in Congress to defend those three things for myself and every American.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwM19BMi1KSy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDAzODgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDNfQTItSksuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzAwMzg4LTI4OTkifQ/1qMXk9Q-Z2LV8X0ll7-dmg)**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwM19BMi1KSy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDAzODgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDNfQTItSksuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzAwMzg4LTI4OTkifQ/Jp1-InWuOrgswy7ZDUxKXQ)
---
Growing up, I was a bit of a nerd. I studied mathematics and computer science in college. Then, I started my own business, which merged with Yahoo!. I started other small businesses in insurance and real estate, but then my life changed forever...

Like millions of Americans, September 11th was a turning point.

**I immediately enlisted in the United States Air Force/ANG.** I served two tours of duty in Afghanistan as part of a Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) squadron.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwM19BMi1KSy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDAzODgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDNfQTItSksuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzAwMzg4LTI4OTkifQ/k6aXp2RNznyy7w_-JSsrhw)
---
After eight years of service, I was honorably discharged from the Air Force and returned home to Montana with my wife and kids.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwM19BMi1KSy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDAzODgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDNfQTItSksuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzAwMzg4LTI4OTkifQ/BJtNNzldASMuHAvwHVz7Dg)
---
We are partners in a local distillery in Bozeman, and when the COVID pandemic hit, our company went above and beyond to help our friends and neighbors. There was a shortage of toilet paper, sanitizing wipes, and hand sanitizer in every store.

We quickly turned our whiskey distillery into a hand sanitizer production facility to provide free hand sanitizer to families, first responders, and hospitals.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwM19BMi1KSy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDAzODgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDNfQTItSksuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzAwMzg4LTI4OTkifQ/msM-DTDmFyiyruIzKx4jnQ)
---
In the Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) Community, we live by this motto:

**“These things we do, that others may live.”**

I’ve taken this motto with me in everything I do. I’ve taught my kids to live by this. And now, my public service is not finished. **[I’m fighting in Congress to preserve our American way of life, protect our God-given rights, and defend our nation with everything I’ve got.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwM19BMi1KSy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDAzODgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDNfQTItSksuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzAwMzg4LTI4OTkifQ/nTuvZGduzjSKI2eRrxFOBA)**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwM19BMi1KSy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDAzODgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDNfQTItSksuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzAwMzg4LTI4OTkifQ/-HeOeBXzp6CwAyeD2b6Q6g)
---
I’m fighting in Congress for **GOD** so we will never forget that we are one nation UNDER God.

I’m fighting in Congress for our **FAMILIES** so our kids have every opportunity to succeed.

I’m fighting in Congress for our **COUNTRY** so every future generation can still call the United States of America their home and the best country that has ever graced God’s creation.

Peter, defending our conservative House Majority and advancing President Trump’s agenda won’t come cheap. Democrats are chomping at the bit to flip the House BLUE so they can turn every state into the next California! I can’t let that happen, but I’m hoping strong, loyal Patriots like you will help win this fight.

[**If you can spare just $5 or $10, that’s all it takes to make a difference – seriously!**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwM19BMi1KSy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDAzODgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDNfQTItSksuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzAwMzg4LTI4OTkifQ/g6QLeKIP359sGjLny0FYeg) I don’t have billionaires on speed dial or Hollywood award winners to campaign for me.

I depend on like-minded friends and neighbors like you to chip in a few bucks. **[If everyone reading this chips in $8, I’ll hit my goal!](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkwM19BMi1KSy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MDAzODgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MDNfQTItSksuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzAwMzg4LTI4OTkifQ/5qmsEAcC-9zG25_Asnregg)**
---
[ **DONATE TODAY**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[**I appreciate any and all support.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-a2Uf0rHOT4jRRVjw)

With your help, Peter, **we can save our country and put God, Family, and Country FIRST. **

God Bless,

Troy Downing (R-MT)
---

clean_body: Here's 8 photos from the scrapbook. | | | Never could this young boy have imagined he’d one day be sending an email like this. Peter, it's Troy Downing. If you don’t have much time, all you need to know about me is that I only care about three things: God, family, and country. Growing up, I was a bit of a nerd. I studied mathematics and computer science in college. Then, I started my own business, which merged with Yahoo!. I started other small businesses in insurance and real estate, but then my life changed forever... Like millions of Americans, September 11th was a turning point. I immediately enlisted in the United States Air Force/ANG. I served two tours of duty in Afghanistan as part of a Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) squadron. After eight years of service, I was honorably discharged from the Air Force and returned home to Montana with my wife and kids. We are partners in a local distillery in Bozeman, and when the COVID pandemic hit, our company went above and beyond to help our friends and neighbors. There was a shortage of toilet paper, sanitizing wipes, and hand sanitizer in every store. We quickly turned our whiskey distillery into a hand sanitizer production facility to provide free hand sanitizer to families, first responders, and hospitals. In the Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) Community, we live by this motto: “These things we do, that others may live.” I’ve taken this motto with me in everything I do. I’ve taught my kids to live by this. And now, my public service is not finished. I’m fighting in Congress for GOD so we will never forget that we are one nation UNDER God. I’m fighting in Congress for our FAMILIES so our kids have every opportunity to succeed. I’m fighting in Congress for our COUNTRY so every future generation can still call the United States of America their home and the best country that has ever graced God’s creation. Peter, defending our conservative House Majority and advancing President Trump’s agenda won’t come cheap. Democrats are chomping at the bit to flip the House BLUE so they can turn every state into the next California! I can’t let that happen, but I’m hoping strong, loyal Patriots like you will help win this fight. I don’t have billionaires on speed dial or Hollywood award winners to campaign for me. I depend on like-minded friends and neighbors like you to chip in a few bucks. With your help, Peter, we can save our country and put God, Family, and Country FIRST. God Bless, Troy Downing (R-MT) | | | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. Troy Downing For Congress P.O. Box 20333 Billings, MT 59104 | | | To unsubscribe from Troy Downing for Congress,

# Wednesday, September 3, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1777, the American flag [flew in battle for the first time](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnTAQAL_GdEaLjW0oXKShu7QpkcFr3iYGI3tz6P19dPmF60ej0fz6WD8CZbqOn-FEz6msFz4tIzPWNda_x1YCN670B_FujHQlyrgqUEbCLEGvMVB-r2MXfUJUqDv0gzN2mvUEpnt5Bc7YMRmL2uo9ThFns6VBTwAanUsd-S8bzKAHAK3G3oLCCM7umwtpnwcxAkbiUvvfhS5-Ycrv8om138vZZf9ivpvQP4RahFqe5-nvkolpL1-AUEvjUt9CLQrACbXALNQSTqy0h0umHA6ZMmGTdMktMGeUDW-WWg7OOQlgjNVd9fF-KGdq1okRjjNQ_h_A37r26dW_AAAA__-6Bn7i) during a Revolutionary War skirmish at Cooch’s Bridge in Delaware, as Gen. William Maxwell ordered the new flag raised. Today, we’re featuring a story about South Korea’s [AI-powered dolls](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1ygzAQQOHTiA5GSPypUJGGzmlTMgKtYGOZ9aw29vj2GecKucD3Zt7XZbkEzHjun-EGXhItJzxLBhHgJfLPvlKQIoxXgHsRwDNhhsVo09fa1douMWB-LV0VfQIwYCvw7dgPk7OT7qvD2zWAm9LmYHLO9hCSdcENbRyncTNTrNC_Ne20bbW2pmsGbSDqcdjWMaTNtarTEFGIm2_CUw5I-UUP4GajW5X9IXIvyn4oMyszMxSh9CTOsSHelZnfujLzlRhCHbBmWknqAicS11tgqI8XRcrKzBX7eH9izliGUXV6vwXMfxn515uHN78BAAD__-sweQ8) stepping in as companions for elderly people living alone. Would you welcome this kind of innovation in elder care, or do you find it unsettling? Reply to let us know. 🚢 In today's episode of _The Flyover Podcast_ with Ayla Brown: hear the exclusive story of how a Wisconsin boat operator uncovered the remarkably preserved remains of a Great Lakes ship lost for 138 years. Stay hydrated and stay sharp with today's sponsor, [LMNT](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz72O6yAQQOGnMV2sMT_GLihuky633RIRMySzwWDh2Vh5-1VW-wbbH33S-bj4S6BM5fY_rOg4VV_w2DMyY_Oxfd2uNfDOjR6I285IJVFGL0GaE8wnUD4Gyi-vRXQJUaIS6AZrxmlWExhxd2kKC4Y5BByiDEaZSVuDVqHGRdtoBbm3BjOoAUBJ3Y8gMYIdl6sNaZmHTgNG4tr6z0qF75jyqz6x9UtdRXZ35m3v1L9Onjt5Po6jj43KI6-F30Unz7-9aC5uB-VM-2g7Dbc1UP5B-E_nTye_AwAA__9RQm5a), offering a free sample of their electrolyte drink mixes exclusively for _The Flyover_ readers.
|
---
## US Ships Kill 11 in Drug Boat Strike
U.S. forces [sank a drug-laden vessel](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGPozAQBeBfYzpHk8EGU7i4hi7XXokcPA5zazCynUTsr1-x-xO2ftJ7-t6_23RzHHl7_HUr2RrStNG7RKqV8uTz83FPrpaa-YNoL5V4CxxpQkAtYZDQTt5xPCbVeBuIkNqG7LXXnRlaA7pZLCi8q9broIOCwQQTSJke-zB7M6CBhu3ZBgO0V4AW1aUDJA99N997F-bhKhSQ55ry5X_irS4U4pFelC9zWptol1r3Ito_AkeBY11o4RjPTOC4p8jzIXD0FGgrJHDUyiCCls8iV45cXT7kD1Ce3iJPsXzRRp9Pik7g2GTr9zfHyKXrhYLH6vh7oKm_euxl8SsAAP__4KqALw) in the Caribbean, killing 11 alleged members of the Tren de Aragua gang, which the U.S. labels a terrorist group. The strike followed U.S. deployment of warships and Marines near Venezuela last week and marked the first known attack under a new military order targeting cartels. President Trump posted a [video of the strike on Truth Social](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQxvGnMVuiA2wwA0Olyls6VepoYXOOr8XGgkuivH2VvkLX75N-w__rMl4CJdqvH2FDz0sed3zUhMxYxlhu1ykHrlzoB_GojLQvlHBUoLoTuBPoMQZKz7EV0S-ICrVAL21neqd76MTqHUYTwWBUMUorpdFRwTRJY4LTs-kF-ZcGDrQE0Ko9G1AYwZp5smGZnWxawEicy_k7084rLumZ71jOc95E8ivzURv91qihUQOXG681zxTS63-NLRQM6T3vIcXPctuORg1HrlwbNUjZSW2s6x0423W9U6L4eDwoJarGNi1ct0B_lOB_9bl79RsAAP__nOJ3yg). Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro, already [under a $50 million U.S. bounty](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3O3CAQRZ8Gd6zw4PVPQZHG3Zc2pcXCsJ4EgwVjr5ynj5w8Qpop5kpH954fX8uXpUjp_d1uaDjkJeGnRmTGsvhyvF_ZcuVCvxD3ykgpUMQFFDylmqTSi7cUr6VrvAmIgLpB0w7Pfpz0qJ7Nalzf2b4NYxuCGifQrQOvtQtuVO4JrW3I3DQ1Kd0qpaF79ArQq6F3r8EGN7WiU-iJc3n8zJR4xRCvfGJ5uLw10azMexX6m4BZwJyuPVe-IwHzDRYwq-k-IGA-qrz3CZg3W1yW5XhRli6nQGWr8qhyo0hsy3U__eEYvYzIq43ynwWZdyyWKSeZkzwx4e8Do5W3K3lirRgFzE0xfv9QjFT7QXTqvVmKf_vyf0k-DfwJAAD__z9mkvU), condemned the move as an attempt at regime change. The U.S. has deployed at least seven ships, a nuclear-powered submarine, and more than 4,500 Marines near Venezuela in recent days.
## Judge Bars Use of Troops in LA
A federal judge has [barred President Trump from deploying](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL_GZKDGYBgHDi4hm0svRMZuQ98aG5meQfP3K_YXNqmkpFeq9-85Py1FSutfu6PhkOeE1xmRGcvsy2tdsuWTC30hHicjpUARZwlS1aBr6GZvKX7mvvImIErsKjTtqIaH7h6gqs0opZWyAYYxLG7peoAh9NJ77dr2MaKryNw00NC1AJ3smwEkehgHt4w2ON2KHtAT59L8z5R4wxA_-Y2lcXmvotmYj1N0f4SchJyu62pcWtxdCjndaCEn0HdIIScur_2ok2XKycZ6fdnia2cjhVwS2fq-n_dm4z1WxfjjohjpHEbRw7pbij-j_CtTbyO_AwAA__-YXHzT) National Guard troops and Marines to Los Angeles. The judge deemed it a [violation of the 1878 Posse Comitatus Act](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuu5CAQAE-DM0YY8C8g2MTZ23RDC5vG7rdtY0Ezo7n9avYKLy6pSqo_X8uXR8Jr_-1PcBzTcsGrEDBDXkKu-5o8F874F-AuDHhFJFi00p1Uk1RmCR7pvdgmuAigwTTg2qHrx8mMqmsO1yoT10HFddQW1ujtsEEfgl5hVDYE06D72NSkTKuU0fbRKw1BDf22Dj5uUyusgoCc8uM74cUHRHqnJ-THls6G3MF8F2F-CT0LPfMBBxJ9mNBzhr2SZ0yX0POWama5emaCIvTc2bFth1F-17CDzJWgSM71vIusBWSKshZ5IiH7_JZ4SfLy5YtEItg9CT032YX7hURY-kFYtZ8e_6cb_tHLp9P_AgAA___PjYrS), which prohibits using the military for domestic law enforcement without proper authorization. The judge said the Trump administration is not required to withdraw the remaining 300 National Guard troops currently stationed in LA, “nor are they barred from using troops consistent with the Posse Comitatus Act.” That could include guarding federal buildings. The ruling applies only in California, but the court paused enforcement until Sept. 12 to allow for possible appeal.
## Space Force HQ Moving to Alabama
President Trump confirmed Tuesday that the [U.S. Space Force headquarters will relocate](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSozAQRL9GZHKJQYAJFFxC5ksvpAY0At0KiZUGu_z3W_gXNumku15197_H9EAffFz_4k6GXZoivUogZsqTzec6J-TC2X8RHYXJR-cDTaCglWqQqpks-vCedGWNIwJqKjJ133b3obmrttrMbKHRju51rxc7dK12zvbaDbW2beuwr7y5aGpQTa1UA_rWKSCr-m6Ze3TLUAutyHpO-fY_-cgbufBOT8q3Je1VMBvzUUTzR8AoYIzvIxW-LAHjBRYwquESEDCeRV77BIycz_2QnCTGmM64kCwHLiRdygvJjdB-n5iZcpF7evq4frIBZ9xRwFhlY4-XD8GXrhdarTv68CnEv3rxaeAnAAD__wYKhu4) from Colorado Springs to Huntsville, Alabama, citing Colorado’s mail-in voting system as one reason. Backed by Alabama Republicans, Trump said the new HQ would save nearly half a billion dollars and support his Golden Dome defense initiative. The battle [over the home of Space Force](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2ypDAMhE9jMk8JMfw4INiE7G26ISVsMaNdgylbM9Tcfot3hZeoFHT1191_vuYvkij74zdtPOqa5p3PElmV8xzy67Ek0qJZ_jEfRVn2VSLPCNhacBaaOZDEz3yvwrgyIzcVj3XfdoNrBmir59jX3NBSkwsdDw6GdkB05Ns63L1bHFUyXm7goKkBGrzfOkAO0Hd-6Wn1rjZ34CCa8u1vkl2fvMZPenO--bRVcXyqHsU0vwxOBqfzPG-vQpoCfS6Bwaloyh-D09XM4HSkKCr-ei-wwQncddDgFNJOMVjNr-2wz9eu5S0xsqVIC21kfYopU0i2HOTZ-rRttAe7SRSlb8jQumZAAIDe4FTlMRynxCil680dHhtJ_M6tPxr7PeL_AAAA__8duZMP) has been going on for years. During his first term, Trump pushed for the command’s headquarters to go to Huntsville, Alabama.

However, former President Joe Biden announced in 2023 that the command would remain based in Colorado. Trump's order Tuesday countered Biden's earlier order.

clean_body: U.S. forces in the Caribbean, killing 11 alleged members of the Tren de Aragua gang, which the U.S. labels a terrorist group. | | | | | | Wednesday, September 3, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1777, the American flag during a Revolutionary War skirmish at Cooch’s Bridge in Delaware, as Gen. William Maxwell ordered the new flag raised. Today, we’re featuring a story about South Korea’s stepping in as companions for elderly people living alone. Would you welcome this kind of innovation in elder care, or do you find it unsettling? Reply to let us know. 🚢 In today's episode of The Flyover Podcast with Ayla Brown: hear the exclusive story of how a Wisconsin boat operator uncovered the remarkably preserved remains of a Great Lakes ship lost for 138 years. Stay hydrated and stay sharp with today's sponsor, , offering a free sample of their electrolyte drink mixes exclusively for The Flyover readers. | US Ships Kill 11 in Drug Boat Strike U.S. forces in the Caribbean, killing 11 alleged members of the Tren de Aragua gang, which the U.S. labels a terrorist group. The strike followed U.S. deployment of warships and Marines near Venezuela last week and marked the first known attack under a new military order targeting cartels. President Trump posted a . Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro, already , condemned the move as an attempt at regime change. The U.S. has deployed at least seven ships, a nuclear-powered submarine, and more than 4,500 Marines near Venezuela in recent days. Judge Bars Use of Troops in LA A federal judge has National Guard troops and Marines to Los Angeles. The judge deemed it a , which prohibits using the military for domestic law enforcement without proper authorization. The judge said the Trump administration is not required to withdraw the remaining 300 National Guard troops currently stationed in LA, “nor are they barred from using troops consistent with the Posse Comitatus Act.” That could include guarding federal buildings. The ruling applies only in California, but the court paused enforcement until Sept. 12 to allow for possible appeal. Space Force HQ Moving to Alabama President Trump confirmed Tuesday that the from Colorado Springs to Huntsville, Alabama, citing Colorado’s mail-in voting system as one reason. Backed by Alabama Republicans, Trump said the new HQ would save nearly half a billion dollars and support his Golden Dome defense initiative. The battle has been going on for years. During his first term, Trump pushed for the command’s headquarters to go to Huntsville, Alabama. However, former President Joe Biden announced in 2023 that the command would remain based in Colorado. Trump's order Tuesday countered Biden's earlier order. What if I told you that I’m the Democrat and retired U.S. Navy Rear Admiral running to defeat Lauren Boebert? What if I told you that Adam Frisch only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes in the closest race in the country? What if I told you that Lauren Boebert is as unpopular as ever among voters? What if I told you that winning this seat would guarantee that we take back the House for Democrats in 2026? And what if I told you that we can finally send Lauren Boebert packing – but only if grassroots donors like you chip in now to my campaign? We need to raise another $7,500 before midnight tonight if we’re going to defeat Lauren Boebert and flip this seat blue, but right now, we’re still very short. The only way I’ll be able to fight back against the GOP Super PACs and win is if you give right now: [Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and Blue Amp Action – every dollar you can afford before midnight – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb70f5096-71e1-4666-8367-af09c557cc12/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’ll never be able to thank you enough for being on this team and joining me on this journey. My deepest gratitude, Eileen Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (Retired)
United States Navy

We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Demand Law and Order In Connecticut
body:
Democrats must do their job and uphold the law

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=53de0cf366)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “Order without liberty and liberty without order are equally destructive.”— Theodore Roosevelt
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| |
# _Opinion_ | Federal Law Enforcement Delivers Safety:

# Connecticut Leaders Must Step Up

---
| | **By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator**
The surge in federal immigration enforcement in Connecticut under President Trump’s second term is no accident—it is a testament to Washington’s renewed commitment to law and order. The men and women of federal law enforcement—ICE, the FBI, Homeland Security—have brought with them courage, resolve, and a tireless pursuit of public safety, ensuring that our neighborhoods are protected from **threats posed by criminal aliens and those who flagrantly disregard American law.** While critics have turned every operation into a spectacle for social media and political grandstanding, the facts tell a story of positive action and decisive leadership.
Consider August 2025’s **Operation Broken Trust,** a sweeping four-day ICE effort that resulted in the arrests of 65 undocumented individuals across Connecticut[1][2]. Notably, 29 of those detained had criminal charges or convictions, ranging from kidnapping and assault to sex crimes and drug trafficking. These are not harmless individuals—they are threats to families, schools and businesses in every part of the state. Federal authorities worked swiftly, at personal risk, to remove these dangers, using intelligence and cooperation with international law enforcement to apprehend several with foreign warrants on their records. It was exactly the sort of action that the public expects when the safety and order of its communities are jeopardized.
The numbers do not lie. **ICE arrests in Connecticut soared in 2025: 405 detentions** in just the first seven months—a 134% increase over the same stretch in 2024, and a dramatic jump from the historically modest figures of prior years[3][4]. Unlike some previous sweeps, these arrests targeted courthouses, worksites, and homes—places long treated as sanctuaries from accountability under the prior administration[4][5]. Washington has sent a clear message: sanctuary policies and activist obstructionism will not supersede federal law.Yet, in stark contrast, Connecticut’s political class has responded with opposition, not cooperation. **Senate Majority Leader Bob Duff condemns ICE as heavy-handed when federal agents detain serious offenders—painting law enforcement as villains for using non-lethal force on a man in Norwalk who resisted arrest[6]. Mayor Harry Rilling protested the presence of ICE agents near a police station, twice demanding they vacate city property—even as criminal warrants were being served[6]. The city’s police chief, James Walsh, worried more about public perception than public safety, lamenting that ICE’s visibility might “deter people from coming in.”[6]**
This is not leadership—it is abdication.
**Governor Ned Lamont** and**U.S. Senator Richard Blumenthal** have **doubled down,** invoking **Connecticut’s Trust Act** to shield non-citizens, launching investigations into “aggressive” ICE tactics and pushing back on the “sanctuary state” label[6][7]. Their concern is not for the law-abiding public, but for the continued comfort and protection of those who may endanger it. Meanwhile, as ICE agents face jeers, protests, and even formal rebukes, criminal aliens walk free—or back into the revolving doors of local justice.
The question, then, is why Connecticut’s leaders persist with these misplaced priorities. Why defend the status quo at the expense of neighborhood security and public trust? Part of it may be political calculus—catering to loud activist groups, law firms, and municipal associations determined to curtail federal authority. Part of it may be misjudged compassion, assuming that every individual swept up in an ICE operation is a benign victim rather than a potential threat. But that **compassion is ill-suited** **for those with warrants for sex trafficking, armed assault, or repeat DUIs.**
The reality is harsh: More than half of those arrested in recent sweeps had no criminal record—true. But nearly half did, and many of those crimes were serious and violent[1][2]. When Connecticut officials cry foul about mass deportations and courthouse arrests, **they are not defending the innocent but obstructing the removal of the guilty.** Their resistance sends a dangerous message: that ideology matters more than safety, and that the rule of law is negotiable.
**It is time for a reckoning.** Connecticut’s elected leaders, starting with Governor Lamont and the mayors of the state’s largest cities, must stop playing politics with law enforcement. Local officials should end the practice of denying ICE access to municipal facilities, and instead work hand-in-glove with federal agencies to keep our towns and cities safe. Lawmakers should revisit and revise the **Trust Act,** ensuring that true criminals do not hide behind legal technicalities and municipal red tape.
Let federal authorities do their job; let them pursue those who threaten our communities and flout our laws. It is not only sound policy—it is safe policy.
**Connecticut owes its citizens real security,** not press releases and partisan posturing. When it comes to law and order, the priority must always be protection and peace for those who call this state home. **Anything less is a betrayal of the public trust**[6][7][3][4][5].
**Sources**[1] Norwalk ICE arrests stoke anger among city, state officials and immigrant rights advocates https://www.ctpublic.org/news/2025-08-20/norwalk-ice-arrests-stoke-anger-among-city-state-officials-and-immigrant-rights-advocates[2] ICE arrests 65 people in CT in four-day operation https://cthosp.org/daily-news-clip/ice-arrests-65-people-in-ct-in-four-day-operation/[3] ICE arrests, deportations in CT up sharply in Trump's second term https://ctmirror.org/2025/08/28/ct-ice-arrests-deportations/[4] ICE arrests are up in Connecticut. Here's where migrants were ... https://www.ctpublic.org/news/investigative/2025-07-03/ice-arrests-connecticut-where-migrants-were-apprehended[5] Connecticut Mirror on Instagram https://www.instagram.com/p/DN6QdmJDpiw/[6] More Than 450 Arrests of Illegal Immigrants and Suspected Drug ... https://www.dea.gov/press-releases/2025/02/27/more-450-arrests-illegal-immigrants-and-suspected-drug-criminals-across[7] Immigration Prosecutions Jump in March 2025 - TRAC https://tracreports.org/reports/761/

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Most New Apartments, Four-Day School Week, and Most Unique Courses
body:
Austin, Houston, San Antonio, and Dallas are among the country’s top 10 markets for new apartments this year, according to a new RentCafe analysis. The state's 81,407 new units lead the nation.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0MFu4jAUheGncXZE19dJbC-8mBEyC8TMopWouolusAGrToJsQ8LbV_QVuv90jvQfD_2BQgzT5R-N3pT1PPeTX3L0pfjUj3Muk1_oRqmMfir5PN-To2fuEbDdgN6A6B2F-OybypkBnOaVN1y2ndISJVZX0znVyMFpqVrdIjVCOYlA4IcTNECiCuY1BhoE58Chq4XkA4dBkpSkUBFrwLtQ5lSXqy9-pXyOz_nhU32axyqaaym3zMQfhpahXZaljutFpfVR0teLMLR4_LS73V-Gdn_Yv2n-osLeg2NiK0XHsMv3gTOxff-w_6tk3G0JMYbcSdbAZaQQf77K7wo9DH4HAAD__-wfd2M) | |
# Wednesday, September 3, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1918, actress [Helen Wagner](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQgOGnsbdYx9kxZmDoYnVJ14zoCGcHFYMFNE7evkpfoeO_fMN_vZgL-eDj-kUb6_pckol8lMC1cjZbKjXyQTvlunGsZUk_2dGrGAQ8n0CdoDeOfHiZoXXaglOiZS3keZyURIntXaNbblZZicrSgJMlodQyIky3EcQgsfX6jYGCXggQMHa9FFaAlSQlTThRMwA7X1Pu6p0rP6ks4ZUenLtb2tqg77Xupek_GpwbnDl2h__2OztPXcprg_O7G5w_OXA0V1oj5zZrtx8-BF9G2QywbuTDn1f_d-Gh8TcAAP__DMtxuw) was born in Lubbock. She played Nancy Hughes McClosky in the soap opera _As the World Turns_ for more than 50 years. If you live in one of the state's biggest cities, you're probably accustomed to seeing a new apartment complex going up every time you turn around. A new study shows Texas [leads the nation](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OqzAMhq8mbKmC-QkMGc6SrWc9IzLEtJFCghJT2rs_osN3A99mydb7-H3-3ac7-uDj4y9uZPi9pinSWQIxU562VDjSiTtm3ihyWdORHX7KBAo6qUapmsmhD5-prZyZlRvrikytu34YNWionqbHVhFqPbvBdURdM3Z9v860jC24VfWVN1eYGlVT16pW_a3R9VyrWaPWOMCAolXkPKd84ycxvbGs4ZNelG9L2qpgnsx7Ec0fAVaALTstnI8tpAXD1eW6EmD5LcDiUdhHAfZaCLAXWYBVwzVrATbTnjJL-cXIxbOnIl3afEQmGemUPzLkkmLhfCzsU5Q-yiusysbtpw_Bl16LVj029OH7J__O7svA_wAAAP__QFSQYg) in new apartment builds. Getting a first apartment can be a rite of passage. What was your experience like? ## House Finalizes Several Bills
The Texas House passed a bill Tuesday that removes a new provision in state law that allows voters to [update their address](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu2zAMRb9G3hRQjBNZg4Yu3l7XjgZtM47wZCmQmOjl7wsH6Bd04XLAQ97752v6ohBD2n7Tzl5-bnlK3GpkES7TnqskbvSgIjsnqbf8LCu964SAFw1Ow3laKcT31Hern2F1pmNv7OU6OIsWu7tn63pngRmWy-IQ57kfkIbBzAxXsNwFf8jAwdkYMHA9na2ZDcyWrKUBB1I98Bokl5PcWfiH6i2-84vLacl7F_1d5FHV-ZfCUeHYWjt9V5IDKhyPNArHz5rC8TilcAR3DPwHdKS20zeXquvyFImsEze9M9VnYU0x5hbSpiMJ61cWLrrwFqoUkpCTXu6UNj78XfHro4UYQ71a1cO2U4ifP-X_2n15_BsAAP__cvqQUg) at their polling place if they have not moved outside the county. Gov. Abbott must sign the measure before it becomes law. During the regular session earlier this year, State Rep. Matt Shaheen (R-Plano) added the provision to an election reporting bill. Republican activists raised concerns that the change could lead to errors and election fraud. Shaheen sponsored the bill to [undo the provision](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OqzAUxfHVmC7I2IBx4eJFEXpFMk2KKdHFvhBrDEb2zQe7HyVbmP6nc6T_92W4gA9-nb9gQUOvKQ4rPnNAIkzDEjOt-IQNEi24Up7iPTnY8yC4aA5cH7gcHPiwD3XhzMidrgo0lWraTiuhRHEzutVaulGprgFrrRWTdRIsdG3TqpFj4c17jGsuq4pXvC2lqsaKjwqUgk50wGqOzlNMJd2Q8AV5Cnt8YCptXIpgbkRbZvIfEz0TvYXNUwzlB5ZzfDDRH30I5xh_7hsT_X-fKaa9hLy9mOzPOF8xZyZPnRZMtG_L5Ol6bOoiGbc9fQg-t4rVfF7Ah88p_S3Vw4jfAAAA__9r0H3H). The House also approved legislation that prohibits lawmakers from accepting large donations or [spending campaign funds](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGypCAQRb8GM6YAQTAw2MTsbbqh1Uo7Qz0EF1p98_dbzi9s1lXdfW6dun--pi8IMaTnb9hwoJ81TwmvGpEIy7TlSgkv2KHQhonqmo_i4V0nJZThoueinTyE-J5044dZ-F42OEhrOtdbZVXzGlTb9p2xvVNeidUssJp5BsRO2xmclU0YbpjoRSulkKJ7tFbOUswWrAWnHDAt0AfK5UEvJPyBusZ3PrE8lrw1cXgR7ZW1v5gamRqv63p8nwfeS6ZGKBSWiEyNtxdT455joLDcY91xCRB5xVpDTkyNHzp_5aMiB39CWrDyOcTIQ1oKQkW-Z8JE99uOCSKF-6IgfIf05H-PXI47VnU9d2b1TlrkZkXDtcCWO-MMX5TusNd6tVY3ZfD7FWIMtbNMi-cGIX686P_aOAf1LwAA__-3Gp_k) during a quorum break. During the first special session, Democrats reportedly received money from Beto O'Rourke's Powered by People PAC. Finally, a group of Republicans [scuttled a bill](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAURL8Gd0SAHWMKim3cvW23tK7hEiNhg-Amjv9-lfzCq0czmnP-_Sw_EFM8Hn9hR0vvkJcDz5aQCOuy50YHnlCg0o4HtZCf1cPVFiXUnQvDRb94iOlahs7bVXgjO7RS38fJaKVVt9khiOAmI1CHdVXD2GNwBqRw491N0gxdtJ8xYUQvpZBivPVarlKsGrSGSU3ABoE-Uq432pDwDS2kK7-w3lzeu2Q3otJY_4epmanZnb35BEzNHxKm5m-FqXnLz4a8Yng2bJwyB-ewED-BsKLnPp8HLzUXrHRxgjevmCIGDoGw8oYHEPJGNZbGYcfDf50wNXfV-nLGlGIbNRvEY4eYvu_od05fVv0PAAD__837j0A) that would have lowered the voter-approval tax rate from 3.5% to 2.5% for cities and counties with more than 75,000 people.
## Houston Boy Killed Playing 'Ding-Dong Ditch'
A Houston boy was shot and killed Saturday night while playing “ding-dong ditch,” a game that involves ringing a home's doorbell and then running away. Gonzalo Leon Jr., 42, has been [charged with murder](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuunjAQhJ_GdEb2cjEULiJFdCdNFKVEC17AkrF_2ftfePuIvMJpphlpNN_392v-Qh983H_hSZY_W5ojvUsgZsrzmQpHeuMDM58UuWzpmR1eZQYFnVSjVM3s0IdrbitnF-VGXZHVpuuH0YCB6rAtuGHoF9U1g94ULK7FDTWsnXbbRi1V3t5jalSN1kqrvm6MXrRaDBqDAwwoWkXOc8o1H8T0wbKFK70o12s6q2AP5kcRzQ8Bk4AJl_UmqPd01wKmP78FTCdGuR6Yd3LyfGZHWR7pWThF6XzcpUt3eF4PWY6U2MddwFQ45Us0k3ei-amh08YY3VXZusfbh-BLb0Sr9hN9-P-Fv2fwZeFfAAAA___6z4YJ) in connection with the shooting. According to police, 11-year-old Julian Guzman was playing the game with his younger cousin. The two boys knocked on the suspect's door twice within a period of a few minutes. After knocking a third time, Leon allegedly [chased them as they fled](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGupDAMRb8mdB4lZoChoNiG7m27JTLEDNELySgxL8PfrxjtH2xz5MKy79H98zV9kfMuPH_TzoO81zgFLtmzCKdpj1kCF3pRkp2D5DUeydKZJ9TYgO5B15Ml58_pXtlh1rY3FQ-ma9pH32GH1Ta0-GhWQ5ZxNqa1uiZdL42tsenbmrWu3HAd072ujdFGt7e6M7PRc0ddRw98kLprtk5iusnGwm_Kqz_jD6fbEvfKD5vIK6v6l8JR4VhKuS3eLd-4xSNLDNeWwvHSUjj6uJBXOF4_FY66v4AKxzMe4QnFSeCcwXJekps5wx4vczAGTqYE0VuY4wmFMqwk5P0JeYsC9kguPMF-ED-TLBu8EoVvcAGYssC_SArHKg32VZz3LreduuvnTs5_hOT_avgZ8G8AAAD__ykWnmU), firing multiple shots. Leon, an Army veteran, was allegedly "waiting in the shadows in his own side yard behind a fence" [before the shooting](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOwyAMhp8m2YiApCEZGG7J1ltvjExwCzoCEbilfftT-gq3WJY_6ZP__-e6XsEHH-_fsKOm1y2tEWsJSIR53VOhiBUOyLRjpHJLj2zhXVbJ5YXxmfF-teDDex1aqw23s2hRC3UZp1lJJVunNyF7a4aLVDDiZvoRcZhgHqyxM4xStV6fMj7zXggu-Nj1ShjBjQKlYJITNANH6ynljhwSvqDcwjs9MXdb2tugHdFRmv6rkUsjl1prt5lypjh5I5dzbeRifbwzm87haXPsyBB_WXEp0UlcehRKkZVHOXAjVsF_7sWBTR9Bm7U9qg_Bl1E1A7_v4MPnB_pfc08t_wIAAP__Q9SGUQ). Authorities seized about 20 rifles, shotguns, and pistols from his home. "_What harm could they have done? Playing with a doorbell?_ " [said a neighbor](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUD2y4yAMPo3dkQFsB1O42Mbd23ZLj0ByYBabDCjPL7ffIVfYRqOf0ff352v7gpji-fgNBy38s-ftpKsmYqayHbnySRc8ofBBJ9c9vwrCu25a6klIK-SwIcT03sYeFyfRqp4WZab7bI02ug-LmayfrXc4zB5RoRlc69E5qZVF7OPSwKSVg1JSyfttMMop6QwYA7OeoRslYeRcbhyI6Qfqnt75m8rN56NPS2B-1m741em10-t1Xbe_Ib_asdMrFI4-UafX5qvTqy_xaCPG8yEwtxLZB1FDztx2Ib8q51N8mMTxKkhF-ADl0d70PIl9QONGAiFxmsRIdhLWylHYcQcL86R3Un1Z8HnFlGK9m26UjwNi-gjm_4v5e9H_AgAA__9C-ZHb) who spoke to a local news outlet. "_For someone to shoot him in the back, they knew they were a kid. What's the purpose of it?_ "
## Texas Leads Nation in New Apartments
Austin, Houston, San Antonio, and Dallas are among the country’s [top 10 cities](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OqzAMhq8mbKmC-QkMGc6SrWc9IzLEtJFCghJT2rs_osN3A99mydb7-H3-3ac7-uDj4y9uZPi9pinSWQIxU562VDjSiTtm3ihyWdORHX7KBAo6qUapmsmhD5-prZyZlRvrikytu34YNWionqbHVhFqPbvBdURdM3Z9v860jC24VfWVN1eYGlVT16pW_a3R9VyrWaPWOMCAolXkPKd84ycxvbGs4ZNelG9L2qpgnsx7Ec0fAVaALTstnI8tpAXD1eW6EmD5LcDiUdhHAfZaCLAXWYBVwzVrATbTnjJL-cXIxbOnIl3afEQmGemUPzLkkmLhfCzsU5Q-yiusysbtpw_Bl16LVj029OH7J__O7svA_wAAAP__QFSQYg) for new apartments expected to be completed this year, according to a new [RentCafe analysis](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAUhJ_GdCD78GMoXGxDl223RMf4EKw1NrJPQvL2q-yV7gvcbjQajWa-P7flhj74eP-NBxl-bWmJdJVAzJSXIxWOdOGJmQ-KXLb0yA7fZQEJfS2nWraLQx_eS1c5Y6WbVEVG6X4YJw0aqt2odlPaIuhJ9isOFntn9dbZdRjbobOu8uZTJifZKiWVHJpWK6uk1ag1jjCi6CQ5zyk3vBPTC8sW3ulJuVnTUQWzM59FtL8EzALm67qaTJFX3OgTEDDbkO4C5o-LoT4w_yUWMH-JukQ8y564CJgjXfX323pNsXB-rOxTFDBX2bjz8iH4MmjRyfuBPvzfwD8j9zTwLwAA___7QoXc). The state's 81,407 new units lead the nation. [Austin](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGPnDAQBeBfYzqvxoPBUFCkobu0KdGAhzsrxkb2sNz--2jT5Aeke9KTnvS9Xx_LB4UY0udPOniS7z0vie8aWYTLcuQqiW86qcjBSeqer-LpVRcE7DSMGtrFU4ivxTZ-WsGPpuHJuK4fRocOm69p4N4NbuzRjtR2sDH14NB17HEzBk0TpvcYjNAaAwb6R-vMamB15BwNOJCywD5ILg_5YuFvqnt85SeXx5aPJk5fImdV7Q-Fs8L5vu_H7-fF71LhTEXCFlnhfOTEL4Uzbznl453WnA_Jd9IIFhTOhc9cRNNVJSQt-aw6hir6n1-vV4iirxSEva5CwlXhjP2od9cN40BeAxFpa2nTtDujPXh21vbYWmrK5M87xBhq75SFz4NC_KuQ__v-OeGfAAAA___yIphB) ranks No. 1, with 15,195 new units expected by the end of the year. The Texas capital's population increased by 10.9% between 2020 and 2024—the highest rate of growth among large U.S. cities—fueled in part by its burgeoning tech sector. [Houston](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1ugzAUhZ_GbCDbEIwHD13Y0rUjurFvgiX_IPuShLev6NA-QPdP55zvfF2XK_jg0-MTIhp63_OS8FUDEmFZYq6U8AUbFIqYqN7zXhwcdZFcXlquW94vDnw4lqFx5sadFg0aoS7jpJVUslkN9mjdOExca7woiwCTgkEpbSUC9rbx5gzjmvdCcMHHrlfiJvhNgVIwyQnYwNF5yqWjFQnfUO_hyE8snc2xCWYl2irrP5icmZzXvFfKqbN7oL1ghO3EmJxPLybnghBarASEf3T7q9janCqV3ZLPqT2XMTk3xbjt5UPwdVRs4I8IPvy00_8-exr5HQAA__8uTIOO) ranks third, with 7,770 new units, while San Antonio’s 5,921 new units are good for the No. 7 spot. The state's 81,407 new units lead the nation. | | | | | | Wednesday, September 3, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1918, actress was born in Lubbock. She played Nancy Hughes McClosky in the soap opera As the World Turns for more than 50 years. If you live in one of the state's biggest cities, you're probably accustomed to seeing a new apartment complex going up every time you turn around. A new study shows Texas in new apartment builds.
