Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | House Finalizes Several Bills The Texas House passed a bill Tuesday that removes a new provision in state law that allows voters to at their polling place if they have not moved outside the county. Gov. Abbott must sign the measure before it becomes law. During the regular session earlier this year, State Rep. Matt Shaheen (R-Plano) added the provision to an election reporting bill. Republican activists raised concerns that the change could lead to errors and election fraud. Shaheen sponsored the bill to . The House also approved legislation that prohibits lawmakers from accepting large donations or during a quorum break. During the first special session, Democrats reportedly received money from Beto O'Rourke's Powered by People PAC. Finally, a group of Republicans that would have lowered the voter-approval tax rate from 3.5% to 2.5% for cities and counties with more than 75,000 people. Houston Boy Killed Playing 'Ding-Dong Ditch' A Houston boy was shot and killed Saturday night while playing “ding-dong ditch,” a game that involves ringing a home's doorbell and then running away. Gonzalo Leon Jr., 42, has been in connection with the shooting. According to police, 11-year-old Julian Guzman was playing the game with his younger cousin. The two boys knocked on the suspect's door twice within a period of a few minutes. After knocking a third time, Leon allegedly , firing multiple shots. Leon, an Army veteran, was allegedly "waiting in the shadows in his own side yard behind a fence" . Authorities seized about 20 rifles, shotguns, and pistols from his home. "What harm could they have done? Playing with a doorbell? " who spoke to a local news outlet. "For someone to shoot him in the back, they knew they were a kid. What's the purpose of it? " Texas Leads Nation in New Apartments Austin, Houston, San Antonio, and Dallas are among the country’s for new apartments expected to be completed this year, according to a new . The state's 81,407 new units lead the nation. ranks No. 1, with 15,195 new units expected by the end of the year. The Texas capital's population increased by 10.9% between 2020 and 2024—the highest rate of growth among large U.S. cities—fueled in part by its burgeoning tech sector. ranks third, with 7,770 new units, while San Antonio’s 5,921 new units are good for the No. 7 spot. Dallas is ninth, with 5,778 units. Fort Worth’s 3,793 new units earned the No. 20 spot among cities, boosting projected completions for the Dallas-Fort Worth metro—part of a separate metro category—to 28,958, a 22.4% drop from last year’s total and 1,065 . | Flying together with our sponsor Struggling with knee pain, swelling, or stiffness? Enjoy enhanced joint stability, improved proprioception, and gentle warmth that eases soreness, makes movement feel smoother, and helps muscles recover faster. Lightweight and snug by design, it supports every step—during workouts or daily life—. | ➤ E-cigarettes or vapes that contain the psychoactive cannabinoid THC are now illegal in Texas as the legislature continues to debate the future of all consumable THC products. () ➤ San Antonio: UTSA formally merged with the University of Texas Health Science Center at San Antonio on Sept. 1. With 40,000 students and $486 million in annual research expenditures, it is now the state's third-largest public research university. () ➤ Harris County: Commissioners authorized nearly $470,000 to cover costs associated with the Gay Softball World Series after the governor's office denied funding for the organization. Over 200 teams will participate in the annual event later this month. () ➤ Lubbock: The Texas Tech Board of Regents is expected to name State Sen. Brandon Creighton (R-Conroe) as the sole finalist to become the system's next chancellor. Creighton has authored legislation that bans DEI initiatives at the state's public universities and imposes restrictions on campus protests. () ➤ Kerr County: Camp Waldemar, Vista Camps, and Camp Stewart have expressed concern about the potential expense of relocating cabins out of floodplains, as required by pending legislation crafted in response to the deadly July 4 flash floods. name: Paul Dans, Candidate for U.S. Senate
subject: I created Project 2025, now I am running to unseat this RINO
body:
Help me FIRE Lindsey Graham.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5au/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Patriot, I need your support to help retire Lindsey Graham.
I know that South Carolina deserves a conservative champion and if we are going to deliver on the America First agenda that gave Republicans control of the Senate then we cannot afford to send a swamp creature like Graham back to Congress.
**[I’m Paul Dans, founder of Project 2025, and I’m running to knock Lindsey Graham out of the Senate in the 2026 Republican primary.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5au/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
Graham has spent the past**** 30 years in Washington**,** cozying up to the Uniparty and**** playing both sides**,** while our conservative values get tossed aside.
The facts don’t lie:

* **He’s the king of flip-flopping.** The people of South Carolina know this. They know that Graham is a RINO whose values shift whichever way the wind blows, and it’s why he has a dismal** 34%** approval rating from voters.
* **He’s one of the biggest allies of the Uniparty.** Graham’s record as Senator shows that time and again he has delivered for the D.C. establishment that wants to increase the size of government but not the people voting for him that voted for their Senator to put America First.
* **He’s one of the fiercest advocates for involving our nation in endless wars.** Lindsey pushes for a war-hawk doctrine that has failed America. While our nation suffers at home he has been egging Trump on to bomb Iran, pushed for us to join endless foreign conflicts, and he even got slapped with an international arrest warrant for supporting Ukraine too fiercely.
* **And he’s out of touch with Americans who suffer because of his failed leadership.** Which is why South Carolina conservatives are booing him at Trump rallies. They too know just how detached from the real issues that matter to folks like you.

His rack record is abysmal. We can do better for South Carolina, and we can do better for America.
**[Lindsey Graham is too entrenched in the Swamp, he is too compromised by special interests, and it’s time for a change.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5au/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
Right now, Republicans have control of the White House, the Senate, and the House. Additionally, our party controls state houses across the country and the majority of the Supreme Court are constitutional conservatives.
**This is a once in a generation moment to make consequential change for our country. That’s what Americans voted for.**
If you feel that the mandate given to conservative Republicans last fall isn’t being delivered it’s because of politicians like Lindsey Graham who have no interest in change. We cannot waste this moment and that’s why I am running to send him packing.

[FIRE LINDSEY GRAHAM](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5au/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, at Project 2025,**I helped design a blueprint to shrink government, secure our borders, protect family values, and to put America First.**
Now I’m bringing that battle to the Senate to forge a new path for South Carolina and America**.**
But let's be real: Graham’s massive war chest and insider network isn’t going to go down without a fight.
You and I both know Graham is going to go out on a crusade against me, he will launch massive smear campaigns, tarnish my good name, and lie to deceive voters.
That’s why I am reaching out to conservatives across the country to stand with me as I launch my campaign.
**It’s never been more crucial for me to build up my grassroots army so I can launch our hard-hitting programs to drown out their attacks and expose the TRUTH to the people of South Carolina.**
But without the support of patriots like you, I'll be fighting with one hand tied behind my back against Lindsey’s war chest.
**_[I need your help - and I need it today](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5au/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5au/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[JOIN TEAM DANS](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5au/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
This is our chance to take down one of Washington’s biggest villains that have been dragging our country through the mud.**__**
**__**
**_Fights like these are the only way we can ensure our party is filled with conservatives who actually work to put America First so we can take our country back once and for all._**

Remember in 2024, South Carolina proudly stood with Trump and his agenda.Now, let's give him a Senator who believes in the principles of MAGA and will deliver that agenda for the American people -******not betray us.****__**
**__**
**_[Join our fight today by chipping in $10, $25, or whatever you can afford to help me retire Lindsey Graham](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5au/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**
Together we’ll overcome Lindsey Graham and his donors and send a message to the Senate that we will fire any politician that fails to deliver and abuses their power.

_For America and South Carolina,_

**Paul Dans**
Candidate for U.S. Senate, South Carolina
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5au/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTM2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|

body:
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d1c7b401f82347a7a0c370f2b0e8da47&_e=o3QpzlPaXns6-vOWSZVU1zIwaGHpGJBmaXwCamCvCel36Fc4BAmD2kLjnw61074LEOTUpgfAP96owogHnRBgqjW6jqjZ_lcB22oQpk4LBZuqdZdrFsoZNaqL3JRYdrzcyhcqAfuXRFQK7CZ0h53fVEHcCpHYMZ2JXYDPSLZ_6zGd2fZ5qRy-QkY_wISls7kHpnzmUiHjs06fqclVr-zV9rRYUBB6HvmWKZH5m1nZjCikFVwpNVMJIrO63ZpMuuDmayK-fI3BKXg3tuZy4KLGrKTVSnCfn8T-CLbDrwpUu4WG432RnHiJAQkd5NjBb6rK8vjDGls9whbdJVfQN9VtPdy-mzzQYIbcp0nyO7p3HyjXeJaHKNHY8uvigXOoFTzSYi1Gm-pnE7Y_YfQpOaPJdqZu4NRlJXt-0zi8z6uWE-l86PH9ES0Hyru9QIJIiFWEBj3X-HcWyXms9WriA-pAqKze_8didBBaJrbqYqh1sPEwdbuMWzAcSEfwNg68UaYFbdN6s92KieAgsCHuX9Ol-a7hSYtsQ28cRZt6ICpQzqTcdefWycKeYapBZAU225tPNxgi0CJ1Q5ec-kyQdlnUQA%3D%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d1c7b401f82347a7a0c370f2b0e8da47&_e=o3QpzlPaXns6-vOWSZVU1zIwaGHpGJBmaXwCamCvCel36Fc4BAmD2kLjnw61074LEOTUpgfAP96owogHnRBgqjW6jqjZ_lcB22oQpk4LBZuqdZdrFsoZNaqL3JRYdrzcyhcqAfuXRFQK7CZ0h53fVDGbItrrjj13dZN6U97g6PchUgFImX-u-W2XEEU8rwWNs2zvhwiwmYi-aqLTAEQpDl7FGSlgNEX6ICGUgOSJzVhOmPQVcrqGt40mNmuxCXKjPuMDlyZlQqI_j_wk16bz7YfEic2t1WVx9-KDq86r-9rh0UWWM3BqyjNGSMIdiSxlYB4P9CwXV2uM1K_cjn1lQrj1X69tycIhOFqgkUPTrLBeVkTPxmsEHSAynbcLgH6S2Hnlbgm8ubfMVc14hujE2Ffu4JXGz-Kyj8Cj9inSdlKcNJ7Nb9qiPN-PJUM2yNOvoE8-XVi6QdMuRcYvwbHKuNUklAsmnQSku6sLBoHWlVy7R9gpRXRSrej9VLXhUv1YVlG3314-HjwQK1s0vL-h4f3eKx51vh12uTfBVoEpmV58GuWrSW04TM2osPGGuAJ2XdfJrUmnPDXbyRAj8PSqkA%3D%3D)

Friend,

First responders go by a lot of names...

... firefighter.
... paramedic.
... police officer.
... disaster response technician.
... border patrol agent.

**But you and I know them by the one name they won 't call themselves: hero.**

First responders are the hometown heroes who keep us safe. They go to work every day, even though that means confronting the worst situations imaginable. It's what makes these men and women heroes. They know what they signed up for and do it anyway.

However, their service and sacrifice are almost always overlooked by the Radical Left.

It's time to restore trust and honor to our first responders.

That's why I wrote my latest book, _Behind the Badge_ , dedicated to telling their story.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d1c7b401f82347a7a0c370f2b0e8da47&_e=o3QpzlPaXns6-vOWSZVU1zIwaGHpGJBmaXwCamCvCel36Fc4BAmD2kLjnw61074LEOTUpgfAP96owogHnRBgqjW6jqjZ_lcB22oQpk4LBZuqdZdrFsoZNaqL3JRYdrzcyhcqAfuXRFQK7CZ0h53fVLcmpSnPtWvaHzrQ8pK_dH9m4N2E74eobsX8eXXG8xxUCSNtK2G1de4_6i7o3XfbCeDOZw73gVuE7SOF_pGhdxr8U019khdh4c7cB0MTiKTtk1oQ3uqFCfAxE2AlLeA-TX6C63EDUjIKCUs-xCOnfnIHARewWzu0RXb_oNmV49whap-ZcWu1mN2ebdqKQBgpT1RAgMP8DFIEXX_M7qFZqVxOz19y5A1l_q380_O5LDrC_59Jz3eQEBWXvWfP3qOPiWk2pWmxyP4XZglCVb6rzU54g-fdoRcrjJ_fDBNekBtXdxDdjMLsZxE0HZDEUu5eG52q9lxvimuGVCZOM8BoCaLze8OUo6Jnv8l3V9daAaSywJcwp_ECktWEmxk_kCFiN2x6oSgrxeNktPt2ynIj-hlpazJCBdam_NCFU0GeuY0FJmlSXUcwiVEvDOMm8tOV0Q%3D%3D)

I am also teaming up with the Kash Foundation to support our first responders and veterans.

While activists take cheap shots at our first responders, the Kash Foundation is restoring faith in their service, defending their dignity, and standing up for them when attacked by the media and activists.

[I believe in the mission of the Kash Foundation, and I am helping them raise money to support our veterans and first responders by raising $20,000 before the end of the month.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d1c7b401f82347a7a0c370f2b0e8da47&_e=o3QpzlPaXns6-vOWSZVU1zIwaGHpGJBmaXwCamCvCel36Fc4BAmD2kLjnw61074LEOTUpgfAP96owogHnRBgqjW6jqjZ_lcB22oQpk4LBZuqdZdrFsoZNaqL3JRYdrzcyhcqAfuXRFQK7CZ0h53fVDaXYgnWJ5ITgZEebbUm0_9B9RBZxCWWliDugEBEMLwvkeeO1USBoQorO_uMwSgHhpG7s8APKcg5CZyAWDHgJquqaUMbErHxRPvBAntpo_jIRg5OdBojVWN1eKEOGPCBCbx6VM0PilXH15FC9WFOGK2mo24DU2RNFMYUmMHi1LIcvh8fKPeUGRQzzPTmqIh1feGn7aL8apOQ3BJzXbdgoD3fff2cxa4mvnKXXLYTn3TgdTJl_wctrHvOQMG1tzJ72_CiyVsuY6lKzYYNNc40r0hbwHrwZW_d3xIW1825_WduSDaSWiak3X8dQ5vLugBZupA71YePKLz021_L7utBzgyAqFoQAAEiAgTLL7bSnLwJnVbhcPGrw6UcmzufzGzOLZ1_df79rtH6bTrT9etZ0qNLEtgYCEkh-Ae8LgMlywTXkz-1Ge2TbHcrgEaE8V17lSup14n5jOLQu9U-zHZEmg8%3D)

But you and I know them by the one name they won 't call themselves: hero. First responders are the hometown heroes who keep us safe. They go to work every day, even though that means confronting the worst situations imaginable. It's what makes these men and women heroes. They know what they signed up for and do it anyway. However, their service and sacrifice are almost always overlooked by the Radical Left. It's time to restore trust and honor to our first responders. name: Apocalyptic
subject: A chain reaction that ends the Democratic party as we know it
body:
It may sound like a parochial local race but if Democrats lose here it will set off a chain reaction that will end the Democratic party as we know it.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001izXJgqLIZ0jN3kWwbtBXIYbUd422NU624wUCqvWzLjToKutfsliBTlM9lWa0kNNIfErujxJsRYE-gfvkmz7mASlBTWDwjmhM1qsaL2cfO1NYTW3FtuXCGfWJT-0V0OHgoq-Yjde0cKWO2igHuKzuVrbBSYYWTNaXGUHaN9p3heBGEC9dFdau2TYRORvmGI2fRkiw3NfpMnHEC4A0in20WFNmmNOyj2MpupY3-a9z7Ig=&c=BUXaPx8ommVR71-kc8gelme0H6EElzkFYXh1bUryaBV61hdN2Jw_Cg==&ch=wbgbi7zHGfnlUUI2EQ8yY5xY6ZsOCvJKE8Pv2_gu-XvaYfqWlutkyQ==)

| Peter,
Life is bleak under the second Trump administration but things stand to get apocalyptically worse.
In November 2025, Pennsylvania will hold an obscure judicial election that will determine the fate of the 3 vote democratic majority on the PA State Supreme Court. It may sound like a parochial local race but if Democrats lose here it will set off a chain reaction that will end the Democratic party as we know it.
This is how it would go down:
Domino 1: Democrats lose the PA Supreme Court, Republican Justices are appointed, a sweeping set of verdicts are issued:

* Extreme MAGA voter suppression upheld and early and mail in voting banned.
* Extreme abortion ban upheld.
* GOP redistricting to axe all of PA's blue Congressional seats is upheld.

Domino 2: Democrats lose the 2026 midterms. Don't take back the House.
Domino 3: The voter suppression measures approved by the PA Supreme Court ensure that in 2028 Trump wins Pennsylvania and their 19 electoral college votes. The blue wall collapses (again) and Trump takes a third term.
Domino 4: Unable to win elections the Democratic party cedes the nation to a triumphant MAGA movement and fades into obscurity. One party rule is established.
Taking advantage of the low profile nature of this election MAGA is quietly dumping tens of millions of dollars into this race while Democrats are nowhere to be found. If the election were held today Democrats would lose it.
[Defend Our Courts is one of the only organizations ringing the alarm bell about this election and we are scrambling to mount the defense of these Democratic justices. Can we count on you to make a contribution of whatever you can spare to help us put up a fight and pull Democrats back from the brink of disaster?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001izXJgqLIZ0jN3kWwbtBXIYbUd422NU624wUCqvWzLjToKutfsliBTlM9lWa0kNNIfErujxJsRYE-gfvkmz7mASlBTWDwjmhM1qsaL2cfO1NYTW3FtuXCGfWJT-0V0OHgoq-Yjde0cKWO2igHuKzuVrbBSYYWTNaXGUHaN9p3heBGEC9dFdau2TYRORvmGI2fRkiw3NfpMnHEC4A0in20WOWkkZM8G7rM7DjAHqGY2_s=&c=BUXaPx8ommVR71-kc8gelme0H6EElzkFYXh1bUryaBV61hdN2Jw_Cg==&ch=wbgbi7zHGfnlUUI2EQ8yY5xY6ZsOCvJKE8Pv2_gu-XvaYfqWlutkyQ==)

name: L.t. Gen. Michael Flynn
subject: Did Barack Obama commit treason when he launched a multi-front campaign to destroy Donald Trump, his allies, and cripple his incoming Administration?
body:
They never had any evidence... but that didn’t stop them| | |
---
| |
---
| | Peter,**Did Barack Obama commit treason when he launched a multi-front campaign to destroy Donald Trump, his allies, and cripple his incoming Administration?** My answer is “Yes” because I was personally and professionally destroyed by them.Barack Obama along with Hillary Clinton, Susan Rice, James Comey, and other power-hungry radicals concocted this scheme from inside the White House.But the real conspiracy wasn’t just behind closed doors.Everyone was in on it – especially and most dangerously the mainstream media. I’m talking about 24/7 hit pieces. The never-ending barrage of mysterious leaks. Their conspiracy was made possible by collaborators inside the FBI like James Comey and the House Intelligence Committee like Adam Schiff who lied to your face that they had evidence to “get” Trump.This is why I’ve partnered with my friends at the American Media Council to make sure we can reshape the media landscape before the next hoax can destroy our country. **[Today, I’m asking you to join me in supporting their critical mission.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7576f80f156349d2aab93a4a57e4f918&_e=Ys1wXaR3u9Dp-ZyU9TdjDkAEgV4st2J0U4jI7wo0difKqgjeGOKwB044iNcuUgPNIYsxvUKVQ572u6Es_h8AazT6CYuh667XxmI_cWscH-oR1GqKfK2zIQXGEAOEOHEK4fRwnOlVbWYYD9oAY9d4F357TgeqgoVdsKlJvvN2OmMGhbC-ZIU7MGUFRFxlM_ntjK2vFgU8MVwEkNIsDRHLT0aYknNG1r-pE1pmO2LbtpYnKf6Td7ZNBYvxY9MaoRddentwZG953ErGKmbb1q4Jf33q5NLR3D6jQejjOKPlQkkHGzxjproXUb27H1JlqYj56Xr_5-TjRFEp3XwABdXsLIVlu6Nuzo7l16VjoJueeGWT_6oZyrewYn6Zw6eZVJOpIDJw4TcVcl_nTtLuMern3v0iKajnoR_4sSw3ymsKlbVrGt5DwBnatxP0Wug3vrAR3BRt-3WkxU9heTNlb25Sb258x2AgxANgQbIP9UdxPP4qlTY0UQlKTjU1KOlNxJeiaBru4qwB7k_0bQptgSKnG1Q_asJ2VizeYdW5ko3FF1kfcoPBHpPzaX0OJTWpC4ojfvGal2THSSq67RvxZVb51CN83s6HiHwzfPE1AqUB4hHAx6nQWRG2YBQou0GO_yj9hB8JPVjOR-ydf3Z8jMiqSrK6KyZ8JFYsO3wF7c8g8_1neK_Qa35NRWX1A1KLhOq-Jhm1NvycRY_8S0rl827vRaeQu_o6nLKAH3e1fnwy3yyuG0QyJONdu9eiKpkS8kiFt14jJrejacVVej0tNnsH5g%3D%3D)** It’s a mission I care deeply about because I was the target of the Fake News’ lies.Here’s the truth: Obama and Hillary didn’t have a lick of evidence when they cooked up this hoax. Here’s the _disturbing_ truth: they didn’t need any.They could make up whatever they wanted to and feed it to the mainstream media monster. That’s exactly what they did.Let me explain:
---
1. They planted fake evidence in the mainstream media.

2. The mainstream media ran them as if they were fact.

3. The mainstream media's coverage was cited as proof the fake evidence was real.

---
It was terrible circular logic built on a mountain of lies.**But it worked.** It worked because the liberal media drilled it into the minds of millions of Americans that President Trump was some kind of traitor.The whole time, these Trump-hating journalists celebrated their role in making this hoax a reality. The Washington Post even won a Pulitzer Prize over it!The level to which the liberal media went to justify this insanity was insane itself.That’s why today I’m honored to partner with a group who’s fighting to stop another hoax like this from destroying our country.The American Media Council understands what’s really going on:**The power-hungry radicals in Washington who have weaponized our government have also weaponized the mainstream media.** Their mission is to restore truth in the media before the Fake News can destroy our country. They’re the reason I’m able to write you this. What I deeply respect about the American Media Council is that they aren’t sitting back and watching it happen. They’re on the frontlines trying to make a difference.
---
* They publish the facts behind top media hoaxes.
* They hold journalists accountable with their “Truth in Journalism” Pledge.
* They give out “Trustworthy Ratings” to help patriots like you know which sites you can trust.

---
But that’s not all.Thanks to the generous support of patriots like you, they have a **“First Amendment Fund”** to help conservatives overcome lawfare waged by the mainstream media. **[Today, will you consider filling their “First Amendment Fund” with a donation of $35 or more?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7576f80f156349d2aab93a4a57e4f918&_e=Ys1wXaR3u9Dp-ZyU9TdjDkAEgV4st2J0U4jI7wo0difKqgjeGOKwB044iNcuUgPNIYsxvUKVQ572u6Es_h8AazT6CYuh667XxmI_cWscH-oR1GqKfK2zIQXGEAOEOHEK4fRwnOlVbWYYD9oAY9d4F357TgeqgoVdsKlJvvN2OmMGhbC-ZIU7MGUFRFxlM_ntjK2vFgU8MVwEkNIsDRHLT0aYknNG1r-pE1pmO2LbtpYnKf6Td7ZNBYvxY9MaoRddentwZG953ErGKmbb1q4Jf6WEnvEC05XFkRbi9HfYyatFRXcqf07Tt_p02X4xL8ZbyEqr2BwUm_Ds1zjrCDSXV61-mdSE7plKH039JSibhTbidV5MbrHarkILuUSpVF6ZuiwpBxXL7BY9NG6vCGv4ximQvQLuJmTsxH9M13xfBG7s0YxIOcTQDofL-TRFVV1ARpuVpFLaoTeGFIYutmteCeCq7nymnJrYGkFuxywYIiiFa9dGG8LZhTvJRxGJabk6I_KpxZL3cIaxc23xAIVDcobBVrBW41Vhn2XjnrB_EnFAA02Wn-qIPNDOgIpwOg32R1tmB133kdtGXf8tq-WRXRyOXQBQ5UC_pTRaJLyFDZxxevnN9TQnBHZ9n0k_KrtC_35mZTsg4FQmAFWb6rZxRICiWKv8vkTlwk9sHEHC6Rd2Ex-e4pCJEVaQUhSsw3to8Rpx1e2tnfsjZp2_QDL8TPVCsj5BfY2wEE_n5Ld7NB4zOubeEwA6Y2L6RT9dzabI50cjYGE20jfmeFwoy7mkYA%3D%3D)** A $35 donation would be a tremendous help. But if you feel called to make a monthly donation, say $15 or more, I will send you a complimentary copy of Pardon of Innocence.It’s so important to me that you support the American Media Council that I want to “Thank You” with a complimentary book.My friend, it’s hard to put into words just how impactful your support will be today...... but I’ll try.The Deep State wanted to destroy me.They tried to take away my career and financially bankrupt my family. I had to sell my house to pay the endless legal fees. It put my wife, Lori, through hell and back.That’s the Left’s goal.**Humiliation. Retaliation. Destruction.**Sadly, the damage to my reputation can’t be fixed in a courtroom or wiped from the internet.President Donald Trump pardoned me. My name has been officially cleared. clean_body: They never had any evidence... but that didn’t stop them| | | | | | | Peter,Did Barack Obama commit treason when he launched a multi-front campaign to destroy Donald Trump, his allies, and cripple his incoming Administration? My answer is “Yes” because I was personally and professionally destroyed by them.Barack Obama along with Hillary Clinton, Susan Rice, James Comey, and other power-hungry radicals concocted this scheme from inside the White House.But the real conspiracy wasn’t just behind closed doors.Everyone was in on it – especially and most dangerously the mainstream media. I’m talking about 24/7 hit pieces. The never-ending barrage of mysterious leaks. Their conspiracy was made possible by collaborators inside the FBI like James Comey and the House Intelligence Committee like Adam Schiff who lied to your face that they had evidence to “get” Trump.This is why I’ve partnered with my friends at the American Media Council to make sure we can reshape the media landscape before the next hoax can destroy our country. It’s a mission I care deeply about because I was the target of the Fake News’ lies.Here’s the truth: Obama and Hillary didn’t have a lick of evidence when they cooked up this hoax. Here’s the disturbing truth: they didn’t need any.They could make up whatever they wanted to and feed it to the mainstream media monster. That’s exactly what they did.Let me explain: 1. They planted fake evidence in the mainstream media. 2. The mainstream media ran them as if they were fact. 3. The mainstream media's coverage was cited as proof the fake evidence was real. It was terrible circular logic built on a mountain of lies.But it worked. It worked because the liberal media drilled it into the minds of millions of Americans that President Trump was some kind of traitor.The whole time, these Trump-hating journalists celebrated their role in making this hoax a reality. The Washington Post even won a Pulitzer Prize over it!The level to which the liberal media went to justify this insanity was insane itself.That’s why today I’m honored to partner with a group who’s fighting to stop another hoax like this from destroying our country.The American Media Council understands what’s really going on:The power-hungry radicals in Washington who have weaponized our government have also weaponized the mainstream media. Their mission is to restore truth in the media before the Fake News can destroy our country. They’re the reason I’m able to write you this. What I deeply respect about the American Media Council is that they aren’t sitting back and watching it happen. They’re on the frontlines trying to make a difference. They publish the facts behind top media hoaxes. They hold journalists accountable with their “Truth in Journalism” Pledge. They give out “Trustworthy Ratings” to help patriots like you know which sites you can trust. But that’s not all.Thanks to the generous support of patriots like you, they have a “First Amendment Fund” to help conservatives overcome lawfare waged by the mainstream media. A $35 donation would be a tremendous help. But if you feel called to make a monthly donation, say $15 or more, I will send you a complimentary copy of Pardon of Innocence.It’s so important to me that you support the American Media Council that I want to “Thank You” with a complimentary book.My friend, it’s hard to put into words just how impactful your support will be today...... but I’ll try.The Deep State wanted to destroy me.They tried to take away my career and financially bankrupt my family. I had to sell my house to pay the endless legal fees. It put my wife, Lori, through hell and back.That’s the Left’s goal.Humiliation. Retaliation. Destruction.Sadly, the damage to my reputation can’t be fixed in a courtroom or wiped from the internet.President Donald Trump pardoned me. My name has been officially cleared. But no matter where I go... certain people will always see me the way the liberal media painted me.That’s why the Left pushes these hoaxes. It’s all about inflicting maximum punishment on anybody who dares to stand up against their radical doctrine.Your support of the American Media Council and their “First Amendment Fund” today will directly help patriots like me clear their names and stand up against the liberal media’s lies.This is only possible with your support today. If you’re in a position to sign up for a monthly donation today – $15 or more – I will send you a complimentary copy of Pardon of Innocence as my sincere thanks. Thank You and God Bless You Lt. Gen. 🏈 You're Invited to the NEGOP Tailgate! 🏈 We're kicking off campaign season the only way we know how: grilled food, great company, and bold Republican energy.
This is your chance to:

* Meet fellow Nebraskans who care about making a difference

* Learn simple ways you can get involved or support the team

Whether you're brand new or already plugged in, this is the perfect way to kick off fall with us!

name: Team USA
subject: The greatest story ever told
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC)
body:
---
| | | | | | | Untitled Document **[DONALD J. TRUMP: A STORY FOR THE AGES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrpfe9s0l6orcefk2dcngg42pvfnsi83chknrv80_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
Friend, we won't lie. This email is long, but we have a story to tell.

This is the tale of the __greatest President in American history,__ President Trump, a man who has sacrificed everything to fight for YOU. **Against EVERY SINGLE odd,** he is SET on saving our Republic once and for all.

Only a SMALL percentage of Americans open emails like this, so thank you. It means a lot. We're asking you to do just one thing: read this entire message and give a **[CRITICAL $5 donation.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztvp9ti03roocmev0ef01jd4fgggv6nrg3vuanl8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**

When you're done, if you still think a **[$5 donation](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3blc4d6jg9oikj862kusivkv1nvg6elf9r9d048_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)** doesn't matter, we thank you anyway.

**[But if you believe in President Trump's MAGA movement, then join us. Become part of the 1% who go the extra mile and fuel the America-First agenda.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z27k17cf9j7lgjtd6v0k7bvqmll66mus91nur608_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)** | **[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr5nape3j9fcb5ods28fpnoajhdl7daskl8u8ehg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg4drkhonv6v17n9stuhrmv758mfloftfnu2tvto_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

So how did we end up in the UNPRECEDENTED **Golden Age** of America in August 2025?

Here's the story:

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8cnofvkbd01vko3gn4a2e1n9jsbier6stb8ju10_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

It started with _one escalator ride._ **Businessman Donald J. Trump** gave up a perfect life to save a country in decline. And just like that, the greatest political movement in history was born.

**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0mhbvvls8i8m8j7fqc7sa7tcb72c093nir68nl8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt2oua4tob49hhuvdda97k14m2c16r8bpa4lrn50_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

Trump didn't just walk into politics--**he DOMINATED it.** In 2016, he beat out _17 establishment Republicans_ and became the WINNING GOP nominee.

**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmp2fho53tc7ar11k4noc8u6qraigsl6dlhr1lo0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv0m3dbalqd0trumbmt3fluorsk9oeev6a27lkgo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

The media called him a _JOKE_ and a _CON._ _Polls said he didn 't stand a chance._ The Democratic nominee, Hillary Clinton, PUBLICLY mocked Trump and called us **" deplorables"** for believing in him and his movement.

But, the American people stood UP against the Swamp, and on November 8th, 2016, **Trump won the Presidency.**

**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu01os7t05n1928vt7mfrp3l3jbrbg45jo14i83g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjp63nvdet3orh88ovci184c8r5fvga78hhv3hsg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

The moment he took the oath of office, everything changed. Trump delivered a historic address, _**not for the elites,**_ but for the **forgotten men and women** of America.

And then came the wins. __And boy, were there MANY.__
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuan07afertvl070onc7h3kukff86lolg3v8p8jo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuh8k63ei0pinmbnku3dur1fabtlqeo0mv7a08po_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

Trump got to work, and in NO TIME, America changed for the better:

**✅ The Wall went up
✅ The economy soared
✅ Jobs came back
✅ America was respected
✅ Peace through strength became real**

But the Swamp wasn't done. _They launched HOAX after HOAX to take him down._
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7cu3nbmpgkcdra6vsot1ib7b58l0levf713rq60_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgbdpb29n17s425kgp6hhgoemdgj0fueo168dfs0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)
In 2019, the Leftist PIGS **impeached** Trump for __absolutely nothing.__ But our President didn't flinch.

**He stood strong, vindicated, and more determined than ever.**
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze299i0u3hg756t11mgh7rq1278jpm5c40pv7f60_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze8ksne69hqsv1iqnsmemf0t7ecanqe4dn4j8m10_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

In 2020, the world was rocked by a global pandemic. **Trump led the country with strength and clarity. **

But the Left used the CHINA VIRUS to break the rules, ushering in mail-in ballot chaos that led to a RIGGED election.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpp5q0focfr00od0oigotcmk8tp6o1on6l738tp0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

Despite CLEAR leads and overwhelming crowds, they called the 2020 election for Joe Biden. T**he Deep State, Big Tech, and the Fake News** colluded to stop Trump.

They rejoiced, thinking this was the END of the Trump era, __but they were DEAD wrong.__
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs91ctsbidmv6u91566ubioipurktecfcsmtdc48_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0u7fbn3bn1d112jtk5vtm849d1higna2f488030_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

Trump told his **patriotic supporters** to march peacefully and patriotically. _But the media twisted the truth, and Nancy Pelosi SPUN up lie after lie._

Then came the **false accusations,** censorship, and political persecution that would have made many great men surrender.

But with Biden already failing, Trump wasn't ready to throw in the towel just yet.
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zttbpqlpgv908rri6ofnh14ta385mlmfe0b3ko0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl0l7r0e56cvl9at4edljjlg16kgvjcf5dvggik8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

When Joe Biden took office, America went into _TOTAL FREEFALL and DECAY:_

**💥 Sky-high inflation
💥 Global conflict
💥 Crime and open borders
💥 Weaponized government**

America was lost, in DANGER, and without a true leader in sight. _The Left knew Trump still wanted to save America, and they took every chance they could to SCRAMBLE his plans._
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjk4ki22cjrcsqkrl2i59b2dhp00otnp9s3t6iu0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkh5fi4ullrv3d1kr67m6anckcat08pljv60f040_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

In 2022, the **FBI RAIDED Trump 's private home in Mar-a-Lago.** It was an _UNCONSTITUTIONAL attack,_ but the case? __Dismissed in July 2024.__

The witch hunts CONTINUED, but Trump was far from done with this critical fight.
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjpm0tslcchm3psoil80u554h95rvs73o22hgi1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsg91ua6sg3u5b11q9fnnleumgfgak1jkrr1f6no_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

Trump had every reason to walk away. Enemies in every corner of Washington, **BIASED Media trashing his name,** and exhausting witch hunts nearly EVERY week.

**But, he CHOSE to run again,** **not for power, not for revenge, but for YOU. **

He BOLDLY declared his campaign to Save America in late 2022.
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7gis2af9dp52tta6ocptkh1acgljr3239ropqe0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb16kjbu2b5ep93tgm8tf2do3iia2urjqmb4io48_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

The Left was _**hot**_ to retaliate, and they FALSELY INDICTED Trump in four liberal jurisdictions. New York. Georgia. DC. Florida.

Their goal? __Keep him off the ballot.__

**Result? Trump 's support SURGED to historic levels.**
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh9otkn32ds6df8kvhj4usqochkh01bcdaevec90_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zovlm2pp8r29vl5sudop5gg08skn8qsprpnkapb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

In the 2024 primaries, Trump CRUSHED his opponents state by state.

It was NEVER even close. **America wanted him back,** and the movement only grew.
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbjtnvja3oj7qp307665vprslp4ruv8ak5djca98_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgganqqqjstk973dk9ji6bh6tblo0j89f37616o0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

Then came the **SHAM conviction.** __It was political, CORRUPT as HELL, and rigged.__ But it didn't stop Trump. It FUELED him and energized his movement.

_But, not long after, a national tragedy almost took Trump and his fighting spirit away from us forever._
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrnj6p3seslofsjf5q1mcqkhj5j07fa5eu23snuo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv07h4m1g7tuq5e3nvosg70nsimlt3ci5ut30d8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

On July 13, 2024, **Trump was nearly ASSASSINATED.** _A bullet missed his brain by centimeters._ By the grace of God, he stood back up, raised his fist, and roared:

["FIGHT, FIGHT, FIGHT!"](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zihpv0756pg92c3982kie0ctbl3uhnl7gcve3bj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

With those fiery words, America knew one thing: if Trump is THIS tough and courageous in the face of DANGER and DEATH, we can WIN this fight.
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zch6drqltte4g3vldn88tnsralkpag2us3mhe720_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfjuievvqg72vnl15u9ojka4ajaeend55vbutaqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

Just days later, **Trump was confirmed as the 2024 GOP Nominee in Milwaukee.**

_The movement then took root across the nation, becoming united and unstoppable._
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh5hg8rnrhthff95mqeu3nhg907g2c9b7v1jinao_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

* * *

**[🔴🗳️ _THE LANDSLIDE VICTORY - NOVEMBER 5TH, 2024_ 🗳️🔴](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8e8um9sknj4tj3lguhp0g8bturqnor9k833mv48_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqcivfk6n538uldum9el04mh13g7de0a39fqirhg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

Then, the BIG victory came.

**The media said it couldn 't happen.** _But on November 5th, Trump delivered a MASSIVE LANDSLIDE_ , winning the Electoral College and SHOCKING the Swamp.

**Swing states no one expected flipped RED.** The American people rose up to claim an America-First leader, and Trump became the 47th President of the United States.
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7essn3q799a58mbar5tc1spbbfht7n2fgrdq3p8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

* * *

**[PEACE THROUGH STRENGTH- THE TRUMP DOCTRINE RETURNS](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3o7vk01krun9ok9vun87ssq7if3mj8kp8g193fg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z34frr1blp8n6m52gjhid45il1uubq7moqj5e6b8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)

President Trump made an EXPLOSIVE start, and **got to work right away selecting his AMAZING Cabinet and Administration.** Then, the wins followed:

**🇺 🇸 Ukraine & Russia came to the negotiating table
🇺🇸 Peace deals were brokered across the Middle East
🇺🇸 North Korea, China, and Iran backed down**

For the first time in years, the world started moving toward PEACE, not war.
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcsa7s7goq900rl7rs05ddv7ecgicjnmf3ab1rlg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

_**[🇺🇸 ONE BIG BEAUTIFUL BILL - THE NEW ERA OF TRUMP POLICY 🇺🇸](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc5mq0bqcs0l66lkccq2k41n5dec60k37q1hmh00_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**_

Next, **with Republicans leading Congress,** President Trump passed his **" One Big Beautiful Bill,"** the most EFFECTIVE legislation in decades:

**✅ Border wall finished
✅ Tax cuts made permanent
✅ DEI and ESG programs defunded
✅ Military and veterans fully prioritized
✅ American energy dominance restored**

_This was the start of the Trump Restoration_ , and there is still a LONG way to go. But, our copywriters need a break from writing, and time to get new stories in the works.
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zum2vgiscrk8jv47tmsr1a4et7g85a249090r7co_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**
---

* * *

_Did you finish the story?_ Thank you for coming this far, more than most readers would. The next chapter is still being written, and you are a part of it, Friend.

**Donald J. Trump survived witch hunts, fake impeachments, a fraudulent election,_and a bullet_ , all to keep fighting for America.**

_He didn 't have to run again. But he did.
He didn't have to fight for us. But he is.
Now it's our turn._

Will you join the top 1% of supporters by **[donating just $5?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv0i2htftu0sa94a38im17ilnvj74h1iekvbh1u0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)** This is your moment to be part of the HISTORIC Golden Age of Trump's America.

**[Give $5 to BOOST the GOP and STAND with President Trump as he SAVES America.>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrpog3m903c9jhddh7jncvhev3h61oqjr17ejgvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cji6ep71clh2bs)**

Thank you,

Team USA

At AmeriPAC, we want to personally restore our country for freedom-loving patriots like you.

In 2016, he beat out 17 establishment Republicans and became the WINNING GOP nominee. The media called him a JOKE and a CON. Polls said he didn 't stand a chance. The Democratic nominee, Hillary Clinton, PUBLICLY mocked Trump and called us " deplorables" for believing in him and his movement. But, the American people stood UP against the Swamp, and on November 8th, 2016, Trump won the Presidency. The moment he took the oath of office, everything changed. Trump delivered a historic address, not for the elites, but for the forgotten men and women of America. And then came the wins. And boy, were there MANY. Trump got to work, and in NO TIME, America changed for the better: ✅ The Wall went up ✅ The economy soared ✅ Jobs came back ✅ America was respected ✅ Peace through strength became real But the Swamp wasn't done. They launched HOAX after HOAX to take him down. In 2019, the Leftist PIGS impeached Trump for absolutely nothing. But our President didn't flinch. He stood strong, vindicated, and more determined than ever. In 2020, the world was rocked by a global pandemic. Trump led the country with strength and clarity. But the Left used the CHINA VIRUS to break the rules, ushering in mail-in ballot chaos that led to a RIGGED election. Despite CLEAR leads and overwhelming crowds, they called the 2020 election for Joe Biden. The Deep State, Big Tech, and the Fake News colluded to stop Trump. They rejoiced, thinking this was the END of the Trump era, but they were DEAD wrong. Trump told his patriotic supporters to march peacefully and patriotically. But the media twisted the truth, and Nancy Pelosi SPUN up lie after lie. Then came the false accusations, censorship, and political persecution that would have made many great men surrender. But with Biden already failing, Trump wasn't ready to throw in the towel just yet. When Joe Biden took office, America went into TOTAL FREEFALL and DECAY: 💥 Sky-high inflation 💥 Global conflict 💥 Crime and open borders 💥 Weaponized government America was lost, in DANGER, and without a true leader in sight. The Left knew Trump still wanted to save America, and they took every chance they could to SCRAMBLE his plans. In 2022, the FBI RAIDED Trump 's private home in Mar-a-Lago. It was an UNCONSTITUTIONAL attack, but the case? Dismissed in July 2024. The witch hunts CONTINUED, but Trump was far from done with this critical fight. Trump had every reason to walk away. Enemies in every corner of Washington, BIASED Media trashing his name, and exhausting witch hunts nearly EVERY week. But, he CHOSE to run again, not for power, not for revenge, but for YOU. He BOLDLY declared his campaign to Save America in late 2022. The Left was hot to retaliate, and they FALSELY INDICTED Trump in four liberal jurisdictions. New York. Georgia. DC. Florida. Their goal? Keep him off the ballot. Result? Trump 's support SURGED to historic levels. In the 2024 primaries, Trump CRUSHED his opponents state by state. It was NEVER even close. America wanted him back, and the movement only grew. Then came the SHAM conviction. It was political, CORRUPT as HELL, and rigged. But it didn't stop Trump. It FUELED him and energized his movement. But, not long after, a national tragedy almost took Trump and his fighting spirit away from us forever. On July 13, 2024, Trump was nearly ASSASSINATED. A bullet missed his brain by centimeters. By the grace of God, he stood back up, raised his fist, and roared: With those fiery words, America knew one thing: if Trump is THIS tough and courageous in the face of DANGER and DEATH, we can WIN this fight. Just days later, Trump was confirmed as the 2024 GOP Nominee in Milwaukee. The movement then took root across the nation, becoming united and unstoppable. Then, the BIG victory came. The media said it couldn 't happen. But on November 5th, Trump delivered a MASSIVE LANDSLIDE , winning the Electoral College and SHOCKING the Swamp. Swing states no one expected flipped RED. The American people rose up to claim an America-First leader, and Trump became the 47th President of the United States. President Trump made an EXPLOSIVE start, and got to work right away selecting his AMAZING Cabinet and Administration. Then, the wins followed: 🇺 🇸 Ukraine & Russia came to the negotiating table 🇺🇸 Peace deals were brokered across the Middle East 🇺🇸 North Korea, China, and Iran backed down For the first time in years, the world started moving toward PEACE, not war. Next, with Republicans leading Congress, President Trump passed his " One Big Beautiful Bill," the most EFFECTIVE legislation in decades: ✅ Border wall finished ✅ Tax cuts made permanent ✅ DEI and ESG programs defunded ✅ Military and veterans fully prioritized ✅ American energy dominance restored This was the start of the Trump Restoration , and there is still a LONG way to go. But, our copywriters need a break from writing, and time to get new stories in the works. Did you finish the story? Thank you for coming this far, more than most readers would. The next chapter is still being written, and you are a part of it, Friend. Donald J. Trump survived witch hunts, fake impeachments, a fraudulent election,and a bullet , all to keep fighting for America. He didn 't have to run again. But he did. He didn't have to fight for us. But he is. Now it's our turn. Will you join the top 1% of supporters by This is your moment to be part of the HISTORIC Golden Age of Trump's America. Thank you, Team USA Paid for by American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC) American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC) PO Box 1682 Bellevue, WA 98009-1682 Since 1980, AmeriPAC has helped fund and elect a large number of conservative, freedom-oriented candidates to public office. We’ve played a huge role in several presidential cycles. We directed much of our time and funds from generous patriots like you to oppose radical Leftist candidates, including Bill Clinton, Hillary Clinton, Barack Obama, and Kamala Harris. At AmeriPAC, we want to personally restore our country for freedom-loving patriots like you. Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# Trump and Leavitt blast CBS's Margaret Brennan as "nasty" and "stupid"
President Donald Trump and White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt **[criticized CBS News "Face the Nation" moderator Margaret Brennan](https://substack.com/redirect/1fc2c6be-1f38-41de-a6f2-8970a1edb347?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a Friday interview, with Trump calling her "so bad" and "nasty."
* **Lawsuit Victory Lap:** Speaking with the Daily Caller, Trump praised his recent settlement with CBS' parent company Paramount over his election interference lawsuit and went on to target several CBS personalities, including Brennan and former "CBS Evening News" anchor Norah O'Donnell.
"The woman on the 'Face the Nation' is so bad," Trump said, turning to ask Karoline Leavitt, "What do you think of her?"
"She's stupid. You can put that on the record," Leavitt answered.
"She's nasty," Trump added.
* **Marco Rubio Interview:** The criticism appeared to stem from Secretary of State Marco Rubio's recent contentious interview with Brennan over Trump's planned meeting with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, during which Rubio accused the moderator of pushing a "stupid media narrative."

[](https://substack.com/redirect/9ebdbe07-0479-4de8-9eb0-a72eba17380a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **_Broad + Liberty_ Unites With Access Network in Strategic Acquisition, Creating One of PA’s Largest Native Digital Media Audiences**
---
| | | | **PHILADELPHIA, PA – **Two of the region’s fastest-growing media companies, _Broad + Liberty_ and Access Network, have officially joined forces, with _Broad + Liberty_ acquiring Access Network to form a united, cutting-edge state and local multimedia company serving Pennsylvania and New Jersey. The new company, **Fideri News Network** , combines award-winning journalism, balanced political coverage, local news, sports, podcasts, digital content, radio, e-commerce, and event ticketing under one mission. By pairing editorial excellence with business innovation and scalable infrastructure, Fideri aims to build a sustainable model for revitalized local media in one of the nation’s most historically significant—and fiercely contested—media landscapes. At a time when local journalism is vanishing nationwide, and PA and NJ markets are left behind by legacy newsrooms, the need for community-rooted media has never been greater. A free and open society depends not just on national headlines, but on local voices—those who understand the stakes of a school board vote, a county budget, or a contested judicial race. That’s why Fideri will deliver more than headlines. Through **WBCB Sports** and **OnPattison.com** , we’ll grow the coverage fans already rely on—from Friday night high school matchups to smart, engaging commentary on the Eagles, Phillies, and Flyers that cuts through the noise and speaks directly to Philly sports fans. With podcasts, short-form video, broadcast radio, and more across sports, culture, local news, and politics, Fideri is building a dynamic multimedia ecosystem that meets people where they are. Principled local journalism serves as both a mirror and a compass. It reflects the lived experiences of our communities while guiding public discourse with integrity, transparency, and a commitment to truth over narrative. This new initiative aims to revive the civic fabric of our region by giving readers the context, facts, and voices they need to participate fully and faithfully in our shared public life. _"Broad + Liberty_ was founded with the belief that local media must do more than simply report — it must inform with clarity, challenge with civility, and hold power to account without fear or favor.” said Terry Tracy, founder and CEO of _Broad + Liberty_. James McDonald, founder and CEO of Access Network, added, “We believe we have a strong model and strategy to be the leader in the local digital news marketplace and have combined assets to position the company as such right from the start. I'm excited about helping to scale the company rapidly.” Tracy continued, “In an age of polarization and information overload, restoring trust by telling stories other outlets won’t is central to the company’s mission. Hence, the choice of the name Fideri—drawn from the Latin root meaning ‘to trust’ or ‘to be faithful.’ It is a reminder that trust is not given—it is earned, story by story, through diligence, fairness, and the courage to speak when silence is more convenient.” In bearing that name, Fideri affirms its role not only as a reporter of news, but as a steward of the public good. Fideri represents commitment to the facts, to the communities served, and to the timeless principles that uphold our institutions and bind us together.
**Leadership & Governance** The combined company will operate with a unified leadership structure:
* Terry Tracy, CEO of _Broad + Liberty_ , will lead the content strategy and oversee all day-to-day operations as Publisher and Chief Executive Officer.
* James McDonald, founder and CEO of Access Network, will continue as Chairman and board member, overseeing governance and corporate development.

This structure supports ambitious multi-market growth while preserving the editorial integrity and mission of each brand. Additionally the company is poised to announce the acquisition of 10 more clustered sites within the next 30 days. This will bring the number of sites to 29, creating one of the largest native digital media audiences in Pennsylvania, including the Philadelphia metropolitan area and Jersey Shore.
**Commerce, Events & Multimedia** Beyond journalism, the company offers integrated services that generate revenue and deepen community ties:
* Event Ticketing & Registration for festivals, attractions, and fundraisers
* E-Commerce for local products and small business affiliates
* Advertising & Sponsorships, newsletters, native content, programmatic display and paid content programs

**A New Model for Local Media** This merger is not just about growth, it’s a blueprint. The network model demonstrates that local news can be both principled and self-sufficient through smart governance, market alignment, and community-centered innovation. The company plans continued expansion into underserved markets, with a focus on restoring vital local coverage, supporting economic development, and connecting communities through journalism and commerce.

For a list of all sites, visit [www.fiderinews.com](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f8e7240303&e=b7b3eddce2).
---
| | Read more about the launch of Fideri in [this op-ed](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=04eeee5e8f&e=b7b3eddce2), penned by _Broad + Liberty_ founder and Fideri News publisher & CEO, Terry Tracy.

subject: Bootlickin’ Bill Lee hands over TN National Guard to Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Meanwhile Republicans cut benefits back home.
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K47SX0PMGNJTSWW0XG6J53XE_0)

---
| Dear Peter, Governor Bill Lee just yanked 160 Tennessee National Guard personnel away from their families and their jobs and sent them to Washington, D.C. These brave Tennesseans are being used as political pawns, rather than being reserved for the life-saving and emergency response functions for which they were trained. None of these individuals volunteered to participate in Donald Trump’s militarization of our nation’s capital. Donald Trump and Bill Lee’s willingness to abuse their power is threatening American citizens in one of our country’s most beautiful cities, causing personal hardships for Guard personnel, and costing Tennessee taxpayers millions of dollars. Meanwhile back home, Bill Lee is begging Donald Trump for exemptions just to allow working Tennesseans to buy hot food with their SNAP benefits. That’s right: Tennesseans need a **federal waiver** to buy a rotisserie chicken. Tennessee families rely on SNAP just to put food on the table—an average of **$118.21 million** in benefits are distributed monthly across the state and accepted by **over 6,600 food retailers.** SNAP dollars don’t just feed families—they support farmers, truck drivers, grocers, and local economies. Now, Republican work requirements are set to slash those benefits by 20%—a **$250 million cut** that will push more families into food insecurity. It’s outrageous. We MUST fight back. Troops in American streets and depriving families and children of food is not normal, and we cannot allow it to be normalized. **Your donation is your voice** —a voice for working families, for hungry children, for forgotten communities. Help us stop the GOP’s cruel cuts to the programs on which Tennesseans depend. **Chip in $20 right now** to shift our focus from political stunts with our state troops to fighting the real battle—**the battle against hunger in our state.**

This isn't just another occasion. It's a movement with Republicans from every corner of the state, and you'll want to say you were part of it.

subject: It’s not too late…
body:
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .
. . . . . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot,
---
History says the party in the White House usually loses in the midterm elections.
---
But President Trump is not one to be _defined_ by history. Instead, we _DEFY_ history.
---
[_Just “months into his second term, the president is already hyper-engaged in the fight to keep the GOP’s majorities in Congress... he’s bullish about defying history and keeping Democrats away from committee gavels and subpoena powers”_
_-Source: POLITICO_](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, we know what Obama’s Democrats will do if they seize the _“committee gavels and subpoena powers.”_
---
**One Democrat proposed rounding up ICE agents, bringing them to the floor of Congress, and _DOXXING_ them before the public!**
---
They’ll revive the old lawfare playbook of 2024 – only this time from the Speaker’s Chair.
---
_And all those Articles of Impeachment that have been STRUCK DOWN by our current Republican House Majority? They’ll come roaring back and get PASSED._
---
Here’s what’s worrisome... According to _Gallup_ , **Democrats now hold a 3-POINT LEAD in party identification.**
---
**But before you start scratching your head, that’s __not__ an approval rating. It’s just verified voters. They are getting more of their base registered, verified, and ready.**
---
_While that’s a problem, it’s one we can easily turn around right now with** _your_** help._
---
Patriot, we’ve crunched the numbers and with our razor-thin majority now within the margin of error, YOUR voter profile is the difference maker. _It’s not too late._
---
_That’s why I’m reaching out today to simply ask that you VERIFY your GOP voter profile to give me and President Trump the most accurate polling possible as we CLOSE THE**3-POINT GAP** on the Democrats._
---
The President is committed to DEFY history. Are _YOU_?
---
[**Please complete the questionnaire before the deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. to verify your voter profile. >>**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[VERIFY NOW ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Jim Jordan
---
---

name: Team Freedom Va
subject: We Hope You Had A Great Labor Day Weekend!
body:
It’s hard to believe that Labor Day has already come and gone- before we know it, the leaves will be changing colors and the days will be getting cooler! But summer isn’t over yet, and we at Freedom V
| | |
---
| |
---
| We Hope You Had A Great Labor Day Weekend!
---
| Friends-
It's hard to believe that Labor Day has already come and gone- before we know it, the leaves will be changing colors and the days will be getting cooler! But summer isn't over yet, and we at Freedom Virginia have been making the most of it.
Early in August, we joined Delegate Kelly Convirs-Fowler, the National Domestic Workers' Alliance, Affordable Virginia, and other organizations to put Families First in Virginia Beach! Together, we collectively demanded an end to policies that actively harm children, seniors, and families, such as the cutting of Medicaid, food stamps, school lunches, and more.
---
| | [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dI5GwrryjG_P1obwOr8-7-QfMtff6h4VrIwZv2jDkpWkrZ3h7l66xSCw08cVWZuY1dIGIzIiyxrszMiweDQBHjrO2lmVFSzvPrwZsvWRzq-_Nn7-hRSrGhXrRAHz3SvQIp7twZH7Q2SD1SfcPo_tVEkAXMlXPXpRNt88o9bEvf6adG8zFNNqrfDzB8sn8lq7tvexJJdWgvA6ezcLIqykLgOxXtQQQTVaVRZ2yycDHkMZGJYa7ExniQYUwN7FACEVoH190GNhIWIU-ip2Vxdq73nGrxmK1sMW95M7SA_zAbeeCc8a4ghb946HAa9XWMVO&c=WmlAGEKI1kpms4OGv8IP0Wj-5OxPxx2f8mWw7fz8wdbTujdkVlr-LA==&ch=UPtps81Lf1r73Y0QhEoACDz5duA6PDdbXbv_d7ew1chyfx3eTxfHBg==)
---
| Later, we met with Affordable Virginia, Care In Action, the League of Conservation Voters, Delegate Kelly Convirs-Fowler, and special guest, Martin O'Malley, to educate our community about the Republican budget and answer any questions about how these cuts will impact our community. We called on Representative Jen Kiggans-- who voted for the budget and has not held any town halls to listen to her constituents-- to face her community and hear from people whose lives will be negatively impacted by her votes.
---
| [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dI5GwrryjG_P1obwOr8-7-QfMtff6h4VrIwZv2jDkpWkrZ3h7l66xSCw08cVWZuY1dIGIzIiyxrszMiweDQBHjrO2lmVFSzvPrwZsvWRzq-_Nn7-hRSrGhXrRAHz3SvQIp7twZH7Q2SD1SfcPo_tVEkAXMlXPXpRNt88o9bEvf6adG8zFNNqrfDzB8sn8lq7tvexJJdWgvA6ezcLIqykLgOxXtQQQTVaVRZ2yycDHkMZGJYa7ExniQYUwN7FACEVoH190GNhIWIU-ip2Vxdq73nGrxmK1sMW95M7SA_zAbe2wr_tEX61gDiGB_bQNwzq&c=WmlAGEKI1kpms4OGv8IP0Wj-5OxPxx2f8mWw7fz8wdbTujdkVlr-LA==&ch=UPtps81Lf1r73Y0QhEoACDz5duA6PDdbXbv_d7ew1chyfx3eTxfHBg==)
---
We- along with Affordable Virginia, LCV, National Domestic Workers Alliance, Planned Parenthood and SEIU- gathered with Virginians for a town hall with Representative Bobby Scott.
Thank you to our incredible Shalonda Dozier-Calhoun, who shared her inspiring story on Medicaid, caregiving, and her son Seth.
---
| [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dI5GwrryjG_P1obwOr8-7-QfMtff6h4VrIwZv2jDkpWkrZ3h7l66xSCw08cVWZuY1dIGIzIiyxrszMiweDQBHjrO2lmVFSzvPrwZsvWRzq-_Nn7-hRSrGhXrRAHz3SvQIp7twZH7Q2SD1SfcPo_tVEkAXMlXPXpRNt88o9bEvf6adG8zFNNqrfDzB8sn8lq7tvexJJdWgvA6ezcLIqykLgOxXtQQQTVaVRZ2yycDHkMZGJYa7ExniQYUwN7FACEVoH190GNhIWIU-ip2Vxdq73nGrxmK1sMW95M7SA_zAbfmMzqeF06n1s5IwGHUbUYB&c=WmlAGEKI1kpms4OGv8IP0Wj-5OxPxx2f8mWw7fz8wdbTujdkVlr-LA==&ch=UPtps81Lf1r73Y0QhEoACDz5duA6PDdbXbv_d7ew1chyfx3eTxfHBg==)
---
| And on Labor Day, our Organizing Director Eddie Seay joined others and spoke at a Workers over Billionaires event at Town Point in Norfolk. In Virginia, workers making over $17,000 a year are in the highest-earning tax bracket, meaning that they pay the same tax rate as millionaires and billionaires. It's time for a fair tax system in Virginia!
---

clean_body: It’s hard to believe that Labor Day has already come and gone- before we know it, the leaves will be changing colors and the days will be getting cooler! But summer isn’t over yet, and we at Freedom V | | | | | | We Hope You Had A Great Labor Day Weekend! | Friends- It's hard to believe that Labor Day has already come and gone- before we know it, the leaves will be changing colors and the days will be getting cooler! But summer isn't over yet, and we at Freedom Virginia have been making the most of it. Early in August, we joined Delegate Kelly Convirs-Fowler, the National Domestic Workers' Alliance, Affordable Virginia, and other organizations to put Families First in Virginia Beach! Together, we collectively demanded an end to policies that actively harm children, seniors, and families, such as the cutting of Medicaid, food stamps, school lunches, and more. | | == | Later, we met with Affordable Virginia, Care In Action, the League of Conservation Voters, Delegate Kelly Convirs-Fowler, and special guest, Martin O'Malley, to educate our community about the Republican budget and answer any questions about how these cuts will impact our community. We called on Representative Jen Kiggans-- who voted for the budget and has not held any town halls to listen to her constituents-- to face her community and hear from people whose lives will be negatively impacted by her votes. | == We- along with Affordable Virginia, LCV, National Domestic Workers Alliance, Planned Parenthood and SEIU- gathered with Virginians for a town hall with Representative Bobby Scott. Thank you to our incredible Shalonda Dozier-Calhoun, who shared her inspiring story on Medicaid, caregiving, and her son Seth. | == | And on Labor Day, our Organizing Director Eddie Seay joined others and spoke at a Workers over Billionaires event at Town Point in Norfolk. In Virginia, workers making over $17,000 a year are in the highest-earning tax bracket, meaning that they pay the same tax rate as millionaires and billionaires. It's time for a fair tax system in Virginia! | == | August was a whirlwind, and we're so grateful for all of your support this past month- spreading the word, joining us at events, and communicating Virginia's affordability needs with your legislators. Fall is on its way, and we know with your help that we are closer than ever to an affordable Virginia! | == == == | | | | Freedom Virginia | P.O. Box 10102 | Norfolk, VA 23513 US | | | | | | |

USO Supporter,
It's been 24 years, yet 9/11 still feels like yesterday. After that horrific day, our country stood united -- for freedom, for our nation and for the future that suddenly felt in jeopardy.
**In one of our nation 's darkest moments, American heroes rose and answered the call to serve. **
Today, you can honor their incredible service and sacrifice with a gift that DOUBLES.
**[Right now, thanks to the Townsend family, every dollar of your support will be matched, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $25,000,* to provide care packages, connections to home and other vital support for service members.**](https://links.e.uso.)**
**[$30 CAN HELP PROVIDE~~ 2 ~~ 4 CARE PACKAGES](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/37K6HK_0rpTN/T3dPbzNBdE05UmVWSmRsSkUwNDZRMmVYaE9VVVQ2ckZJOHNaMjZUMHROeE9BdVNybXBqUHVaTFh3V3NydjAyTUhFdnR5emNzZkgwOVEyWk1QK0JuYU4ydDljVnhxMWR1enNxakd1WS9LYnM9S0/TUZtQ3FtcGJhMHdiRXRoNVhBR0w3dkhRREd2NGVYQUJPSStkR1NvVnoxUllhdEN4b3pRd1U2Nzhvb1ZUdVEydE4zUkZGcndiZDJTckFrNTRnbUtLT3F4eFZBUGJyTDU5S0)**

Each care package is filled with essential supplies and meaningful reminders of home. **It 's a small token of appreciation for the selfless service to defend our freedoms.**
**[DOUBLE the value of your gift to lift spirits and bring the comforts of home to our heroes deployed across the world.](https://links.e.uso.)**
Thank you for standing with our heroes in uniform today, tomorrow and always.
For the People Who Serve,
The USO

name: Steny Hoyer
subject: Haley was made for this moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I've been in Congress over 40 years, and I can tell you that THIS is who we need

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=737%2E49239%2E_W6HXj)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5469?t=2&akid=737%2E49239%2E_W6HXj)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5470?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=737%2E49239%2E_W6HXj)
null,

It’s Steny Hoyer – former House Majority Leader. I need your attention for just one minute.
This is urgent: **I am calling on Democrats everywhere to support my friend Haley Stevens in her battleground Senate race in Michigan.**

Haley’s race is one of the most critical I’ve seen in my four decades in public service. **[So please, will you join me in standing with Haley by rushing $5 for her grassroots campaign now?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5471?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=737%2E49239%2E_W6HXj)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5470?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=737%2E49239%2E_W6HXj)
---
I’ve served in Congress for over 40 years and seen political fights of every kind – but the threat we face from today’s Republican Party is unlike anything I’ve ever experienced.
They’re not interested in governing.
They’re not interested in the truth.
They’re interested in power – and in advancing Donald Trump’s chaotic agenda.
They’ve gutted Social Security and Medicare.
They’ve enabled election lies and fueled political violence.
And they’ve handed the reins of their party to the far-right fringe, who are driving our country to oligarchy and authoritarianism.
We cannot allow them to seize more power – especially not in the Senate.**[That is why I’m urging you to support Haley Stevens by chipping in $5 now.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5471?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=737%2E49239%2E_W6HXj)**
Haley is exactly the kind of leader we need in the Senate. I’ve served with her and let me tell you, she is tough, principled, and deeply committed to the people of Michigan.

Haley Stevens is a fighter. I’ve watched her deliver time and time again for working families.
But she’s locked in one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and with Donald Trump officially endorsing her MAGA opponent and GOP megadonors dumping millions into Michigan, the stakes could not be higher. Experts say Senate control will likely come down to her race in Michigan.
**[That’s why I’m asking, null: Will you rush $5 to help elect Haley Stevens in Michigan and flip the Senate blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5471?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=737%2E49239%2E_W6HXj)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5472?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=737%2E49239%2E_W6HXj)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5473?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=9&akid=737%2E49239%2E_W6HXj)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5474?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=737%2E49239%2E_W6HXj)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5470?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=11&akid=737%2E49239%2E_W6HXj)
---
Thank you for joining me in supporting Haley,

Rep. Steny Hoyer
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5475?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=12&akid=737%2E49239%2E_W6HXj) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5469?t=13&akid=737%2E49239%2E_W6HXj)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

| | It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21888/6374453/39b58323c58696bc3aac46506378c69c9cd48261/0c5012b42de2aad09bb8e24145281af96c195919). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21888/6374453/39b58323c58696bc3aac46506378c69c9cd48261/0c5012b42de2aad09bb8e24145281af96c195919).**

_Plus you can complete the entire certification process online._

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21888/6374453/39b58323c58696bc3aac46506378c69c9cd48261/0c5012b42de2aad09bb8e24145281af96c195919)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

subject: Donald Trump’s reckless trade policies are harming families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Because of Trump’s tariffs, taxes on back-to-school items in New Jersey have tripled.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114529812/567319922/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjkzMDEwOS1kMzg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V1sAvkorOFWK9Wa15r0m-zhvTxqFPx_xgmyoWByc4t8=&emci=73d40d43-0888-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=72930109-d388-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=26261389)
---

| | This week, kids are heading back to school. But for many families, what should be a hopeful and exciting moment is instead filled with financial stress. **The cost of school supplies has gone up, and one major reason is Donald Trump's reckless trade policies.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114529813/567319923/-1197072038?refcode=2025-09-03-tariffs&recurring=&amount=11&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=72930109-d388-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjkzMDEwOS1kMzg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V1sAvkorOFWK9Wa15r0m-zhvTxqFPx_xgmyoWByc4t8=) Because of Trump's tariffs, taxes on back-to-school items in New Jersey have tripled. Families are paying more at the checkout line for basics like pencils, backpacks, and calculators, _while billionaires and big corporations get huge tax breaks._ **It's unacceptable.** Parents shouldn't have to choose between buying the supplies their kids need to succeed in school and putting food on the table or paying rent. In the Senate, I'm working to lower costs for New Jersey families — from health care to housing to the everyday items we all rely on. Our government should have families' backs, not make life harder with policies that pad the pockets of the wealthy. As the school year begins, let's stay focused on what matters most: ensuring every child has the chance to learn, grow, and thrive without their families being crushed by unnecessary costs. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

clean_body: Because of Trump’s tariffs, taxes on back-to-school items in New Jersey have tripled. | | | | This week, kids are heading back to school. But for many families, what should be a hopeful and exciting moment is instead filled with financial stress. The cost of school supplies has gone up, and one major reason is Donald Trump's reckless trade policies. = Because of Trump's tariffs, taxes on back-to-school items in New Jersey have tripled. Families are paying more at the checkout line for basics like pencils, backpacks, and calculators, while billionaires and big corporations get huge tax breaks. It's unacceptable. Parents shouldn't have to choose between buying the supplies their kids need to succeed in school and putting food on the table or paying rent. In the Senate, I'm working to lower costs for New Jersey families — from health care to housing to the everyday items we all rely on. Our government should have families' backs, not make life harder with policies that pad the pockets of the wealthy. As the school year begins, let's stay focused on what matters most: ensuring every child has the chance to learn, grow, and thrive without their families being crushed by unnecessary costs. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by .
