[Not sure...](https://substack..iScN_Agif6PgeVgABZ0Ae4q9aNdEleeE_3Z8nd6w9TM?)
* * *
* * *
# Analyst just dropped an absolutely incredible 2026 S&P projection
Wall Street's bullish outlook soared as Evercore ISI's Julian Emanuel predicted the **[S&P 500 could hit 7,750 by 2026,](https://substack.com/redirect/3e224488-7e31-47f2-87b0-1903f026843e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** driven by an AI revolution boosting earnings, despite looming market volatility.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3e224488-7e31-47f2-87b0-1903f026843e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **AI Fuels Market Surge:** Evercore ISI raised its 2025 S&P 500 target to 6,250, citing AI-driven productivity gains across sectors like tech and consumer discretionary.
* **Earnings Growth Expected:** Emanuel forecasts S&P 500 earnings at $264 per share in 2025 and $287 in 2026, reflecting strong Q2 results and AI adoption.
* **Volatility Risks Persist:** Despite optimism, 10%+ corrections are possible, viewed as buying opportunities within a structural bull market led by AI advancements.
* **Bubble Scenario Warned:** An overly accommodative Fed could push the S&P 500 to 9,000 if an AI-driven asset bubble forms, Emanuel cautions.

* * *
* * *
# Warren Buffet is really not happy with what just happened with Kraft-Heinz
Billionaire **[Warren Buffett expressed disappointment](https://substack.com/redirect/82117830-e1ff-4e15-b39f-61f7ba6cd43d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over Kraft Heinz's split into two companies, unraveling his 2015 merger vision, as shares dropped 7% Tuesday, signaling investor unease with the food giant's restructuring.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/82117830-e1ff-4e15-b39f-61f7ba6cd43d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Berkshire Holds Firm Stake** : Berkshire Hathaway, Kraft Heinz's largest shareholder with a 27.5% stake, has not sold shares since the 2015 merger, despite Buffett's admission that the deal wasn't a success.
* **Split Reverses Merger** : The announced split divides Kraft Heinz into one company for sauces and shelf-stable meals and another for North American staples like Oscar Mayer and Lunchables.
* **Buffett Questions Fix** : Buffett told CNBC that dismantling Kraft Heinz won't solve its underlying issues, despite the company's struggles with declining U.S. sales and cost-cutting missteps.
* **Abel Voices Disapproval** : Greg Abel, Buffett's successor at Berkshire Hathaway, conveyed the firm's disappointment to Kraft Heinz, highlighting tensions over the board's decision to proceed.

* * *
* * *
# Fed chair contender steps up his calls for rate cuts in September
Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller, a top contender for Fed chair, urged a **[September interest rate cut](https://substack.com/redirect/c9a486e0-6e32-48c9-91b7-a4e9b3c81c6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in Miami, citing a weakening labor market and controlled inflation, signaling potential monetary policy shifts.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/40da1900-f0e3-4585-8f62-c491ab320e65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Waller 's Bold Dissent**: Waller, alongside Governor Michelle Bowman, dissented in July, advocating for a rate cut to address labor market risks, marking a rare split within the Fed.
* **Labor Market Concerns** : Waller highlighted recent data showing private-sector job shrinkage and anticipates a weaker August jobs report, pushing for preemptive rate cuts.
* **Inflation Optimism Grows** : He noted inflation is nearing the Fed's 2% target, with tariffs having minimal impact, supporting his case for easing monetary policy.
* **Future Rate Path** : Waller expects additional cuts over the next three to six months, aiming to bring rates closer to a neutral 3% level.

* * *
* * *
# The worlds largest sovereign wealth fund just dropped a half a billion dollars in New York real estate
Norway's $2 trillion sovereign wealth fund **[invested $543 million](https://substack.com/redirect/04a905b0-b7b7-4fa8-855e-1f92bdeb5557?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for a 95% stake in a prime Manhattan office building, signaling confidence in New York's real estate market despite global economic uncertainties.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/04a905b0-b7b7-4fa8-855e-1f92bdeb5557?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Joint Venture Formed:** The fund partnered with Beacon Capital Partners, which will manage the property at 1177 Avenue of the Americas, valued at $571.1 million.
* **Extensive U.S. Holdings:** Norway's fund already owns stakes in multiple U.S. properties, including in Boston, San Francisco, and Las Vegas, with a focus on high-value real estate.
* **Global Investment Strategy:** Managed by Norges Bank Investment Management, the fund diversifies globally, with 1.9% of its $2 trillion portfolio allocated to real estate investments.
* **Oil Revenue Driven:** Established in the 1990s, the fund channels Norway's oil and gas revenues into global investments, supporting long-term financial stability for the nation.

---
| My recent announcement that I would be running as a Democrat certainly got a lot of people talking, and I know it may have seemed like a wild idea to some on both the left and the right. Though it makes sense under the RCV election system to have Republicans run as Democrats, even if you don’t like the idea.In all honesty, I'm not actually running for office. This was a thought experiment, and the strong reactions it generated have been incredibly valuable. I was surprised to see and hear how many want me to run for Governor, that is very humbling._**The main point of this exercise was to draw attention to an issue in our political landscape, especially with ranked-choice voting. In 2024, the Alaska GOP conducted a Presidential Preference Poll, which essentially functions as a closed primary for Republicans.**__**The party could use a similar process for all statewide races. This would effectively prevent multiple Republican candidates from competing against each other in the general election, which is a common outcome under our current open primary system.**__**I believe a situation with a crowded field of nine Republican candidates facing only one Democrat isn't the best path forward for our state. It only takes one Republican unwilling to drop out to allow a Democrat to win the Governor’s seat, Dan Sullivan’s U.S. Senate seat, or Nick Begich’s House seat. I'm not sure people truly understand ranked-choice voting, and that is a real issue. Our voters, our elderly, and many others struggle with its complexity. It is obvious if you simply ask people.**_ Thank you for engaging with this idea and for your thoughtful responses.
---
---
|
---

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: A great time for a fresh start
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114545613/567366358/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTM4YTkzNS1lYTg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqN2-0RZxosl55SdJhTwm4Mt7ihelJBwavSmUlrvrhU=)

Peter,

The start of fall has always been one of my favorite times of year. The air turns crisp, the leaves begin to change, and I get to welcome a new group of students into my classroom. There’s something about this season that always feels like a fresh start.

_That’s why I’m so excited to tell you that our campaign is heading into fall stronger than ever._ Thanks to your support, we beat the summer slump and are kicking off September with momentum in our fundraising and energy in our movement. That’s no small feat, and I am so grateful to you for standing with me.

Aside from a new school year and fall festivals, I know this season also brings a critical test for our campaign.

At the end of September, we face our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. Every dollar we raise before then will be reported publicly, for everyone to see, including Mariannette Miller-Meeks and her allies in Washington. These numbers are how they judge the strength of our campaign, and they’ll be looking closely.

I’ll be honest: I want Miller-Meeks to shriek when she sees how strong we are. And I know with your help, we can show her and political elites that we’re building a campaign that cannot be ignored.

**[Will you chip in today to help us get a jump on our September fundraising? Let’s start off this month with a strong showing and prove that our campaign is rising!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114545620/567366365/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250902_EOMTY_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250902_EOMTY_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=fe38a935-ea88-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTM4YTkzNS1lYTg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqN2-0RZxosl55SdJhTwm4Mt7ihelJBwavSmUlrvrhU=)** **[Make a donation ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114545623/567366371/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250902_EOMTY_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250902_EOMTY_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=fe38a935-ea88-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTM4YTkzNS1lYTg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqN2-0RZxosl55SdJhTwm4Mt7ihelJBwavSmUlrvrhU=)**

Thank you,

Christina

name: The Flyover
subject: Something Rare
body:
This is a **special note just for our most loyal readers**

| | |
---
| | |
# WEDNESDAY, SEPTEMBER 3, 2025
---|---
**Dear Flyover Reader** , I don't send many emails like this one. This is a **special note just for our most loyal readers** --those of you who've been with us from close to the beginning. I want to be upfront with you about **why we 're pushing so hard right now** to raise capital for _The Flyover._ The simplest reason is I want to partner with you - readers of _The Flyover_ \- more than others who are legally permitted to invest. So whether you read our national edition, one of our state editions, listen to _The Flyover_ _Podcast_ , or enjoy the _Feel Good Flyover_ \- you are the person I want to partner with most. body:

**There are _22 special elections_** **over the next three months.** With Trump and his state-side allies cutting Medicaid, attacking public education, and raising everyday costs for you and your family, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to protect our rights and combat the right-wing oligarchy taking shape in our country. **_6 states_** **are holding elections that require our immediate attention.** The MAGA movement is pouring _millions of dollars_ into our Republican counterparts' campaigns, and the only way Democrats can keep up with them is if we have the resources to compete. **_$7 from you_****is all we’re asking for to help fund state Democrats in our fight to secure VICTORY in upcoming elections in states like Georgia and Minnesota around the country.** [Can we count on you to chip in $7 to help state Dems defeat extreme Republicans in the states? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDFSMauhu6y669kwgxpsLsO7OFRft4Oh2Gkv90CVqpajWZLCU0IFSxgoSSHhsb4WJtq2Jw_Uavf3DLvimQXx4eMc4FEKTeBp0IpRBLIuBakP30OHUr0lCxJun2aH2KYt7_3M6LfkkYt-XuXghJhgoVfaJCEd6nx3kMEnxkn2mzodfO2YrULJQHWLFtF2rjHNzpf3FiZjZnAnqWPRE_N6O5LcP5X2B6d3CdywTXj4BDSA857JajtS-an5cxtuQGjgFfNqwdBcgwUIoqx6r6SN9y54gUP7tpwsc81sHOlOdW3trWFSJ9q8aG3ldz9qHWruJUwjX1tsEE4HExleHK0wDp6m-EwCWzNWDkZWg-y8ikQfWtaECP0zY5ru68Iz4BNc6mvsqssy4SivmImYjKQLNw-_kY2Iu7j87OdVDrvwQORNoipq6UAlnp_fbW4P5yz1Hwhc8pVvVV4-23MgQ402hQ7_n5C_wWMyO-CxXOsqb96enDEGpB_R82zrvXPHHrh0PTiC7x5QkPQ49eR84bjXes7IM5amfhIVIRwJvheZil36o/4jl/RI1qAY1pS4GyqyDYNiY0bA/h0/h001.ugE3DPHFbilljs_HYau58NUFSGFJMawqU563S0x-pgk) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: With Trump and his state-side allies wreaking havoc, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to protect our rights and combat the right-wing oligarchy taking shape in our country. | | | | | ---|--- There are 22 special elections over the next three months. With Trump and his state-side allies cutting Medicaid, attacking public education, and raising everyday costs for you and your family, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to protect our rights and combat the right-wing oligarchy taking shape in our country. 6 states are holding elections that require our immediate attention. The MAGA movement is pouring millions of dollars into our Republican counterparts' campaigns, and the only way Democrats can keep up with them is if we have the resources to compete. $7 from youis all we’re asking for to help fund state Democrats in our fight to secure VICTORY in upcoming elections in states like Georgia and Minnesota around the country. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Together, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. subject: The South is at stake

body:
Republicans are counting on complacency.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114545818/567366977/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-09-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjYTMyOTBiLWViODgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QAhFNcfQFLMd6l8ihDOas6p_tfNKdt4kva5aUAgCcBo=)
---
| Peter,

Virginia is the epicenter of the fight over abortion rights and progressive policies in the South, and Emerge women are on the frontlines.

Abigail Spanberger is running for Governor to protect access to reproductive care, defend working families, and stand up to Republican attacks on our democracy. Alongside her, **a third of the House of Delegates candidates are Emerge women,** ready to push back and hold power accountable.

Republicans are counting on complacency. They want us to sit back while they take away rights and roll back progress. Emerge women won’t stand down, but they need all of us to help them keep fighting. [_**Can you chip in $25 today to help us train the women who will run, win, and lead in Virginia and across the country?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114545819/567366978/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-09-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjYTMyOTBiLWViODgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QAhFNcfQFLMd6l8ihDOas6p_tfNKdt4kva5aUAgCcBo=)

Alongside her, a third of the House of Delegates candidates are Emerge women, ready to push back and hold power accountable. Republicans are counting on complacency. They want us to sit back while they take away rights and roll back progress. Emerge women won’t stand down, but they need all of us to help them keep fighting. = | = Every gift today ensures that Emerge women continue to defend reproductive rights, fight back against Republican attacks, and lead their communities with courage. body:
We are building the most durable conservative coalition in Nevada! Will you join us? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/53e21db07f27/welcome-to-team-flippo-10339976?e=273c9a71fb)

| | I proudly announce that the **Churchill County Republican Party **has officially endorsed my campaign for Congress in **NV-04.** The Churchill County Republicans are dedicated to advancing conservative values and electing Republican candidates to represent Churchill County and Central Nevada! Chairwoman Leslie Beach said this about our campaign upon their endorsement!
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=021bd1c082&e=273c9a71fb)

| “Choosing David Flippo is both the right and the smart thing to do. He is a combat veteran, a true conservative, a small business owner, and a leader who will stand with President Trump and fight for the America First agenda.

With David Flippo as our nominee, Republicans will be united, our values will be protected, and we will be ready to defeat Steve Horsford and bring strong conservative leadership to Nevada’s 4th District.”

Our message resonates with people across Nevada because they understand that Steve Horsford and the Democrats who represent our state are not fighting for their values in Washington. **I have dedicated my life to service, and now I want to ensure a brighter future for the people of Nevada.** In Washington, I will serve you and deliver **America First policies for our state!** We have a real opportunity to bring real, positive, conservative change to Nevada, but it will take all of us working together. **Will you join our movement to flip NV-04?**

name: Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose Spaulding
subject: Stand with Mizzou Students for Justice in Palestine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.movement4freedom.com/home [https://www.movement4freedom.com/home]
Peter,
Last week, I stood before the press to make one thing clear: Mizzou Students for Justice in Palestine (SJP) will not be silenced, and Movement for Freedom is standing shoulder-to-shoulder with them. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dZhS_gpBHEqbwSpX2e5cyQ2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/dZhS_gpBHEqbwSpX2e5cyQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dZhS_gpBHEqbwSpX2e5cyQ2]
For context, the University of Missouri denied MSJP the right to march in their homecoming parade, citing the “disturbing” behavior of students elsewhere. Meanwhile, political banners like “Make America Great Again” are allowed.
That’s not just hypocrisy. It’s a blatant violation of the First Amendment.
Colleges are supposed to be spaces of exploration, not exploitation. Students must be free to express their full, authentic selves, whether that means practicing their faith, debating freely, or lifting up the suffering of Palestinians. To deny that right to MSJP is to erode decades of progress in creating inclusive and just learning environments.
We demand that President Choi and the administration issue a public apology, guarantee full inclusion for all students, and commit to ending this silencing of voices they find uncomfortable.
We won’t rest until justice is won. ADD YOUR NAME today to demand accountability and protect free expression at Mizzou: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dZhS_gpBHEqbwSpX2e5cyQ2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dZhS_gpBHEqbwSpX2e5cyQ2]
And spread the word! Forward this email and the lawsuit [https://www.cair.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/W.D.-Mo.-25-cv-04184.pdf?fbclid=IwY2xjawMkR2ZleHRuA2FlbQIxMABicmlkETE0UnZNeXVTaUFmMjdZenBHAR5SHNExNlui93aXN8Rtr2vIryqTc5PuWG0qSlzWufjLKESA9Zbz7EoOsWDHYw_aem_S5J1a-D2MtGQfc3ih2Oixw] to your family, friends, and anyone you know who will support the Mizzou Students for Justice in Palestine.
In solidarity,
—Stephany
Lead Spokesperson, Movement for Freedom
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250903_Mizzou_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250903_Mizzou_act] Movement for Freedom is a campaign, founded by former Congresswoman Cori Bush, that calls for radically transforming how we build justice, safety, and liberation through love and solidarity. Every single dollar helps us build, train, and fight for the justice we all deserve.
Want to learn more? Visit our website at Movement4Freedom.com [https://www.movement4freedom.com] .
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250903_Mizzou_act]

name: Brian Lenney
subject: On Legislative Scorecards
body:
Everyone has an agenda

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..tQAkLo2f2hGkGpXFsOpgMbsIZSMWTxpe5Uo9zd09pKE?) for more
---
# [On Legislative Scorecards](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=172705331&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyNzA1MzMxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTY5MjA4NTgsImV4cCI6MTc1OTUxMjg1OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2sLQEELFyudXPfFJ2X1LZ2lm9c1gltXPkivKH77HFso)
### Everyone has an agenda
| | [Brian Lenney - Nampa's Senator](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---
| Sep 3
---
| [](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=172705331&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyNzA1MzMxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NjkyMDg1OCwiZXhwIjoxNzU5NTEyODU4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjExNDgyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.neVFDz4gONgDJjpp09VvVg2eej6prI0qAtxgOTUa9jk&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=172705331&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyNzA1MzMxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTY5MjA4NTgsImV4cCI6MTc1OTUxMjg1OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2sLQEELFyudXPfFJ2X1LZ2lm9c1gltXPkivKH77HFso&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=172705331&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyNzA1MzMxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTY5MjA4NTgsImV4cCI6MTc1OTUxMjg1OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2sLQEELFyudXPfFJ2X1LZ2lm9c1gltXPkivKH77HFso)
---
| | [](https://substack..VO6mWFL9gYeEXMoYYIyIaQsH9GNeZfRX4w07X2LXuw8?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/brianlenney/p/on-legislative-scorecards?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Since being elected I've come to realize that not all scorecards are created equal....
Many are deliberately manipulated to serve narrow agendas.
Take the recently defunct American Action Fund, run by YAL (Young Americans for Liberty). They published a Libertarian-based scorecard that conveniently cherry-picked bills to elevate their preferred legislators while completely ignoring numerous solid conservative measures:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/15a03b2f-4cf1-4df4-8cc8-32676da0c21d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Surprise, surprise, their golden boys (and girls) scored higher than everyone else.
Because here's what these fraudsters WON'T tell you: YAL (the group behind this scorecard) deliberately IGNORED over 30 no-brainer conservative bills.
For example, they memory-holed MY anti-SLAPP bill protecting free speech, SNAP reforms, tax cuts, the landmark Medical Freedom Act, indecent exposure laws, and my bill to limit the power of Idaho's public health districts (among others).
Why the cooked books?
Because including all these votes would have shown that the conservatives they love to attack as "traitors" are actually MORE conservative than they want you to believe.
This isn't a scorecard. It's a hit piece designed to make solid conservatives look weak.
They cherry-picked votes to create an artificial gap between "real" conservatives and the ones they're trying to primary. By excluding bills where we ALL voted conservative, they manufactured a fake narrative about who the "true believers" really are.
This wasn't oversight.
It was (and is) an intentionally deceptive hack job.
The IACI (Idaho Association of Commerce and Industry) scorecard is even worse. Their methodology is absurd:
* **"Vote in line with IACI position" = positive score**
* **"Vote out of line with IACI position" = demerit**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4733a597-88fd-4e53-ac4f-a27ac6d392ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Zero nuance, zero context.
Just pure partisan hackery.
Even AI-generated scorecards fail spectacularly at understanding legislative nuance. Because they often can't distinguish between ~~struck-through text~~ and new language in bill drafts, leading to fundamentally wrong assessments of what many bills actually do.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7b03c3f7-f0b3-42ab-ac19-05a3aca043a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I could go on and on and on...
Point being: _**every scorecard reflects its creator's agenda.**_
Because no single scorecard captures the complete truth as orgs routinely manipulate data, cherry-pick votes, and ignore "inconvenient legislation" to protect their preferred politicians.
Voters deserve better than propaganda disguised as analysis.
Scorecards are tools that can inform, but treating any single scorecard as gospel is shortsighted.

---

[](https://substack.com/redirect/5e61d2f7-b6b3-4509-aa98-7f5f8015cbd4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..O-ApjBEJcXNxayYy2Pnw5bDEwLzP0khG17QFrJnbW3Y?)

By excluding bills where we ALL voted conservative, they manufactured a fake narrative about who the "true believers" really are. This wasn't oversight. It was (and is) an intentionally deceptive hack job. The IACI (Idaho Association of Commerce and Industry) scorecard is even worse. Their methodology is absurd: "Vote in line with IACI position" = positive score "Vote out of line with IACI position" = demerit | | ---|---|--- Zero nuance, zero context. Just pure partisan hackery. Even AI-generated scorecards fail spectacularly at understanding legislative nuance. Because they often can't distinguish between ~~struck-through text~~ and new language in bill drafts, leading to fundamentally wrong assessments of what many bills actually do. | | ---|---|--- I could go on and on and on... Point being: every scorecard reflects its creator's agenda. Because no single scorecard captures the complete truth as orgs routinely manipulate data, cherry-pick votes, and ignore "inconvenient legislation" to protect their preferred politicians. Voters deserve better than propaganda disguised as analysis. Scorecards are tools that can inform, but treating any single scorecard as gospel is shortsighted. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Brian Lenney ? ?

clean_body: | = Peter, I'm Jo Mendoza. I'm a single mother, Marine veteran, and Democrat running to turn AZ-06 blue. EMILYs List said I could reach out because the stakes are so high. I know being asked for money via email isn't super fun. In fact, I hate asking for money. But the truth is, when you're running in a congressional race as competitive as mine, you have no choice but to ask. And I'm proud to be asking you — never the shady special interests or corporations that bankroll my opponent. **= | = $25 will enable me to run digital ads early in the cycle, and help me boost my name recognition across AZ-06. $25 will allow me to hire campaign staff, put boots on the ground in the district, and expand my small (but mighty!) team. And $25 will fund my travel throughout the district, to make sure I hear from voters in every corner of AZ-06. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Endlessly grateful! – Jo Mendoza = = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114546506/567369114/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmNiZDk0ZS1lYzg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6YhbBzSOH7SfVD4DznSWgaKBcwsc2qvvuuS9lePtW4k=&emci=f24ec295-2a88-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=b6cbd94e-ec88-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7731215)

| | Trump has been slapping drastically high tariffs on many countries, and the fallout is hitting home. Trumpflation has arrived, and tariffs are crushing our local businesses. When I recently sat down with business leaders in Bend, they told me how these chaotic tariffs are impacting the local economy — and they're hurting working people. People want their elected officials to deliver on policies that make their lives better. Folks are already struggling to afford rent, feed their families, and pay for health care. **Donald Trump's tariff shenanigans will do nothing to alleviate the stress ordinary Americans are under.** We've been here before. Time and time again, Democrats have had to step in and clean up the economic wreckage left behind by Republican presidents, and this disaster is going to be no different. **Working families need real help, not economic sabotage.** **I won't stand by while Trump gambles with the jobs and lives of working Americans.** Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

name: Gabe Amo
subject: Join me in supporting Mayor Paige Cognetti for Congress
body:
Hi Friend, It is essential Democrats win back the House majority next November — and I’m doing my part. The road to winning the House runs through Pennsylvania, and that’s why I’m so thrilled my friend Scranton Mayor Paige Cognetti just launched her campaign to represent Pennsylvania’s 8th Congressional District in Congress. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114546524/567369163/-1283252511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTAwZjdhNmItZWM4OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SGky8NtJAGXBZAa9p2nLBhsdzgTnf-nmjhisB9_W_2s=&emci=6e38378f-dd88-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=e00f7a6b-ec88-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=12466492)
---
| | Hi Friend,
---
It is essential Democrats win back the House majority next November — and I’m doing my part.
---
The road to winning the House runs through Pennsylvania, and that’s why I’m so thrilled my friend Scranton Mayor Paige Cognetti just launched her campaign to represent Pennsylvania’s 8th Congressional District in Congress.
---
When I served as President Biden’s liaison to mayors across the country, I saw firsthand how capable and committed Paige is to her community and public service. Every time we met, she fought vigorously for federal funding to ensure her community grows good-paying jobs and supports working families.
---
Paige is the fighter we need to win big in 2026 and make Washington work for us. She’s a working mom who understands that our families deserve better. She’s taken on corruption at home. In fact, when she first ran, she was nicknamed “Paige Against the Machine.”
---
[Republicans are already targeting this race, and it will be one of the most competitive in the country. That’s why I’m asking you to split a donation today between Paige’s campaign and my own, so we can ensure she has the resources to win and that Democrats take back the House.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114546525/567369164/1535388314?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTAwZjdhNmItZWM4OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SGky8NtJAGXBZAa9p2nLBhsdzgTnf-nmjhisB9_W_2s=)
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114546526/567369165/1535388314?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTAwZjdhNmItZWM4OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SGky8NtJAGXBZAa9p2nLBhsdzgTnf-nmjhisB9_W_2s=)
---
Paige is running against a sitting congressman who is voting to gut vital programs while giving tax breaks to billionaires. He is trading stocks in the same industries he regulates, after promising to ban congressional stock trading. He’s saying one thing and doing another, while advancing the corruption we need to root out of DC.
---
I’m going to do everything I can to secure a Democratic majority in the House, and helping Paige win is a big part of that effort. I am proud to support her, and I hope you’ll join me.
---
With gratitude, Gabe
---

clean_body: Hi Friend, It is essential Democrats win back the House majority next November — and I’m doing my part. The road to winning the House runs through Pennsylvania, and that’s why I’m so thrilled my friend Scranton Mayor Paige Cognetti just launched her campaign to represent Pennsylvania’s 8th Congressional District in Congress. | | | | | Hi Friend, It is essential Democrats win back the House majority next November — and I’m doing my part. The road to winning the House runs through Pennsylvania, and that’s why I’m so thrilled my friend Scranton Mayor Paige Cognetti just launched her campaign to represent Pennsylvania’s 8th Congressional District in Congress. When I served as President Biden’s liaison to mayors across the country, I saw firsthand how capable and committed Paige is to her community and public service. Every time we met, she fought vigorously for federal funding to ensure her community grows good-paying jobs and supports working families. Paige is the fighter we need to win big in 2026 and make Washington work for us. She’s a working mom who understands that our families deserve better. She’s taken on corruption at home. In fact, when she first ran, she was nicknamed “Paige Against the Machine.” = = Paige is running against a sitting congressman who is voting to gut vital programs while giving tax breaks to billionaires. He is trading stocks in the same industries he regulates, after promising to ban congressional stock trading. He’s saying one thing and doing another, while advancing the corruption we need to root out of DC. I’m going to do everything I can to secure a Democratic majority in the House, and helping Paige win is a big part of that effort. I am proud to support her, and I hope you’ll join me. With gratitude, Gabe | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | Gabe Amo for Congress P.O. Box 40457 Providence, RI 02940 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

My situation is in your hands, Peter. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Peter. Polls show this race is virtually tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**

clean_body: I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea.| | | I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. | | | | My situation is in your hands, Peter. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Peter. Polls show this race is virtually tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Peter, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!" If you can't afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, "please keep me and my team in your prayers and add your endorsement today:" I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward, Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 | |

body:

---
| | **FORMER CIA OFFICIAL WARNS:** **DEADLY STRIKE COMING TO AMERICA'S POWER GRID** _**Can you keep your family safe when the lights go out?**_
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21890/6374453/1193ca0c162d6ae2f5556d3a1182246a09c3cd47/dd104bcac5c1b5aaa154b7bbd65e5b9e206253a5)
---
**Former CIA Director stunned listeners with a stern warning...** An attack on America's infrastructure would _"blackout the national grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse"._ In fact, attacks on just nine of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in coast-to-coast black-outs, plunging millions into darkness for up to 18 months. Terrifying. **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21890/6374453/1193ca0c162d6ae2f5556d3a1182246a09c3cd47/dd104bcac5c1b5aaa154b7bbd65e5b9e206253a5). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **FOX & FRIENDS FEATURES BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21890/6374453/1193ca0c162d6ae2f5556d3a1182246a09c3cd47/dd104bcac5c1b5aaa154b7bbd65e5b9e206253a5)
---
Fox & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out of generators.**_ Then a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. ---
**YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW & IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2500X** The Patriot Power Generator 2500X now has double the capacity, more power, and newly expandable than our previous best-selling model. With this NEW Patriot Power Generator 2500X... You get MORE power... You get FASTER recharging... And it can even power your FRIDGE! It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. **Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas.** You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems. You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2500X with you if you are forced out of your home. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices. Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. **NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY** The [**Patriot Power Generator 2500X**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21890/6374453/1193ca0c162d6ae2f5556d3a1182246a09c3cd47/dd104bcac5c1b5aaa154b7bbd65e5b9e206253a5) is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,500 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. And it's so easy to use a child can use it. Unfold and set up the solar panel in the sunlight. Plug in the solar panel. Now plug in your electronic devices and enjoy free power from the sun! Amazingly, it takes just 90 minutes to fully charge via AC cord. It holds a charge for up to a year. **ORDER TODAY AND GET 15 FREE GIFTS WORTH $1,391.70!**

"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Trump is scared of your power
body:
I will always stand up to any bullies or dictators, no matter how powerful.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7593f1aa-cd94-488e-8993-5d2140092fd8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| | | “Vladimir Putin said something - one of the most interesting things. He said ‘Your election was rigged because you have mail-in voting. It’s impossible to have mail-in voting and have honest elections.’ He said that to me because we talked about 2020. He said ‘You won that election by so much.”

– Donald Trump
Fox News
8.15.25
---
|
---
| | | | | Peter, this is Jocelyn Benson. Say it with me: Russian dictators cannot dictate our democracy. And yet that’s exactly what Donald Trump wants to see happen. Peter, this is not hyperbole. I wish it were. This is real. Trump is parroting a Russian dictator and threatening executive orders to eliminate one of America’s most popular, convenient, and secure ways to cast a ballot. Why? Because he’s scared. He’s scared of voters’ power — your power. He’s afraid of voters who are seeing their grocery bills skyrocket, who can’t afford to buy homes, and who are facing tax increases and cuts to their health care. His destructive and unpopular policies are harming Americans all across Michigan and our country. He doesn’t want to have to face the consequences at the ballot box next year. Trump — and Putin’s — continued efforts to destroy American democracy are unpatriotic, un-American, and go against everything that truly makes our country great. [I won’t stand for it — and neither should you. Pitch in to my campaign and Blue Amp Action today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta98944f6-96b8-4ca5-a591-bd3d7ba31b5b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

I’ve done that for the last decade as Michigan’s Secretary of State — and I’ll do the same as Michigan’s Governor. But I need your help to get there. I need your help to keep fighting. [Pitch in right now to my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us stand up to attacks on Americans’ right to hold the powerful to account — your vote, your ballot, your power.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc33eb12a-1662-4b8a-b986-04e96f957954/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do!

He said ‘Your election was rigged because you have mail-in voting. It’s impossible to have mail-in voting and have honest elections.’ He said that to me because we talked about 2020. He said ‘You won that election by so much.” – Donald Trump Fox News 8.15.25 | | | | | | Peter, this is Jocelyn Benson. Say it with me: Russian dictators cannot dictate our democracy. And yet that’s exactly what Donald Trump wants to see happen. Peter, this is not hyperbole. I wish it were. This is real. Trump is parroting a Russian dictator and threatening executive orders to eliminate one of America’s most popular, convenient, and secure ways to cast a ballot. Why? Because he’s scared. He’s scared of voters’ power — your power. He’s afraid of voters who are seeing their grocery bills skyrocket, who can’t afford to buy homes, and who are facing tax increases and cuts to their health care. His destructive and unpopular policies are harming Americans all across Michigan and our country. He doesn’t want to have to face the consequences at the ballot box next year. Trump — and Putin’s — continued efforts to destroy American democracy are unpatriotic, un-American, and go against everything that truly makes our country great. | | | | | | | | | | | | I will always stand up to any bullies or dictators, no matter how powerful, who try to rob you of your voice, your vote, and your power. I’ve done that for the last decade as Michigan’s Secretary of State — and I’ll do the same as Michigan’s Governor. But I need your help to get there. I need your help to keep fighting. | | | Let’s go. Jocelyn Benson | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@mail.blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | or

name: Team AOC
subject: Point blank, period.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Every single Republican must be challenged.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250903.biLGDd&refcode=em20250903-9668-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9668%2E2526796%2EEp5p6V)
**Point blank, period.** Every single one of them.
Let them know we will not forget what they did.
There are consequences for taking away people's healthcare.
There are consequences to voting against a living wage.
There are consequences for ripping up law-abiding, dutiful, undocumented people from their country.
There are consequences for fighting against LGBT rights, and taking away our right to choose.
[ Together, we are building a movement with Alexandria to hold these Republicans accountable and create a better future for all of us. Please donate any amount that is meaningful to you to help us continue the fight.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250903.biLGDd&refcode=em20250903-9668-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9668%2E2526796%2EEp5p6V)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250903.biLGDd&refcode=em20250903-9668-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9668%2E2526796%2EEp5p6V)**
Whether you can donate today or not, thank you so much for being here.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3df4a320-f837-4b4e-85de-6932fa4b5bc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
# Self-Hating, Santa Monica Goebbels is Pure Evil
Every great nation in decline eventually produces a state sponsored plague--a powerful government official so morally depraved, so pathologically obsessed with control and punishment, that he or she [mistakes cruelty for clarity and repression for reason](https://substack.com/redirect/48814fa0-36a9-40e7-8703-6aff454c759f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
In our own rotting republic, [that odious creature](https://substack.com/redirect/3c628c17-38de-4ad0-871e-62750ad5d49d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and Trump enabler is Stephen Miller.
This week, Miller emerged from whatever MAGA crypt or right-wing, cable-news segment he haunts to attack a federal judge--Judge Sparkle Sooknanan.
The reason? Committing what, in Miller's warped theology, is the ultimate sin: treating immigrant children like actual human beings.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e2e865ba-4a7c-49cc-8bc4-ff9b361a0de4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
At 2:30 in the godforsaken morning-- the Judge stopped the secretive deportation of **nearly 600 children** to Guatemala. [That's right. Children](https://substack.com/redirect/0150fd48-3c32-4119-9c26-c4b00e2b2b31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Not gangsters, not cartel lieutenants, not the villains Miller obsesses over in his dreams of racial purity.
[Children.](https://substack.com/redirect/0150fd48-3c32-4119-9c26-c4b00e2b2b31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
They had been bundled into U.S. government vans like dry cleaning and loaded onto charter flights under cover of night, with [no lawyers, no hearings, and no one to speak for them](https://substack.com/redirect/7dae4835-c857-4a66-b32a-c45953969311?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--until the judge, in a moment of judicial courage, said: "Enough."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/75570872-4487-4878-8d86-a293dbd89672?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.6CKnXniykIpAyBoOnyx8ikztrF88LJiCojZhIQDlNLM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=172687196)
The judge issued an emergency 14-day injunction that forced ICE to keep the kids in U.S. custody.
**Court filings confirm the planes were on the tarmac in Texas** **and the children were already seated, when the order hit**.
Miller reacted to this not like a man engaged in policy debate, but like a cornered rat on a sinking ship. Miller, who is to Trump what Joseph Goebbels was to Hitler, (and Miller bears a striking resemblance to Goebbels) called the ruling ["lawless." ](https://substack.com/redirect/ca950398-2c7b-4318-8cd9-91ca436ddf79?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/027022d3-3935-42b2-8db0-7e2116557802?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
He accused the judge of sabotaging immigration enforcement. He frothed about "radical open borders," a[s if pausing the forced expulsion of terrified children was tantamount to giving everyone in El Salvador a key to the White House cafeteria](https://substack.com/redirect/e1bf773f-925b-492c-9f6b-a40df4c822ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
And again, consider what the judge did. She PAUSED the deportation.
She asked for basic answers: Were these children afforded the rights guaranteed to them by federal law? Were they given hearings? Counsel? Was notification given to their families?
The government could not--[or would not](https://substack.com/redirect/7dae4835-c857-4a66-b32a-c45953969311?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--answer. And so the judge issued a stay. [It was a modest act](https://substack.com/redirect/c15506cb-6d3f-4ed7-b37d-128e939b517e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), entirely consistent with legal precedent and common decency.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9081e10a-1717-422f-b8f9-ca5898dc044b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**In Miller 's retelling, it was an insurrection against the Republic.**
One suspects that if Miller had been advising Pharaoh during the plagues, he'd have [blamed the frogs on the Hebrews and proposed deporting the firstborns by chariot at midnight](https://substack.com/redirect/d7fefe8e-a020-41f4-999f-677be5fc6333?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Miller's taste for theatrical cruelty is not accidental.
It is his raison d'etre.
The Trump Deputy White House Chief of Staff seems to wake up each morning hoping to find some new category of person to make miserable, some new group to blame for his own emotional impotence and white nationalist rage.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.6CKnXniykIpAyBoOnyx8ikztrF88LJiCojZhIQDlNLM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=172687196)
Let's be clear**.**[Like some of the worst ghouls we've covered in Trumpworld](https://substack.com/redirect/8b731868-7f26-45e2-af92-00877ef805aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, Stephen Miller lies for sport.**
He lies about what judges say. He lies about what laws require.
He lies about Supreme Court decisions he clearly hasn't read, and he lies about inflation in tones that suggest he once skimmed an Ayn Rand novel and mistook it for an economics degree.
In Miller's world, everything from the price of eggs to the fall of Rome is somehow the fault of [a child crossing the Rio Grande barefoot with a plastic bag and a hope for a better life](https://substack.com/redirect/48814fa0-36a9-40e7-8703-6aff454c759f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Miller's spasm at Judge Sooknanan is not the outrage of a patriot defending the law. I[t is the tantrum of a bureaucratic sadist](https://substack.com/redirect/ca950398-2c7b-4318-8cd9-91ca436ddf79?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) denied his midnight spectacle.
Miller was probably already picturing the headlines: "Children Deported Before Dawn" with a nice picture of children suffering to really put the goose in his step that day.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6ec8911a-84b2-41a5-a86b-b3af0f7fcf84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It would have been a [masterstroke of Trumpian cruelty](https://substack.com/redirect/b1c60d40-86b3-4b03-a79d-5dc3f7100951?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Except that a woman in a black robe had the gall to ask: "Is this even legal?"
That question, to Miller, is the true obscenity. He seems to consider legality a nuisance to be negotiated--a polite fiction to be overcome with volume, jargon, and bile.
This latest episode is not an aberration but the purest expression of the Miller doctrine: weaponize bureaucracy, obscure accountability, and treat empathy as a national security threat.
His politics are [devoid of soul and beyond extreme](https://substack.com/redirect/3c628c17-38de-4ad0-871e-62750ad5d49d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). If Kafka had invented a villain to run immigration policy, even he might have dialed Miller back a bit.
How did Miller, lacking any charm and possessed with the heart of a Gestapo officer, gain such a foothold in U.S public life? The answer is as American as a border fence: Miller speaks to the most craven instincts of Trump's MAGA movement.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7658b044-cbe6-4435-b7f2-c703d21603d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's a cult still addicted to punishment, still nursing the fantasy that America's greatness depends on the exclusion of non-whites. Exclude Latinos today, African Americans tomorrow, Asian Americans next week, and lord knows who else after that.
Don't be fooled.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.6CKnXniykIpAyBoOnyx8ikztrF88LJiCojZhIQDlNLM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=172687196)
Miller is not offering policy. He is [offering vengeance and hatred in a tailored suit](https://substack.com/redirect/b1c60d40-86b3-4b03-a79d-5dc3f7100951?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with a West wing credential around his neck and his lips firmly and frequently attached to [Donald Trump's ass.](https://substack.com/redirect/9bacfab5-be4c-4a1b-863c-671513c4964b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c5ba6f56-71f7-4fda-b23e-b16c02050c47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In attacking Judge Sooknanan, Miller is trying to discredit the last remnants of judicial independence, [one of the only bulwarks that stands between children](https://substack.com/redirect/c15506cb-6d3f-4ed7-b37d-128e939b517e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and the machinery of state-sponsored disappearance.
Miller wants obedience, not justice. Miller wants silence, not oversight. And if it takes libeling a judge, rewriting case law, and lying on the spot, so be it.
There is an old saying that every nation gets the monsters it deserves. But surely, w[ith Trump and his sick collection of sycophants](https://substack.com/redirect/b1c60d40-86b3-4b03-a79d-5dc3f7100951?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), we've overpaid any debt we incurred by now.
Surely [it is time to stop pretending this sneering sniveling MAGA crowd is part of any serious conversation about governance](https://substack.com/redirect/09787b69-4af8-4b7b-a1fe-9e0cff264627?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Stephen Miller's record is hatred. His currency is fear.
And his legacy, if there is any justice, will be lifelong shame (and a prison cell, if we're especially lucky).
Denying justice to children? Good grief.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/457b5185-27c0-4ef6-92d7-c3bf0e85eaa0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

Get One NOW! | | ---|---|--- Self-Hating, Santa Monica Goebbels is Pure Evil Every great nation in decline eventually produces a state sponsored plague--a powerful government official so morally depraved, so pathologically obsessed with control and punishment, that he or she . In our own rotting republic, and Trump enabler is Stephen Miller. This week, Miller emerged from whatever MAGA crypt or right-wing, cable-news segment he haunts to attack a federal judge--Judge Sparkle Sooknanan. The reason? Committing what, in Miller's warped theology, is the ultimate sin: treating immigrant children like actual human beings. | | ---|---|--- At 2:30 in the godforsaken morning-- the Judge stopped the secretive deportation of nearly 600 children to Guatemala. . Not gangsters, not cartel lieutenants, not the villains Miller obsesses over in his dreams of racial purity. They had been bundled into U.S. government vans like dry cleaning and loaded onto charter flights under cover of night, with the judge, in a moment of judicial courage, said: "Enough." | | ---|---|--- The judge issued an emergency 14-day injunction that forced ICE to keep the kids in U.S. custody. Court filings confirm the planes were on the tarmac in Texas and the children were already seated, when the order hit. Miller reacted to this not like a man engaged in policy debate, but like a cornered rat on a sinking ship. Miller, who is to Trump what Joseph Goebbels was to Hitler, (and Miller bears a striking resemblance to Goebbels) called the ruling | | ---|---|--- He accused the judge of sabotaging immigration enforcement. He frothed about "radical open borders," a. And again, consider what the judge did. She PAUSED the deportation. She asked for basic answers: Were these children afforded the rights guaranteed to them by federal law? Were they given hearings? Counsel? Was notification given to their families? The government could not--. And so the judge issued a stay. , entirely consistent with legal precedent and common decency. | | ---|---|--- In Miller 's retelling, it was an insurrection against the Republic. One suspects that if Miller had been advising Pharaoh during the plagues, he'd have . Miller's taste for theatrical cruelty is not accidental. It is his raison d'etre. The Trump Deputy White House Chief of Staff seems to wake up each morning hoping to find some new category of person to make miserable, some new group to blame for his own emotional impotence and white nationalist rage. Let's be clear., Stephen Miller lies for sport. He lies about what judges say. He lies about what laws require. He lies about Supreme Court decisions he clearly hasn't read, and he lies about inflation in tones that suggest he once skimmed an Ayn Rand novel and mistook it for an economics degree. In Miller's world, everything from the price of eggs to the fall of Rome is somehow the fault of . Miller's spasm at Judge Sooknanan is not the outrage of a patriot defending the law. I denied his midnight spectacle. Miller was probably already picturing the headlines: "Children Deported Before Dawn" with a nice picture of children suffering to really put the goose in his step that day. | | ---|---|--- It would have been a . Except that a woman in a black robe had the gall to ask: "Is this even legal?" That question, to Miller, is the true obscenity. He seems to consider legality a nuisance to be negotiated--a polite fiction to be overcome with volume, jargon, and bile. This latest episode is not an aberration but the purest expression of the Miller doctrine: weaponize bureaucracy, obscure accountability, and treat empathy as a national security threat. His politics are . If Kafka had invented a villain to run immigration policy, even he might have dialed Miller back a bit. How did Miller, lacking any charm and possessed with the heart of a Gestapo officer, gain such a foothold in U.S public life? The answer is as American as a border fence: Miller speaks to the most craven instincts of Trump's MAGA movement. | | ---|---|--- It's a cult still addicted to punishment, still nursing the fantasy that America's greatness depends on the exclusion of non-whites. Exclude Latinos today, African Americans tomorrow, Asian Americans next week, and lord knows who else after that. Don't be fooled. Miller is not offering policy. He is with a West wing credential around his neck and his lips firmly and frequently attached to | | ---|---|--- In attacking Judge Sooknanan, Miller is trying to discredit the last remnants of judicial independence, and the machinery of state-sponsored disappearance. Miller wants obedience, not justice. Miller wants silence, not oversight. And if it takes libeling a judge, rewriting case law, and lying on the spot, so be it. There is an old saying that every nation gets the monsters it deserves. But surely, w, we've overpaid any debt we incurred by now. Surely . Stephen Miller's record is hatred. His currency is fear. And his legacy, if there is any justice, will be lifelong shame (and a prison cell, if we're especially lucky). Denying justice to children? name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: The economy slows… but stocks soar
body:
| Hi Peter, What if I told you the economy is slowing... yet investors are cheering? Sounds backward, right? But it is happening in plain sight. Look around. Fewer "Help Wanted" signs. Quiet shifts at your favorite restaurant. Friends delaying big purchases. You're not imagining it. The data says the slowdown is real:
* **73,000 jobs** added in July (well below expectations)1
* **258,000 jobs** erased from prior months after revisions1
* **4.2% unemployment** , the highest in two years1
* **1.97 million** continuing jobless claims, the most since late 20212
* Weak factory data pointing to manufacturing cutbacks3

And yet, the S&P; 500 keeps breaking records. It's already up more than **8% year-to-date**. So what is going on? Let's break it down into **three big reasons** that are possibly driving the market right now.

**1) Lower rates are on the table** Thanks to the recent swath of weak numbers, investors are speculating that the Federal Reserve could start slashing interest rates later this year.4 Think of the Fed as the country's financial thermostat. If the economy is cooling too much, it turns up the heat. Lower rates make it cheaper for companies to borrow and invest. They also make bonds less appealing, which pushes more money toward stocks. Imagine a seesaw. On one side: stocks. On the other: bonds. Lower rates tip the balance toward stocks. That is why bad economic news can sometimes push markets higher. Investors are betting the Fed will step in.

**2) A few giants carry the market** The "Magnificent 7" — Apple, Microsoft, Amazon, Alphabet, Nvidia, Meta, and Tesla — have powered much of this year's rally. In the second quarter, analysts project these companies will see their earnings jump **14.1%** year-over-year. The other 493 stocks in the S&P; 500, by comparison, expect to report earnings growth of **3.4%**.5 Because the Magnificent 7 make up such a large share of the index, their wins can lift the market even if many companies are struggling. This concentration means a diversified portfolio might not mirror headline market moves, and that's actually a good thing. It shows you're not betting everything on a handful of tech giants.

**3) Money is still flowing in** Years of stimulus and government spending have left plenty of cash in the system. That money has to go somewhere. Investor sentiment matters, too. Over the past decade, many have been conditioned to buy the dip because markets have often bounced back quickly. Combine that with the ease of app-based trading, and rallies can feed on themselves. Think of it like a campfire. The wood is already stacked. It only takes a small spark for the flames to rise.

**The bottom line** These three forces, rate cut expectations, a handful of dominant companies, and strong investor sentiment, can push markets higher even when the economy might be slowing. All of them are tied to expectations and human behavior, not just today's numbers. That is why chasing headlines is risky. **It is also why emotional decisions can derail a well-built plan.** My role is to help you interpret the headlines, not react to them. To show how market moves reflect both economics and psychology. And to help you make choices that align with your long-term goals and values. Markets will always swing. Your plan should help keep you steady. If you are wondering how this environment fits with your strategy, let's talk. We can review your allocation and make sure it is built for your future, not the market's current mood. Reply to this email or book a quick call. I am here to help.
---
Sincerely,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6IjRRMU50eERwbWNPejAzYiIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)

3. ISM, 2025 [URL: [https://www.ismworld.org/supply-management-news-and-reports/reports/ism-report-on-business/pmi/july/](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cuaXNtd29ybGQub3JnXC9zdXBwbHktbWFuYWdlbWVudC1uZXdzLWFuZC1yZXBvcnRzXC9yZXBvcnRzXC9pc20tcmVwb3J0LW9uLWJ1c2luZXNzXC9wbWlcL2p1bHlcLyIsImhhc2giOiI0UTFOdHhEcG1jT3owM2IiLCJjb250YWN0X2VtYWlsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20ifQ)]

Reuters, 2025 [URL: [https://www.reuters.com/business/jpmorgan-brings-forward-fed-rate-cut-forecast-september-2025-08-08/](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cucmV1dGVycy5jb21cL2J1c2luZXNzXC9qcG1vcmdhbi1icmluZ3MtZm9yd2FyZC1mZWQtcmF0ZS1jdXQtZm9yZWNhc3Qtc2VwdGVtYmVyLTIwMjUtMDgtMDhcLyIsImhhc2giOiI0UTFOdHhEcG1jT3owM2IiLCJjb250YWN0X2VtYWlsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20ifQ)]

It shows you're not betting everything on a handful of tech giants. 3) Money is still flowing in Years of stimulus and government spending have left plenty of cash in the system. That money has to go somewhere. Investor sentiment matters, too. Over the past decade, many have been conditioned to buy the dip because markets have often bounced back quickly. Combine that with the ease of app-based trading, and rallies can feed on themselves. Think of it like a campfire. The wood is already stacked. It only takes a small spark for the flames to rise. The bottom line These three forces, rate cut expectations, a handful of dominant companies, and strong investor sentiment, can push markets higher even when the economy might be slowing. All of them are tied to expectations and human behavior, not just today's numbers. That is why chasing headlines is risky. It is also why emotional decisions can derail a well-built plan. My role is to help you interpret the headlines, not react to them. To show how market moves reflect both economics and psychology. And to help you make choices that align with your long-term goals and values. Markets will always swing. Your plan should help keep you steady. If you are wondering how this environment fits with your strategy, let's talk. We can review your allocation and make sure it is built for your future, not the market's current mood. Reply to this email or book a quick call. I am here to help. Sincerely, Reid Rasner - CEO Omnivest Financial (307) 337-1223 Sources: 1. BLS, 2025 ] 2. Department of Labor, 2025 ] 3. ISM, 2025 ] 4. Reuters, 2025 ] 5. FactSet Insights, 2025 ] Risk Disclosure: Investing involves risk including the potential loss of principal. I'm running for Congress because our neighbors deserve a representative who will fight for working families, not his own bank account. As Mayor of Scranton for the past six years and through my work across government, I've dedicated my career to helping people in Northeastern Pennsylvania build better lives and trust their government again.
But right now, we have a representative who is voting to gut vital programs while giving tax breaks to billionaires. Even worse? He’s trading stocks in the same industries he regulates, after running for Congress promising to ban congressional stock trading. **He’s saying one thing and doing another.**
In my first run for Mayor I ran as an Independent against corrupt local Democrats — they called it “Paige Against The Machine.” We shocked the political establishment and won, and I took on powerful people to clean up City Hall and build a government that works for everyone.
The people of Pennsylvania's 8th District deserve a representative with the fight to actually help people — not someone trading stocks for personal profit while voting against the interests of the people.
[**We can win this race and send a new kind of leader to Congress — one who has a track record of independence and isn’t afraid to disrupt the old system. Will you become a Founding Donor to our campaign by splitting a $10 donation between me and Lt. Gov. Austin Davis now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114547603/567373452/76564554?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_090325_COGNETTI_30DO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2MwYTJkMC1lZjg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=52QoHJx1_MJN6pEBmfIF8h0K7aiaKktFWW2BvoGy0eE=)

name: The Store @ Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Get your sticker before they’re gone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

You’re an important part of Jon’s reelection, so we thought you might like to see our FIRST official sticker of the campaign!
**[**Make a donation — of ANY amount — today and as a thank you we’ll send you this official Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate sticker. Show your support for Jon while making sure our team has the resources we need to win.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-stickers.bKZFMm&refcode=em250903-1-subs&t=7&akid=715%2E5691347%2E3o1QLz)
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-stickers.bKZFMm&refcode=em250903-1-subs&t=8&akid=715%2E5691347%2E3o1QLz)
**[CLAIM MY STICKER](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-stickers.bKZFMm&refcode=em250903-1-subs&t=9&akid=715%2E5691347%2E3o1QLz)**
By claiming your sticker, you’re not only sending a powerful message of support for Jon and our fight against MAGA extremism — you’re helping put our campaign in the best possible position to win.
**Get yours before they’re gone:**
**[**Make a donation today and we’ll send you an official Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate sticker. Don’t miss this offer — it won’t be around for long.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-stickers.bKZFMm&refcode=em250903-1-subs&t=10&akid=715%2E5691347%2E3o1QLz)
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-stickers.bKZFMm&refcode=em250903-1-subs&t=11&akid=715%2E5691347%2E3o1QLz)
**[CLAIM MY STICKER](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-stickers.bKZFMm&refcode=em250903-1-subs&t=12&akid=715%2E5691347%2E3o1QLz)**
Thanks for chipping in, Peter. It really means a lot to Jon and to all of us to know we can count on your support as we plan for the tough fight ahead.
Gratefully,
Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=13&akid=715%2E5691347%2E3o1QLz) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=715%2E5691347%2E3o1QLz) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

body:
