[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6fb17623b9254cb881040bca4cbb910c&_e=aa23nNX3uyCR-mpoby35CrRffCmjBK2a4-KMvNATNfKzOC9BcyXQku0DPZ1JfKlhVDAXRBebsu6iCfsHkiy-zWTZX74ByOCn9YuxB49RffaPZ5P9SIqKP1WGaPkAriVPx1FilZAxrIvF7FtT6-OJC0jOs4dcWhTXXATA9IvAbSh1zG-vo-XndHTsZ9822Jwt1ym_wdXEhJUf8cSvU5D1GHYMKg9OeE5tUulW3Fio3IqxyZbNlE_KsSMhWq2bnYgRPxOxSgT1T7I8ckkwUWI_pD85Mzhc8b2Q92hBCAeHl4ol1-PXqb1IFajQd1szizm82dIJ-R0YgnGYcZ81E0efl2E3iIu_3yWlj09HWNDQoQrnxEqEfjmVw1jTdpI-MM8pu08Ieazzgnk4MB51eSlIIlUW2oVmWhkwGqkvRRFSFNfZtCc6aGSE12XYfeaIvS1jpqVw8_K7JlbngTMTph06UmuZKP8GT4SEats3ZwXcA1j275jPrbIrDv2OnD5FOpRXEWiXKh-eHT-ncGagr7jgmZPykkZ6TUO48W3Rn9_AX2b9X7eZixC6V9m1mupHAJseLRGnb4mNFf964RqZ9qB2rYoN9IXP8ryngeIJzV3BtRo%3D)

Friend,

First responders go by a lot of names...

... firefighter.
... paramedic.
... police officer.
... disaster response technician.
... border patrol agent.

**But you and I know them by the one name they won 't call themselves: hero.**

First responders are the hometown heroes who keep us safe. They go to work every day, even though that means confronting the worst situations imaginable. It's what makes these men and women heroes. They know what they signed up for and do it anyway.

However, their service and sacrifice are almost always overlooked by the Radical Left.

It's time to restore trust and honor to our first responders.

That's why I wrote my latest book, _Behind the Badge_ , dedicated to telling their story.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6fb17623b9254cb881040bca4cbb910c&_e=aa23nNX3uyCR-mpoby35CrRffCmjBK2a4-KMvNATNfKzOC9BcyXQku0DPZ1JfKlhVDAXRBebsu6iCfsHkiy-zWTZX74ByOCn9YuxB49RffaPZ5P9SIqKP1WGaPkAriVPx1FilZAxrIvF7FtT6-OJC5TM74w_N8VZNYooXed5rXQlTCRNBk8WUQp2jKU5nFbzof2LHkzJKkfxgRViQEUsD4LVpyyb00KcskDwWaQWFCjr4bRozOKOJOs92fy6xBugXpIEdLZF3i_87toS5ZpnXHuse8d9ZchpIoK-g2ymYQe5sl_NWfi9utdxhHBBHnmbr_q4B8JZniWnNDHEcM07T1AsSzA8yxf1wDwlNvGL4uQ1cV7dChdHILjV8Mql4jN7aY6RFGx7j0yGod54--una-7c0S54yM0odp11Zy3j1UnprLyupV84ZgAerkO9I6INV5F8UgDvE9-pKjKD0N82_DMBtVrVEZZ3gzWQEP9kvso1AAEcK7vEsBDyVmMpvDhu90brnXgqMyJdjXwisKbRoELLazaAn3rUnSsLJNRW9NDVQqXP6Aaf0fVm9roNBqX7Mz_80gwFVOmDOM0hh0JvsVSzd6Yz7gOtW4jOwb7ikSc%3D)

I am also teaming up with the Kash Foundation to support our first responders and veterans.

While activists take cheap shots at our first responders, the Kash Foundation is restoring faith in their service, defending their dignity, and standing up for them when attacked by the media and activists.

But you and I know them by the one name they won 't call themselves: hero. First responders are the hometown heroes who keep us safe. They go to work every day, even though that means confronting the worst situations imaginable. It's what makes these men and women heroes. They know what they signed up for and do it anyway. However, their service and sacrifice are almost always overlooked by the Radical Left. It's time to restore trust and honor to our first responders. Friend,
**WE’RE GOING INTO CHICAGO.**
I’m not saying when, but we’re going in!
When 20 people are killed over two and a half weeks and 75 people are shot, I HAVE NO CHOICE.
I turned our Great Capital into a SAFE ZONE. There’s virtually no crime. **NOW I WANT TO LIBERATE CHICAGO!**
The Radical Left Governors and Mayors of crime ridden cities don’t want to stop the radical crime. I wish they’d just give me a call. I’d gain respect for them.

name: Dr. Abdul El-Sayed
subject: RFK Jr. is lighting the HHS on fire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250903-853&t=1001&akid=854%2E251025%2EJHe3CJ ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250903-853&t=1002&akid=854%2E251025%2EJHe3CJ ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

Robert F. Kennedy Jr. built his career spreading anti-vaccine conspiracies
and anti-science rhetoric.

He is wholly unqualified to lead anything in public health, yet Donald
Trump handed him the keys to the Department of Health and Human Services
(HHS).

Now, public health leaders, Sen. Bernie Sanders, and other concerned
Americans are calling for RFK Jr. to resign — myself included.

When MSNBC asked me about it, here’s what I said:

RFK Jr. is like the guy you never wanted to have to partner with in
science class. He thought he knew the answers, and now he’s lighting all
of HHS on fire — dismantling the Centers for Disease Control and
Prevention (CDC), threatening to pull vaccines off the shelf, and gutting
funding for medical research.

Peter, I’ve
walked the halls of the CDC and seen the incredible public servants who
quietly protect us every single day.

I’ve also rebuilt Detroit’s health department from bankruptcy and wrote
the book on Medicare for All. I know what it takes to keep people safe.

What’s happening now puts us all at risk.

If elected, I would be the only physician-epidemiologist in the Senate —
and the only senator with local public health experience. And when I get
to the Senate, I’m hauling RFK Jr. up to Capitol Hill to make him explain
why he’s putting his political ambition over our health.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250903-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250903-853&refcode2=854_251025_JHe3CJ&akid=854%2E251025%2EJHe3CJ ]Please, pitch in $10 to help bring this fight to the U.S.
Senate.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250903-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250903-853&refcode2=854_251025_JHe3CJ&akid=854%2E251025%2EJHe3CJ ]Donate $10 ››

With gratitude,

Abdul

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Authoritarian takeover: Trump escalates, Chicago at risk
body:
Trump has already deployed troops in 19 states — and now he’s threatening to send the military into Chicago and New York. He is openly testing whether he can use the U.S. military as his personal police force.
If we don’t stop him right now, this authoritarian experiment will become permanent. Chip in $15, $25, or whatever you can to help defend our cities and protect our democracy before it’s too late. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stoptrump?refcode=090325_2]
BREAKING: Trump’s authoritarian crackdown just escalated — and Chicago is next.
We need you in this fight right now.
Chip in $15, $25, or whatever you can to help us support resistance in every targeted city. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stoptrump?refcode=090325_2]
In the past week, Trump has:
* Mobilized 1,700 National Guard troops across 19 states — bypassing governors to seize control.
* Threatened Chicago directly , calling it “our next” target after D.C
* Named New York as another city on his list.
This isn’t about safety. Crime in Chicago is down. This is about control. It’s about testing whether he can use the military as his personal police force to intimidate Democratic-led cities into submission.
If we don’t respond with overwhelming grassroots pressure, he will escalate further. And once he normalizes this, no city will be safe.
We are raising funds so we can help defend Chicago, New York, and every city in Trump’s crosshairs — but we cannot do it without you. Chip in now — $15, $25, or whatever you can — to help stop Trump’s authoritarian takeover before it spreads even further. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stoptrump?refcode=090325_2]

name: George Whitesides
subject: Thank you + returning to Washington
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q3-2025?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q3-2025?refcode=em-header]
Hi Peter,

I hope you had a restful holiday weekend.

Thanks to your support in August, we met our digital fundraising goal. It’s a pivotal milestone on our path to re-election and reclaiming the House majority. Every contribution is a vote of confidence -- not just in me, but in the values we’re fighting for.

As I return to Congress this week, we can’t ignore what’s happening across the country. We’ve seen federal agents and even National Guard troops sent into cities like Los Angeles and Washington, D.C. At a time when crime is at historic lows, this feels less about protecting the public and more about consolidating power.

This isn’t leadership -- it’s intimidation, and it’s not what our democracy should look like.

I’m back in Washington with a reaffirmed purpose: I’m introducing legislation to protect the leaders of our key statistical agencies from politically-motivated firings. We need professionals in these roles, not pawns of power plays. I’ll keep pushing back -- against all of Trump’s authoritarian impulses in the White House.

Your support helps make this possible. It gives me the freedom to focus on holding power accountable while preparing for our upcoming re-election fight in CA-27. Thank you for standing with me in this fight.

With deep gratitude,

George
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q3-2025?refcode=em-9.3.25-all-a]
https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides? [https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides?]George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. Chip in to George's campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q3-2025?refcode=em-footer]
To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: GeorgeWhitesides.com [https://www.georgewhitesides.com/?]

All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

We need leaders who are honest with us. Spanberger doesn't fight for Virginians, she fights for herself. You have my word that as Governor, I will _ALWAYS_ be honest with you, just as I have been as Lieutenant Governor.

name: Local Democracy Project
subject: We’re defending local democracy, one race at a time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
clean_body: | | | ** Under Derek Marshall’s leadership, the Local Democracy Project defends democracy where it begins - in our communities. We recruit, train, and equip quality candidates like Ryan Schavrien with the tools to win critical races at every level of government. In Redlands, CA, that means helping Ryan unseat incumbent Candy Olson, whose deplorable conduct, including “liking” horrifying posts with Nazi imagery, has drawn national scrutiny. She is undermining the dignity, safety, and inclusivity our schools deserve. In stark contrast, longtime Loma Linda resident, family man, and nonprofit financial analyst, Ryan brings proven expertise in budgeting and accountability. Through Building A Generation, he champions educational and mental health supports that put students first. Support from the Local Democracy Project goes far beyond a mere endorsement. Derek and the team are actively mentoring Ryan in strategic messaging, coalition-building, and grassroots infrastructure. We provide him with vital campaign and fundraising guidance, empowering him to not only win but lead with integrity. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Together we can restore democracy on the front lines. -LDP supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. Contributions or gifts to Local Democracy Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Local Democracy Project, please .

name: Chris Pappas
subject: This truly couldn’t get any worse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
This is urgent.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2176%2E582294%2EkxZZ78)
Chris Pappas here.
**National Republicans are recruiting John E. Sununu for U.S. Senate here in NH — and I need you to know what that means.**
Sununu represented New Hampshire in Congress nearly _twenty years ago._ And throughout his time in DC, he put special interests ahead of Granite Staters every chance he got.
**_His record speaks for itself_ — he voted against lowering drug prices, repeatedly voted to restrict abortion access, and led efforts to privatize Social Security.**
And what has he done since leaving office? Joined a lobbying firm that represented corporate special interests. Now he’s national Republicans’ handpicked candidate for this race. With name recognition like his, this is an all-hands-on-deck moment.
[**Please rush $5 today to stop national Republicans from buying this Senate seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250903_1_sununu?refcode=em20250903-2176&amount=5&refcode2=2176_582294_kxZZ78&akid=2176%2E582294%2EkxZZ78)

With gratitude,
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250903-1?t=2&refcode2=2176_582294_kxZZ78&akid=2176%2E582294%2EkxZZ78)**

name: Team Downing
subject: We're waiting on you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
The Left won’t like your answer...

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Trump Poised to Remove Noncitizens from Census🚨**BREAKING NEWS:** President Trump is again leading the charge to protect the integrity of our democracy – **this time by ensuring that only U.S. citizens are counted in the official U.S. Census.**
Peter, for far too long, blue states have inflated their political power by counting illegal immigrants in their census totals, gaining extra congressional seats and electoral votes as a result.
_That ends now._
This bold move strikes at the heart of the Democrats’ scheme to manipulate our system and tip the scales in their favor.
This is about restoring fairness, upholding the rule of law, and ensuring that American citizens, **not illegal aliens** , determine our political future.
But make no mistake: the Left is desperate to block this effort, because without inflated census numbers, they’ll lose their power. That’s why we need every Patriot to step up now. **
****[Sign our Official Petition to Remove Illegal Aliens from the U.S. Census:](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-890G4XUVfgitbkc-psw)**[ SIGN THE PETITION
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Don’t let them rig the system any longer. Demand a fair, lawful count now.**_Stand with President Trump and defend the integrity of our elections and the U.S. Census._**
Thank you, Peter,
Conservative News Alerts (via Team Downing)| |

According to reports from the Daily Beast, felon Trump and his Health and Human Services (HHS) Secretary RFK Jr. plan to ban the Covid-19 vaccine “within months.” COVID-19 has killed approximately [20 million](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRism-Y5IKI0Xz3DlQElEi6GJaI7wH7zO4Cmk_KnDziGgIOBEUXKwY4wbjn0-PQN5kJM-cXUoKCbgzd7WPx3qJ_ot4300nKylVxdxNsCRG7_VBDj6SdrWwyub8Z4AqvCpBS7-lycmsPRH2f90V41o00MLV2KLUP8yVs089eRWIKlQwq9MLGKlzgKZMrzcb-uzRweFGozxPTwg-3iUwrKjhkKa4AY6NL_tX8sY181W0bnGEO1GcpQBf0mt--a_pbr0lRw1qINWbyugZBfMZvM290wNJsf4af8beHt-qjNhMEZSH7JQtit-DXlDQUlQFoHutLCgE-V7ktJGxaenC-nnoFuNhtVdO8kIoqXo0SlWqeL-5e_3ZGqKHG0q-p6-EViN6-0J74pO9QCEi5wW5E6sBD1CHV8g-i3up1dTCe5oIyyBt/4jl/3ZDRThmTQaOc5yideK5QDQ/h2/h001.Mp93P1e-1CNS44IBYllNAP-QxDhh1dQqVQoWHW2VfsU) people. [Four hundred million ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMdUS12fSrk6MMZIR1Ut2K6ckCJvadi6kvhUNYpRFxyZ855ke0JWvksHSGr16UlXD1OviVljnD9lBmEZe-FxEtf00lK9fcp-Tce3gj46hYin3EHvAyZjfI4Al8iZgB1Wz5Nm3yZw72T8r9FUvCC-15co3i0xYwriCiY8mpCYELQY75hb8S8q1N0ra5sbyJwMTILKjEyTSbVuFd0HieRMJbup3HQ1FCxBMh6qDm77f8LOCyrxj756yztjL6ybWnvssLhgHgv4Jo5d4dJSLdomSZ1md-Ivn3PYeUYs5pvByBF_-TTTpteoZx-TAdb_DNQD0Kg/4jl/3ZDRThmTQaOc5yideK5QDQ/h3/h001.biog2HKEfcaGjPGcHJ_stgGDgG9kv_rq_PGakqn2hSQ)people suffer from long Covid. name: Team Pou
subject: 1️⃣ year ago…
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pout-header-3.png]

Hi friend,

Nellie launched her campaign for Congress almost exactly one year ago. From the very beginning, she's reminded us that the people of NJ-09 deserve a fighter in Washington who never forgets where she comes from.

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=250903_tp_anniversary_img [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=250903_tp_anniversary_img]

Over the past year, this campaign has grown into something bigger than we could have ever imagined. We’ve built a grassroots movement grounded in our neighborhoods, fueled by working families and by people who believe in a fairer, stronger New Jersey.

Our momentum is still not slowing down. That scares Republicans, because their path to keeping their House majority starts by winning right here in Nellie's district.

That’s why the GOP is coming at Nellie harder than ever. Last month alone, they published over 11 press releases attacking Nellie, and they are flooding our district with false attack ads. They know what we know — if they win here, they keep their House majority. That's why we cannot let them gain any ground.

Will you chip in today to mark our one-year anniversary and make sure NJ-09 stays blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?&:refcode=250903_tp_anniversary_l1]

CONTRIBUTE [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=250903_tp_anniversary_b1]Together, we will win this.

Thank you,

Team Pou
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pou_headshot_crop.jpg]

About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=5d4f58c3-f788-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=5d4f58c3-f788-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413]
Follow Nellie
https://x.com/NelliePou [https://x.com/NelliePou] https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/ [https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/] https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/ [https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/]
Checks may also be mailed to:
Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/QcG518LlG0yfilVoJO5ZLg2?unsubscribedata=ZJRpgfxtPcgvIshXq5gY14iZvLZcStmk98ULPyEjHg5VJIMnK9qsd7SVnZft9WumCUpd7DZUV3OXnptkYqo66pWEdZTQ6VlREap1iRPV%2F0sbjWWaEfqSQhgJQYT6SbQwZucuN%2B4%2F8xloAzq4xBbTjafoyUt5ot8JUjIqIaXwSxY4l8DrCnN%2Be9SHmqCCVRKUYQ3uFDWA1UXNf6IJLiTB8pvjTByS5prXTZrT5%2FL%2F7G%2BNOodqmOsMRNlzza3Ut1q4vp7yh3rs0WsX8jApEvSg5VpqA%2FQNYjaLMGkt1gaQxFYBBWKtWadiaD7JDmGMQl%2F7gEzecWVzjwP6lozlrQDk58e513vQ64SR2Dx%2Fg%2B2OtsbTVPVkdsGtLVRZi2dlsIF2bPZhLg6dU8F7HBSnV5jLLIVGFeHWqFMSP6IUV4u1%2FkXQhs3bJQcBIPoRg%2FRCI0j4] . Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | Peter,

For the first time in years, Republicans have outraised Democrats in the first half of the year. They’re building a record-breaking war chest, and if we don’t act now, they’ll have the resources to flood our district with attacks.

It’s a lot to take in and it would be easy to feel overwhelmed. **But I don’t get scared. I get prepared.**

Part of that preparation means starting September strong and putting us in the best possible position ahead of our FEC deadline at the end of the month. name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: We can’t let Trump bury the Epstein files.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee
body:
The courage of the survivors is adding pressure for justice. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1b49uHVORDTam--fuJ_cSNx30hGP3Droo5eRFOaUyZbVEwdkMl2jRrZpWtXmctgPB5DQ9Ky6JeZZdqgJue4j96863lqZPafL7_9gFuNO297Y9vZf6mFnG-_oeN0Qannxn3mC-YfCf3RKLP_8wMuMxCgzXD00Vlrj0nIAjwcygCKTIMCLGXjg6xu6dmVxChVtKgT_Xt7748LXmXtJ6JmKZh3V4di32o-9hBdZD0dkNLCo9PV7y2VWmQfzMo2ayuiZMf_WkASWhMMAYZd7fiCJ32DWM3sSwziZatbUC9K4N4fqhfIPdTm7yWb9bpn84nMChFNsutzIshN52i-WfB8Z-R0/4jl/enYZoigGRe-Dffh-qMHhbw/h0/h001.ml2X5MK0sc5WXrijWq0nwPOXbaBFyZKfA3WQSxVVsEA)
---
Friends, Today on Capitol Hill, Epstein survivors stood up and told the truth. They shared their stories. They demanded Congress release the full Epstein files --the same files the Trump team has spent months trying to bury.

This moment could change everything. But only if we act.

If the pressure keeps building, Congress could compel the Justice Department to finally release what Trump doesn't want the public to see. But make no mistake--Trump and his allies are scrambling to silence survivors and protect the powerful.

**They 've redacted his name. Called the allegations a "hoax." And now they're trying to shut down the truth before it breaks wide open. ** **Even Republicans like Rep. Thomas Massie are breaking ranks to join Ro Khanna and demand the truth be made public. That tells you just how big this is -- and how scared Trump's team really is.
**
This isn't just about Epstein. This is about power, impunity, and whether justice still matters in America.

At No Dem Left Behind, we're not sitting this out. We're fighting to make sure every voice is heard--especially in the tough, overlooked districts where MAGA power has gone unchecked for too long.

[**Will you chip in now to help us take this fight into the districts where MAGA power runs deep --and where silence has protected the powerful for too long? Your support fuels our work to hold Trump and his enablers accountable, support Democrats in uphill battles, and make sure this cover-up doesn't get swept under the rug.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1b49uHVORDTam--fuJ_cSNxCQx_4SywG460A2j8C_jhtZMMqv-pc6ITwtp8BIfiFajfzhLxIMuW1mG4_EDkeS7r8CeOhw2G_G9wEDyEyI-bjgXX8tK6fP2Agf12hK-Tcn4gC_H2v_WPPxrDFEs18kfahSMUm9FsGbfnDDnZ33i7e0DIrq9jMWiMcitp0qpISZCSPY4Jg8bl3hIjua4NAauBDuJuAvMENPAx-RLPRvMiFiCdUuroZ5Eg5GM0ABsRXmk0oNM2Sc4FPq3wqQKcQkjEsRjYOMwZwU_d9UBJ9BI3qd6UU2SFTivzSbUMX8nkDLVLR6Se3S1OK6fGU6rg9ipI/4jl/enYZoigGRe-Dffh-qMHhbw/h1/h001.lK8tbihcKRfHNaPCH15SrwrCEkqstoSBiDnLwd8uwk8)

clean_body: The courage of the survivors is adding pressure for justice. | | Friends, Today on Capitol Hill, Epstein survivors stood up and told the truth. They shared their stories. They demanded Congress release the full Epstein files --the same files the Trump team has spent months trying to bury. This moment could change everything. But only if we act. If the pressure keeps building, Congress could compel the Justice Department to finally release what Trump doesn't want the public to see. But make no mistake--Trump and his allies are scrambling to silence survivors and protect the powerful. They 've redacted his name. Called the allegations a "hoax." And now they're trying to shut down the truth before it breaks wide open. Even Republicans like Rep. Thomas Massie are breaking ranks to join Ro Khanna and demand the truth be made public. That tells you just how big this is -- and how scared Trump's team really is. This isn't just about Epstein. This is about power, impunity, and whether justice still matters in America. At No Dem Left Behind, we're not sitting this out. We're fighting to make sure every voice is heard--especially in the tough, overlooked districts where MAGA power has gone unchecked for too long. The truth is on the line. So is accountability. Let's make sure no survivor -- and no Democrat -- gets left behind. -- Team No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. name: Team Chrissy
subject: Update on Marriage Equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Will you sign our petition to protect marriage equality?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114550414/567383494/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjQ1NGIzMy1mODg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cHA9qcV6eGN2Q-Hmv4NZh4n3ZmOdx_z7Mw31qAHnhSQ=&emci=aef30ec0-1085-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0f454b33-f888-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek,
Ten years ago, people all over the country celebrated when the Supreme Court made marriage equality the law of the land. Now, that hard-won right is under threat, thanks to the resurfacing of an old marriage equality foe.
Kim Davis, the former county clerk jailed in 2015 in Kentucky for refusing to issue a marriage license to a gay couple, has filed an appeal straight to the Supreme Court. Her case argues the Court should treat marriage like it did abortion in _Roe v. Wade_ and allow states to decide. She cites Justice Clarence Thomas’s support for overturning _Obergefell_ , the decision that legalized same-sex marriage nationwide.
Conservatives are lining up to make this happen. Already this year, nine states have introduced or passed legislation attacking marriage equality. If you want a stark reminder of what happens when Democrats are in charge, look no further than the 2022 Respect for Marriage Act, passed by a Democratic Congress and signed into law by President Joe Biden. The Respect for Marriage Act requires all states and the federal government to recognize same-sex marriages and protects existing marriages if _Obergefell_ is overturned.
With a 6-3 conservative majority – including three Trump-appointed justices – t**he current Court is more extreme than ever.** Chief Justice John Roberts, in his _Obergefell_ dissent, warned the majority ruling had “no basis in the Constitution.”
Chrissy ran for Congress with a promise: to protect and defend the LGBTQ community. She helped pass the Equality Act to ensure LGBTQ Americans are fully protected under federal civil rights law – and she continues that fight today.
**This moment demands action from all of us. With the Supreme Court poised to revisit marriage rights, we to hear from you. So please, will you take a minute to add your name to our petition?**
**[Tell Congress: Protect same sex marriage.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114550420/567383496/-1672967366?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1162-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjQ1NGIzMy1mODg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cHA9qcV6eGN2Q-Hmv4NZh4n3ZmOdx_z7Mw31qAHnhSQ=&emci=aef30ec0-1085-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0f454b33-f888-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=21278485)**

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 9/3/2025
body:
Are you racist? The Durango School Board thinks so.
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hey folks!
🚨 We're launching a NEW VIDEO SERIES! Rocky Mountain Voice is digging into the hidden agenda of Durango’s school district—and the price parents & students are paying. Over the next 12 days, we’ll expose 12 ways they’re doing our kids wrong with daily videos on social media from Heidi Ganahl called**“The Durango 9R Dirty Dozen.”** From secret invoices to federal complaints, we're bringing light to what the board doesn’t want you to see.
Head to any of our social media channels to catch DAY ONE: _["Are you racist? The Durango School Board thinks so."](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _➡️**[Instagram](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) | [Facebook](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) | [X](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) | [TikTok](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Hospitals reported [$545 million in uncompensated care](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) last year, much tied to migrant treatment, while the state’s Cover All Coloradans program for undocumented residents has soared from $2 million to $32 million since 2022. Pueblo officials are urging the Trump administration to [keep the Comanche coal plant](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) open, warning closures will devastate tax revenue and jobs.
Denver ranks among the [nation’s ten most violent cities](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) despite recent declines, and Labor Day protests at the Capitol [targeted Trump and billionaires](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) but drew modest turnout. Commentators say [nuclear power is vital](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to securing defense assets, while Polis’ $250 million budget cuts are already [threatening Medicaid access](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with hospitals and dentists warning of reduced care.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** [Teen unemployment has surged](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to pandemic-era levels, with Colorado among the hardest-hit states as rising minimum wages push young workers out of jobs. And in a move with major economic and security stakes, Trump is set to [relocate U.S. Space Command headquarters](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) from Colorado Springs to Huntsville, Alabama, ending years of political wrangling.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Durango parents are [pushing back against costly DEI policies](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) they argue force critical race theory into classrooms as test scores fall. Michael Hancock warns that progressives are [treating politicians and movements like religious idols](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), elevating leaders and causes beyond criticism while delivering little real change.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, September 3, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Are you racist? The Durango School Board thinks so.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY PROTECT LA PLATA KIDS, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Durango School District 9-R has spent heavily on a quiet plan to bring diversity, equity and inclusion policies into local classrooms. Attached to this commentary are invoices obtained through CORA requests to the district. They show the board paid Make It Plain Consulting more than $209,000 between 2021 and 2025.
_[A combined file of the invoices can be viewed here.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_
What the community didn’t realize is that the board’s long-term goal was to introduce Critical Race Theory under the banner of DEI. School board directors Kristen Smith, Erika Brown and Andrea Parmenter started by pushing a new resolution for the Durango 9-R Board of Education.
[As of July 2025, three Federal Civil Rights Complaints were filed against Durango School District](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) (formerly known as Durango School 9-R) for discrimination by newly adopted resolutions. Complaints were based on race discrimination, segregated graduations, and race hiring practices. The complaints were filed by Mountain States Legal Foundation and could result in losing almost $8 million in federal funding.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Uncompensated care meets 340B: Colorado’s numbers force a reckoning](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado hospitals reported $544.9 million in uncompensated care in 2023, much of it tied to the migrant surge, with UCHealth and Denver Health alone absorbing tens of millions in unpaid costs.
* The state’s “Cover All Coloradans” program for undocumented minors and pregnant women has ballooned from $2 million in 2022 to $32 million projected for FY2025–26, alongside surging enrollment.
* Critics argue the 340B drug program is being abused—hospitals pocket discounts instead of passing savings to patients—prompting Colorado to adopt new transparency laws and President Trump to sign federal orders cracking down on hidden costs and blocking subsidies for illegal immigration.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Sources say Trump plans to relocate Space Command from Colorado Springs to Huntsville](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ASSOCIATED PRESS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Trump’s decision to move U.S. Space Command from Colorado Springs to Huntsville, Alabama, delivers a major economic and strategic blow to Colorado, which had fought hard to keep the headquarters.
* The move ends a four-year battle between the states, with Huntsville chosen after site visits evaluating infrastructure, community support, and costs.
* The reversal of Biden’s earlier choice to keep Space Command in Colorado underscores how the project became a political prize, with both states lobbying aggressively and billions in jobs and investment at stake.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[The new golden calves: Progressives bow to political idols](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY MICHAEL HANCOCK | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 2** _Idolatry is as old as humanity itself. Ancient Israel bowed before golden calves. Rome worshiped its emperors. Today, American progressives practice their own brand of idolatry—transforming politicians, activists, movements, and bureaucracies into secular saints._
__
**[Show up and earn: First jobs, buying power and Colorado’s July numbers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | SEPTEMBER 1** _Labor Day isn’t just policy and parades. It’s first alarms, first shifts and the pride of a small raise. The numbers say buying power ticked up this year and Colorado stays competitive. The stories say the first rung is where grit takes shape._
__

**[The Shield of Faith: The Final Move – Who Do You Want to Be?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | AUGUST 31** _If you knew me back in the 80s, or if you’ve read my devotions or heard me preach, you know I wasn’t grooving to synth-pop or rocking parachute pants. I was a hard rocker through and through. Zeppelin, Dio, Ozzy... those were my peeps. My soul leaned into guitar solos, not synthesizers._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor+Interest+%28via+Mountain+Minute%29)) or send us a message on social media to chat
|

|
---
**🍔 DID YOU KNOW?** Montpelier, Vermont, is the **only U.S. state capital without a McDonald’s.** With just over 8,000 residents, it’s also the smallest state capital by population.
|

|
---

Attached to this commentary are invoices obtained through CORA requests to the district. They show the board paid Make It Plain Consulting more than $209,000 between 2021 and 2025. What the community didn’t realize is that the board’s long-term goal was to introduce Critical Race Theory under the banner of DEI. School board directors Kristen Smith, Erika Brown and Andrea Parmenter started by pushing a new resolution for the Durango 9-R Board of Education. (formerly known as Durango School 9-R) for discrimination by newly adopted resolutions. Complaints were based on race discrimination, segregated graduations, and race hiring practices. The complaints were filed by Mountain States Legal Foundation and could result in losing almost $8 million in federal funding. | BY JEN SCHUMANN, Colorado hospitals reported $544.9 million in uncompensated care in 2023, much of it tied to the migrant surge, with UCHealth and Denver Health alone absorbing tens of millions in unpaid costs. The state’s “Cover All Coloradans” program for undocumented minors and pregnant women has ballooned from $2 million in 2022 to $32 million projected for FY2025–26, alongside surging enrollment. Critics argue the 340B drug program is being abused—hospitals pocket discounts instead of passing savings to patients—prompting Colorado to adopt new transparency laws and President Trump to sign federal orders cracking down on hidden costs and blocking subsidies for illegal immigration. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | Trump’s decision to move U.S. Space Command from Colorado Springs to Huntsville, Alabama, delivers a major economic and strategic blow to Colorado, which had fought hard to keep the headquarters. The move ends a four-year battle between the states, with Huntsville chosen after site visits evaluating infrastructure, community support, and costs. The reversal of Biden’s earlier choice to keep Space Command in Colorado underscores how the project became a political prize, with both states lobbying aggressively and billions in jobs and investment at stake. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ MICHAEL HANCOCK | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 2 Idolatry is as old as humanity itself. Ancient Israel bowed before golden calves. Rome worshiped its emperors. Today, American progressives practice their own brand of idolatry—transforming politicians, activists, movements, and bureaucracies into secular saints. JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | SEPTEMBER 1 Labor Day isn’t just policy and parades. It’s first alarms, first shifts and the pride of a small raise. The numbers say buying power ticked up this year and Colorado stays competitive. The stories say the first rung is where grit takes shape. DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | AUGUST 31 If you knew me back in the 80s, or if you’ve read my devotions or heard me preach, you know I wasn’t grooving to synth-pop or rocking parachute pants. I was a hard rocker through and through. Zeppelin, Dio, Ozzy... those were my peeps. My soul leaned into guitar solos, not synthesizers. __ Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor+Interest+%28via+Mountain+Minute%29) or send us a message on social media to chat | | 🍔 DID YOU KNOW? Montpelier, Vermont, is the only U.S. state capital without a McDonald’s. With just over 8,000 residents, it’s also the smallest state capital by population. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY "Schools teach exactly what they are intended to teach and they do it well: how to be a good Egyptian and remain in your place in the pyramid." – John Taylor Gatto | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. If you ever stop receiving our emails, it might be because someone to whom you forwarded the email unintentionally removed you from the list. No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! name: Nikki, Team Benson
subject: This race is a toss-up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Early money makes all the difference in a race this competitive.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=675%2E181023%2E1XO4MA)
Hey team, it’s Nikki, Jocelyn’s campaign manager. I have an update for you:
**This race is officially a toss-up, folks:**
_Inside Elections’_ latest report names Michigan as one of the most competitive governor’s races across the country — confirming what we already knew.
Races are won and lost by the smallest of margins here in Michigan, and it’s going to take a lot of energy and organizing power to elect Jocelyn. Not to mention _a lot_ of resources.
But while some of Jocelyn’s opponents, like John James and Mike Duggan, rely on checks from MAGA donors and corporate PACs, **Jocelyn’s campaign is supported by grassroots donors like you. Which means winning this race comes down to people like you chipping in what you can, when you can.**
**[Early money makes all the difference in a race this competitive. Please pitch in any amount you can to help us elect Jocelyn and win this true toss-up race.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=675%2E181023%2E1XO4MA)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/581?c0=jmb-em-q32025.ncJ1B1&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=675%2E181023%2E1XO4MA)

---
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/265?c0=jmb-em-q32025.koEtbW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=675%2E181023%2E1XO4MA)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/266?c0=jmb-em-q32025.z9_9cy&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=675%2E181023%2E1XO4MA)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=675%2E181023%2E1XO4MA)
---
_Inside Elections_ said of Michigan: “This race [is] unpredictable no matter who the eventual nominees are.”
With a third-party spoiler in Mike Duggan, a billionaire-funded GOP opponent in John James, and a state as purple as Michigan, **we’re in for a long, winding ride.**
But I know that this team can make the difference and send Jocelyn to Lansing.
So much is at stake here in Michigan. **[Will you step up and chip in to Jocelyn’s campaign? We’re counting on you to help us win this toss-up race.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=675%2E181023%2E1XO4MA)**

---
I’m grateful for your support, and so is Jocelyn.
Thanks, team!
— Nikki
_Campaign Manager
_ _Benson for Governor_

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea.

| | | | | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5Um/?__vbtrk=MzE2MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
My situation is in your hands, patriot. I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look – this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia’s highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I’ve been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I’m running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we’ve been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I’ve been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger’s campaign coffers and there wasn’t a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, friend. Polls show this race is virtually tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don’t make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I’m making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine;_please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
[ **DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>** ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5Um/?__vbtrk=MzE2MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn’t ask you to stay in this fight if I didn’t think it was worth it. And friend, I **know** we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. __[_**I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!**_](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5Um/?__vbtrk=MzE2MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2MDg4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!")

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Shoved. Detained. Threatened.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
ICE has crossed the line; help hold them accountable
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114551324/567386108/623074613?code=jtk1415-su-nd&refcode=jtk1415-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDU3MDc5OTctZjk4OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oaipiRfx_n8DJKx-iTY3Z3wSkymgW5ZkWu7dWbZfp9U=&emci=8d0c4c35-0888-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d5707997-f988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9329426)
---
Friend, these reports of ICE’s activities are shocking:

A pregnant U.S. citizen shoved, detained, and falsely charged with assaulting an officer.

A Latino citizen detained because he “looked like” a suspect.

And countless protesters and onlookers subjected to tear gas and beatings.
Particularly disturbing – one of Connecticut’s own State Representatives, Corey Paris, was threatened with prosecution for merely informing his constituents of immigration enforcement efforts and prioritizing their safety.
This is unconstitutional abuse of power. **Plain and simple.**
That’s why as Ranking Member of the Permanent Subcommittee on Investigations in the Senate, I am taking decisive action and opening a formal inquiry into ICE’s unlawful tactics and training materials. We, the American people, have a right to demand answers on why our country is veering into a police state.
But meanwhile, radical Republicans are attempting to reward these very abuses with even more funding: a blank check to ultimately escalate these tactics in every state, and potentially in your hometown.
That’s precisely why now more than ever, I need your support. The only way I and other Democrats can effectively continue this fight is with you standing alongside us. **[So please, friend, sign my petition today to empower our efforts to hold ICE and the Trump administration accountable and protect the foundations of our democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114551325/567386109/340153390?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1415-su-nd&refcode=jtk1415-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDU3MDc5OTctZjk4OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oaipiRfx_n8DJKx-iTY3Z3wSkymgW5ZkWu7dWbZfp9U=&emci=8d0c4c35-0888-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d5707997-f988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9329426)**
| | [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114551327/567386110/340153390?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1415-su-nd&refcode=jtk1415-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDU3MDc5OTctZjk4OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oaipiRfx_n8DJKx-iTY3Z3wSkymgW5ZkWu7dWbZfp9U=&emci=8d0c4c35-0888-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d5707997-f988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9329426)

This inquiry is just the beginning, but investigations of this magnitude require time, resources, and relentless effort. Thank you for standing with me and for helping to sound the alarm.
Dick

The only way I and other Democrats can effectively continue this fight is with you standing alongside us. | | This inquiry is just the beginning, but investigations of this magnitude require time, resources, and relentless effort. Thank you for standing with me and for helping to sound the alarm. Dick | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut Blumenthal for Connecticut 1111 Summer Street Suite 301 Stamford, CT 06905 United States

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Judge Chris Taylor needs us
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23339%2E4449941%2EQPkuYf) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23339%2E4449941%2EQPkuYf) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/67650?t=3&akid=23339%2E4449941%2EQPkuYf) Folks,

Last April, right-wing special interests and billionaires like Elon Musk tried to buy seats on the Wisconsin Supreme Court — and nearly succeeded.

They spent so much that they broke the record for the most expensive judicial election in _our nation’s history._

Now, they’re eyeballing Judge Chris Taylor’s race.

Without notice, right-wing special interests could start funneling money into Wisconsin to buy a seat on our state’s highest court. We can’t let that happen.

That’s why I’m reaching out today. Chris has spent her whole career on the side of people, from her years as a public servant to her work on the bench.

[**But this race won’t be won on values alone. It’s going to take all of us coming together to stand up to right-wing special interests and protect our progressive majority.**
](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/67650?t=4&akid=23339%2E4449941%2EQPkuYf) [**Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can to Judge Chris Taylor’s campaign and Fight For Reform? Every dollar helps.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/67650?t=5&akid=23339%2E4449941%2EQPkuYf) | [DONATE NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/67650?t=6&akid=23339%2E4449941%2EQPkuYf)

Tammy

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Help shape what the Squad does next
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250903-1508-foote&t=1001&akid=1508%2E342411%2E6m9bKU ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

The fight for progressive change is only heating up. As we look ahead,
we’re not just deciding what comes next — we’re asking for your input.

The Squad Victory Fund is powered by people like you — grassroots
supporters who believe in justice, equity, and a government that works for
everyone.

That’s why we’re reaching out now: To hear directly from you about what
priorities matter most.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-2025-september/?source=em20250903-1508&t=1002&akid=1508%2E342411%2E6m9bKU ]Will you fill out our September Priorities Survey? It only takes a few
moments — and your voice helps shape the direction of this movement.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-2025-september/?source=em20250903-1508&t=1003&akid=1508%2E342411%2E6m9bKU ]TAKE THE SURVEY

Your answers will help chart our next steps and shape our strategies for
the fights that lie ahead.

Thank you,

The Squad Victory Fund

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are standing up to the
authoritarianism of the Trump Administration — but they cannot do it
alone.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/20187?refcode=em20250903-1508&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1508%2E342411%2E6m9bKU ]Please make a contribution today to support the Squad.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1508%2E342411%2E6m9bKU

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

body:
I want our students to have access to a world-class education, from early childhood, to K-12, to college and beyond.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114552025/567388435/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-03_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTU4ZGIxZDUtZmI4OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-KO9w_HtDYiCqNA7dIkMrButHCHelJWHmfFWRWxd9MY=)
Peter, as the mom of three girls in Virginia's public schools, I want our students to have access to a world-class education, from early childhood, to K-12, to college and beyond.
That's why I recently unveiled my _Strengthening Virginia Schools Plan_ in Hampton Roads.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114552026/567388436/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-03_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTU4ZGIxZDUtZmI4OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-KO9w_HtDYiCqNA7dIkMrButHCHelJWHmfFWRWxd9MY=)
Virginians deserve a Governor who acknowledges the challenges that we're facing — from a severe teacher shortage to declining academic performance to child care costs exceeding the price of a four-year degree — and offers real, actionable solutions.
_Under my plan, I'd equip our parents and educators with the resources they need to prepare our kids for success._
I'm talking about increasing the supply of child care, giving our teachers a raise, repairing schools that are crumbling, funding community colleges and HBCUs, and making sure everybody has a path to success — whether that's by attending college, an apprenticeship program, or trade school.
Now, I hope I've given you a sense of what's in store if we win this election, and I hope you'll be inspired to support our campaign.

---
Fellow Conservative,

You may not know me yet, but my name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a lifelong Minnesotan, former Navy SEAL, and Marine Corps veteran running for U.S. Senate in 2026. I’m stepping into this fight because Minnesota—and our country—needs a new voice to stand up for our values, and I’m asking for your help to make it happen.

I grew up in Bloomington, Minnesota, playing hockey and learning teamwork from my working-class parents. _**On my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after 9/11, I enlisted in the Marine Corps to serve our nation.**_

**Over 21 years, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries as a Marine and Navy SEAL, putting my life on the line to defend our freedoms.** I earned my undergraduate degree from the University of Minnesota, a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But at my core, I’m a regular guy who wants to make my mom proud and fight for the Minnesota I love.

Right now, Minnesota and America face a critical moment. The radical policies of Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—who’s running to replace retiring Senator Tina Smith—threaten our way of life. From the unrest in Minneapolis in 2020 to attacks on our police, their agenda doesn’t reflect the Minnesota I know. _**This open Senate seat in 2026 is our chance to take back our state and stop the left’s push toward extremism. Just like in Georgia, where one seat flipped the Senate majority in 2021, Minnesota’s vote could decide the future of the U.S. Senate.

**_ **But here’s the challenge: I’m a new face, and the Democrats are already raising millions to keep this seat.** I’ve noticed you haven’t been active lately, Fellow Conservative, and I get it—the news can feel overwhelming, and it’s easy to think the fight’s already won. But it’s not. Right now, donations are slowing, and the other side is **quietly building its war chest**. I’m thinking of patriots like you who’ve supported conservatives before. Your past support has helped Republicans win tough battles, and we need you now to introduce me to Minnesota voters.

**[I’m asking for just $5 today.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ba9476da5d174609acc5edfb36ba20b7&_e=BvGA_wcK1rGFSxex2xFjvcSMZCyT5OhJaQ8z0nlpGO5nt6mCj-QcOozOH0_eJIkLVIcXV9-Zl3gCBIN7CqYRZ4vRA9ZILXdXqZ3t5FgJCWfIW_LGGqi-lGiIdHRmGPFMQF5eqKWWkNTLdfeIdlvaKp7NE39K1gUtCFCoWonAD_OStUuoZcbeVyRKq6JTpYSRDM6XPmOWmqsZ3Dq9T7FDhzXsixInTtytIE4kQdbKkCVX5nwXFGyk0JmdIDUqOW52lVNIXPkqU7WegoC5O7adCYii3GioBqjQ-s4e6aS1qtn8EYGKCOZg6EmrMo9aa2gmJV8-e16eXXJASat06a2vISuju9t1LSPjC0z9eCe7ZRL293dgIHw1y5HydfdJcjOpt6r1Vaydc16Ci72b1xr2aYH7r1KMUX8Q9t13rTLnsJh3FeclZ502weJIBVAQqqX85tF7Beoyo_GaAoQRIa_7d5833RN40K6aTj-0ksYwxVi_RDbgwSI3Fa_eP1V3IQ6m2r5rxfIoIhqV5DaL0wO4Ff-lnSTcvahqkSFghAvYAYA6W4pcBhZPDPDa2FPefXFXOLWxfyVzxF40PnotyLXGGKsbN-Ywr8p6v-r9gvtkz0fDX9QEJ9FlJA9RjvdzaUzty8_RLAxotWhGqBy_fmaBnxIYHT1SeFDQeLgzYKIwoNkwArA1J7_-8NFRYNtHjwr7Ukxw8koSuHFe1qFEvFTbRjRR1tM4iOSG2H3YKIOX-HbskPadUU8deyFYCYR3SIYRCXYXduG4y_rgZIJnp0Z8mQ%3D%3D)** It’s not about the amount—it’s a signal that you’re with me, that you believe Minnesota and America deserve a conservative fighter who’s served our nation and will serve you in Washington.

As a Navy SEAL, I’ve thrived in the most challenging missions and am ready for this campaign. But I can’t do it without you. We need thousands of grassroots supporters, _**not Hollywood elites or mega-donors like the Democrats rely on.**_

[**CHIP IN $5
**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ba9476da5d174609acc5edfb36ba20b7&_e=BvGA_wcK1rGFSxex2xFjvcSMZCyT5OhJaQ8z0nlpGO5nt6mCj-QcOozOH0_eJIkLVIcXV9-Zl3gCBIN7CqYRZ4vRA9ZILXdXqZ3t5FgJCWfIW_LGGqi-lGiIdHRmGPFMQF5eqKWWkNTLdfeIdlvaKp7NE39K1gUtCFCoWonAD_OStUuoZcbeVyRKq6JTpYSRDM6XPmOWmqsZ3Dq9T7FDhzXsixInTtytIE4kQdbKkCVX5nwXFGyk0JmdIDUqOW52lVNIXPkqU7WegoC5O7adCQAPMOz007vKm4wb2xqL0GlzpB4q9sWyepMenfxMMIrVEChLRdDzW5_Ygis987o0RW5b0VvX1en8THYYxByhOb0pHzHKehnPCouRm5xweUYyI_v8pHc5nW7RdxOn1HKdinN3ryXIp4abIdLxfDTZEyeKJrdZdkvtNB2Vn4zmc7f5nCwvVqL3biYoBMszPE3aSMCAH40iakjGAwt5XLnnb-JEJ9XcbaP0yy16ESnCBAtMwbx4M-23hpBAlHdact5o1B3GXvLxrVwUST6RlUfOHA9VgzFTWxu9Cv3szB01FCBeI2ObZyGt3Gz04-izleK23ijTWZjS9VpExv7OHtSLJ4iL236NLcrG9OnMZeRyi0-E53PGQ70iXnq1FZWPS5SyqMbZBaxVHXeMEagFuVun7GzuB9X61n0bwLaOi0LOz7iZhpZIpWfaDcTK9HbIOQYzhiarbgWZ-GdOgBdz_W8yy3Uk_aCY2ggCbSqk-eSmngBlVeWMoqc_25pwBHAacY7gag%3D%3D)
**Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican for president since 1976, but this race is winnable.** I’m running to secure our borders, support law enforcement, revive our economy, and protect our freedoms. Please, chip in $5 today to help me introduce myself to Minnesotans and fight for our shared values.

With steadfast resolve,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

clean_body: Your past support has helped Republicans win tough battles, and we need you now to introduce me to Minnesota voters | Fellow Conservative, You may not know me yet, but my name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a lifelong Minnesotan, former Navy SEAL, and Marine Corps veteran running for U.S. Senate in 2026. I’m stepping into this fight because Minnesota—and our country—needs a new voice to stand up for our values, and I’m asking for your help to make it happen. I grew up in Bloomington, Minnesota, playing hockey and learning teamwork from my working-class parents. On my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after 9/11, I enlisted in the Marine Corps to serve our nation. Over 21 years, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries as a Marine and Navy SEAL, putting my life on the line to defend our freedoms. I earned my undergraduate degree from the University of Minnesota, a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But at my core, I’m a regular guy who wants to make my mom proud and fight for the Minnesota I love. Right now, Minnesota and America face a critical moment. The radical policies of Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—who’s running to replace retiring Senator Tina Smith—threaten our way of life. From the unrest in Minneapolis in 2020 to attacks on our police, their agenda doesn’t reflect the Minnesota I know. This open Senate seat in 2026 is our chance to take back our state and stop the left’s push toward extremism. Just like in Georgia, where one seat flipped the Senate majority in 2021, Minnesota’s vote could decide the future of the U.S. Senate. But here’s the challenge: I’m a new face, and the Democrats are already raising millions to keep this seat. I’ve noticed you haven’t been active lately, Fellow Conservative, and I get it—the news can feel overwhelming, and it’s easy to think the fight’s already won. But it’s not. Right now, donations are slowing, and the other side is quietly building its war chest. I’m thinking of patriots like you who’ve supported conservatives before. Your past support has helped Republicans win tough battles, and we need you now to introduce me to Minnesota voters. It’s not about the amount—it’s a signal that you’re with me, that you believe Minnesota and America deserve a conservative fighter who’s served our nation and will serve you in Washington. As a Navy SEAL, I’ve thrived in the most challenging missions and am ready for this campaign. But I can’t do it without you. We need thousands of grassroots supporters, not Hollywood elites or mega-donors like the Democrats rely on. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican for president since 1976, but this race is winnable. I’m running to secure our borders, support law enforcement, revive our economy, and protect our freedoms. Please, chip in $5 today to help me introduce myself to Minnesotans and fight for our shared values. With steadfast resolve, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

California Democrats,
Passing Prop 50 is our chance to protect fair elections and stop the Donald Trump and Republican power grab. November 4 may feel like it’s weeks away, but ballots will start arriving in voters’ mailboxes in a matter of weeks. That means we have just weeks – not months – to reach voters, explain what’s at stake, and turn out the votes we need to win.
That’s where you come in.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP35/1/80994/images/bear.png]
VOLUNTEER WITH CADEM [http://cadem.org/castrong]
Winning Prop 50 will take thousands of Californians stepping up to phonebank and canvass their communities. We don't have the luxury of time, and the stakes could not be higher.
Join us now to phonebank and canvass for Prop 50, and together we’ll send a message to Trump and his allies: Californians will not let you rig our democracy.
New opportunities are available every day! Keep checking back for the latest.
Democratically yours,
California Democratic Party

Jeff Walter is running for the Illinois 11th Congressional District

# Jeff Walter Takes The 11th Congressional District By Storm
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=f679860580&e=fa724b03ca)
[|
---](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=f513d781a3&e=fa724b03ca)
| | | Have you heard Jeff Walter is running for the 11th Congressional District in Illinois?****[**A retired U.S. Navy Master Chief Petty Officer (E-9) and the current Mayor of Elburn**](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=ec3c1cbd2e&e=fa724b03ca) , Illinois, Jeff has dedicated his life to service—first to our nation, now to our community. He’s running for Congress to bring common sense, accountability, and real-world experience to Washington.
Jeff announced his candidacy on July 4th, and has been bouncing around the district ever since. Jeff is committed to meeting the voters from everywhere around the 11th district, and letting them know why he is the best choice compared to Bill Foster.
Speaking of Bill Foster, did you he has been serving in the US Congress for 15 years? Jeff Walter is committed to seeing Term Limits brought to the House floor and enacted into law.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | **Meet Team Walter** 1) John Nevenhoven2) Carrie Walter3) Mary Buell4) Dory Boswell5) Chris Hansen6) Blake Bonyko7) John Bolger
---
| [|

---](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=cbbb91d6d3&e=fa724b03ca)
| | | **Top News Items From The Campaign**
Parades a SuccessTeam Walter took part in parades in Elburn, Maple Park, Lake in the Hills, Hampshire, and more. It was great to meet so many constituents!
[First Fundraiser of the Campaign](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=333c6de51f&e=fa724b03ca)It was a successful night at Schmidt’sTowne Tap in Elburn with special guestspeakers State Senator Don DeWitte and State Representative Dan Ugaste.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | Would you like the chance to meet Jeff in person and ask him questions?
Join us this Monday, September 8th 7:30am - 9:30am for a Big Beautiful Breakfast at Rise N’Dine 115 N Main StElburn, IL 60119
You can buy your [tickets](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=6c657d2601&e=fa724b03ca) or [donate](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=9f057250b0&e=fa724b03ca) to Jeff [here](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=319fb0b5ce&e=fa724b03ca).

| [|

| | | This race will not be won by ideas, plans and issues alone. We will need to raise [$3 million](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=50984e9e70&e=fa724b03ca) or more to take on Bill Foster, his $2 million and his team.
Please consider joining our team today by donating [$10](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=a5b4a15380&e=fa724b03ca), [$25](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=6c53f6c891&e=fa724b03ca), [$50](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=a4bb7090fd&e=fa724b03ca), [$100](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=beb03ae197&e=fa724b03ca) or more to start getting Jeff to his [$3 million](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=e8971e91f5&e=fa724b03ca) goal.
We are greatful for all of your support!

Just 14 states have top marks from the trio of major credit-rating agencies, which include S&P Global Ratings, Moody’s Investors Service, and Fitch Ratings. Its most recent ratings came in [September 2024](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/oJLwCdSp1HmY3aj1bcos4wgapylWd1FfGOO_nEM9Sk6p1eJl-gAwFkbIrqTX1A39iA1Ga-xfjUuy5qva8o5wH6iqLbLY3sH6O8GjuyQ70OyP5C4O15XdLBHMxhq028-Qu2FXc9JsvdiWrfYGIMALzF_Vvzlu0OofZFzDasbUCBVZrG96r7MCYpBPhw_ez-0rm3i293ntzOTfR1T8n0lF_OSYkCmaOkrYSzfHMJOuJpFRCJl6mUDoDpjo_9es_7D5ivl-L0muJfLuMuwdzkj6yC_zClZtWRxmjuECvQ8ovTduQPXkPgsD1aR4p55DWO1bZydEq7HLdqng3r9x_jTLV4advhnz0b016ZvNiE4H0M06njXbKwRIP1r4gook4ANiIltjQBBbmeDDamCK3NEoCy5cc4qW__zl0s1lHINLaZWshHBoDw/bGBxZpms0xCkkyarq0QMAVWPRwpFrP4K/12), this [April](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/r_eywCqGmNQzElQAZz_ARhFMZKwNiljgYnP8YrWcGTaQ3gQOYMhAt7gUYBJ85epviQaoZE2hZYaPqO3jA4e8jvFqosuTBMUcgyX4OJLCwYPVCNabuhxwC1_ar3ug5fgJZ0PA2oyreKvjjGx5BP0E5ilIYkWQTBZvk54lXW_w0RQEDoUcxeowsBhsHDcXtCAmSScH34k8CT3g1UqbgXglYn7YWnD-owXsp7meMcWRC6KzXmFb9Qad6q23A1X2XwyofS6_NXrSS1IuxgbgaFZZwLuq_xTA2BDYbMdPbZiTXxVHrDzYcYdtx6PEdftRCQsbN0w4cvNwtZUOajIraSeSe2dhUehBPDbeAwA0THy4WyfnnESSfgmib3HlJExzr4SASTnbxoE8JjPjtB5azxGSIhq6lNRkM08bRPrjabEFCQJV80-LLSKSKmakAOQFRudWTyOFySzo6f8Q5RWjp09Nk4DTm683irjApHlwBeHZEScA5wJJFfGR5TcoKvQtgBWDZG8Xe2unSRvmyxaWKXCEyew8vYUIrHc/PwnsmxMjlm0nsocWVpgan9u_4c6I8O_n/12) and in [June](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/gpHrucbWIu7Ci9IIlT9OPO3QZ2fR7wElZazI3GD2NutFYx8rSQ-7aIKsXcCfZBRo-3q1S1qlTbZh6O_7yGp390s7wKoo6WBb_6mhxW7OEWa48B-omb7mPtQTlrtI3cZlE6ZiSvv7EjrfaIrvT8gFMfQhg124a-EzQhuVZymV9ydhYpLVko01NFDEks5Cqh90gdcg-1DXAYT_KarKyWqM2WycU5chhXJtYCYX1S1umQCz5xhlfYrkv8ZdmE_5g3_h5MbJ_N4QkZKW_ZJIz_hGBVc8Uh9kSQpfN1wWW4l_UPZ9Vloabh_dqb25Nn5W6l0w5ER9c6CUNgzGwtnzDFi_Y5VS3PeoqMGo3kwhCRCwgSOt68IY531CWG-rW3WLaSOhzVskTJg-zFxnoRNxlB7y_pE4spTBhUPIkqV9WA/84dft6PKWalY-vHCpDeaeNowjbH0yhTY/12). body:
When turnout is low and voters are uninformed, dark money rules the day.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NZWryZHRRoFtj23Ys730M_ZQ5x-2Rp_nal9d-2XMb_WnHsddrCZdxYdMJmBMvrGYP8vmIswG12DzjkGw73MP6Q5KFPxCHgp_XQxSv9iXMnlKMRQUqktjct0Oj40o9O8XTMnbiP29j_gZxItbZ__Fp1aBh0JDcaA36drYiLU12Yl0khOOTzaPSDKBmtiLPLnaaByCNnHecCIb5REG8igbKiNVs9_iYKTQVb0vcH1z5mg=&c=U6j4iDiUoNtBTl-SiWswghaegwO_rds6-jA4iR3xt6oV8SU2Mjp0PQ==&ch=Xy18NdYaznF019VZW_FcGFVgD1LmM9ttkfp7PjlTvNj6XpaZPacX-Q==)

| Peter,
Not every election makes headlines. In fact, some of the most important ones barely get noticed at all.
This November, Pennsylvania will hold a judicial retention election for three Democratic Supreme Court justices. Voters will be asked a simple "Yes" or "No" on whether they should keep their seats.
And that's exactly why MAGA is obsessed with these races.
When turnout is low and voters are uninformed, dark money rules the day. Right-wing operatives thrive in silence -- and if they flip the court, they'll have the power to gerrymander maps, greenlight voter suppression, and rig the rules for 2026 and 2028.
It's the perfect crime: the race no one's watching.
But we're watching. Defend Our Courts is one of the only groups raising the alarm and educating voters about what's at stake. We're running ads, building outreach, and making sure Pennsylvania doesn't sleep through this election.
We can win this fight -- but only if we start now.
[Can you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help make this the race everyone is talking about before it's too late?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NZWryZHRRoFtj23Ys730M_ZQ5x-2Rp_nal9d-2XMb_WnHsddrCZdxYdMJmBMvrGYP8vmIswG12DzjkGw73MP6Q5KFPxCHgp_XQxSv9iXMnlKMRQUqktjct0Oj40o9O8XTMnbiP29j_gZxItbZ__Fp1aBh0JDcaA36drYiLU12Yl0khOOTzaPSDKBmtiLPLnaaByCNnHecCIb5REG8igbKsTLW8WH6Npw3wWsqYUmItk=&c=U6j4iDiUoNtBTl-SiWswghaegwO_rds6-jA4iR3xt6oV8SU2Mjp0PQ==&ch=Xy18NdYaznF019VZW_FcGFVgD1LmM9ttkfp7PjlTvNj6XpaZPacX-Q==)

clean_body: When turnout is low and voters are uninformed, dark money rules the day. | | | | | == | Peter, Not every election makes headlines. In fact, some of the most important ones barely get noticed at all. This November, Pennsylvania will hold a judicial retention election for three Democratic Supreme Court justices. Voters will be asked a simple "Yes" or "No" on whether they should keep their seats. And that's exactly why MAGA is obsessed with these races. When turnout is low and voters are uninformed, dark money rules the day. Right-wing operatives thrive in silence -- and if they flip the court, they'll have the power to gerrymander maps, greenlight voter suppression, and rig the rules for 2026 and 2028. It's the perfect crime: the race no one's watching. But we're watching. Defend Our Courts is one of the only groups raising the alarm and educating voters about what's at stake. We're running ads, building outreach, and making sure Pennsylvania doesn't sleep through this election. We can win this fight -- but only if we start now. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == If MAGA thinks silence will save them, let's prove them wrong. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | ==

Our Ohio State Buckeyes absolutely crushed the Longhorns last weekend, and we’re still over here celebrating 🍾

But Vivek Ramaswamy isn’t.

That’s probably because he moved his company to Texas last year, all so he could chase fancy perks and billionaire tax breaks. Now he’s come waltzing back, dripping in megadonor special interest cash, thinking he can buy the governor’s mansion like it’s just another toy. Vivek Ramaswamy doesn’t give a damn about Ohio or the families who live here.
