clean_body: Soros Plan EXPOSED >> Soros Plan EXPOSED >> | | | | | Peter, I have some seriously concerning news to share with you. A Soros-funded organization called Texas Majority PAC has appeared in Texas and is plotting to take permanent control of our government by flipping Texas blue forever... Here is what Texas Majority PAC explains to its donors on its website: " ...We have one simple goal: to permanently flip Texas blue , thus releasing our state from Republican control and delivering two Democratic Senate seats and 40 Democratic Electoral College votes.This will effectively end the possibility of a Republican-controlled Senate or White House for generations ... " This is exactly why we can NEVER take our feet off the gas. The Left never sleeps as they ceaselessly plan to take power by any means necessary- can't let them do it. For Liberty, Ted Cruz PS: Please forward this email on to like-minded friends and family- thank you. | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | |

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I missed my deadline. This could be very serious.
body:
This is the last thing I wanted to say.
| | | | [](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
---
Friend – This is the last thing I wanted to say.
But I have to be honest with you: **I missed my fundraising deadline.**
And in this game, deadlines aren’t just dates on a calendar: **They’re markers of strength.**
**When we miss a deadline, the Democrats and RINO elites smell blood in the water.**
They’ll twist this into a narrative that I’m slipping... _That I’ve lost support._ They’re already scanning the reports, looking for any sign of weakness. And right now, I’m fighting from behind.
**_[That’s why this is so serious, Friend](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_****.**
This campaign has never been about _playing it safe_ or _going along with the status quo._
I’m fighting every day for our values, for our freedom, and for the America we love.
But to keep fighting, I need to show strength, and I need to do it now.
**[We have a narrow window to recover from this setback, and that means I urgently need your help](https://link.email.greene4congress.).**
[RUSH URGENT DONATION >>>](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
You’ve been with me in the trenches before. You know what we’re up against. And I wouldn’t come to you like this if I wasn’t truly counting on you.
If we can rally in the next 24 hours and show a surge of grassroots support, we can flip this narrative. We can prove them wrong. **But I can’t do it without you.**
**_[Please, help keep me in the fight](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_.**
For Our Nation,
| | [](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
---
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.greene4congress.)

### **_[Unsubscribe from list](https://link.email.greene4congress.com/click/e6056846/VaHR0cHM6Ly9tdGcubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZ3JlZW5lRk9VUmNvbmdyZXNzX2NvbTI1MDkwMw/LbmNscERSVDU4/qP2hpZHM9bmNQdk5VeHZ0NmFNUGxz/gaLijGg/s9v7a6f5ccb)_**

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Thanks to you, we’re in a better position to beat the far right
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114554284/567395556/896231865?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmMwYzdmMi0wMzg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lZFlEioo0SpiOnOCUtrH3ADSDh_A1O4VxarGjGGnLeQ=)
Thank you, Peter. With your support in August, we surpassed our monthly fundraising goal, and are headed into September in a better position to defend this critical seat from far-right extremists. That’s what makes a movement. Not some megadonors handpicking their members of Congress, but supporters like you -- chipping in when you can, volunteering on the campaign, and showing up to support us when we need you most. That’s real grassroots energy. We’re going to need it: this race is starting to heat up – _another_ challenger recently threw their hat in the ring – and after National Republicans spent millions here the last few years, we can expect our airwaves to start getting flooded. Soon. But for now, I just want to emphasize that your continued support means the world to me, and I’m confident that we have what it takes to defend this seat once again. Here’s to a great September, -Eric | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114554285/567395557/896231865?refcode=em-9.3.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmMwYzdmMi0wMzg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lZFlEioo0SpiOnOCUtrH3ADSDh_A1O4VxarGjGGnLeQ=)

name: GIFFORDS.org
subject: At the dinner table
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team,
If you knew that donating $5 could help save a life from gun violence, wouldn’t that be worth it?
Last week, the community of Annunciation Church in Minneapolis suffered a deadly mass shooting that killed 2 children and injured 17 others.
Even though the news cycle has moved onto the next topic, we cannot let it go. Some families will now be left with an empty seat at the dinner table forever.
Thoughts and prayers are not enough. There have been more than 400 school shootings since Columbine — and there will be another, and another, and another until we choose to act.
That is our mission at GIFFORDS. We work to communicate with voters, elect gun safety leaders, and pass commonsense gun safety laws to prevent future tragedies. Our work is powered by grassroots support, which is why we’re reaching out:
[**We are humbly asking you to pitch in $5 to GIFFORDS PAC. If our elected officials like Donald Trump and Republicans refuse to stand up to the gun lobby to protect our communities, then we will replace them with leaders who will.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep25.vnrwKJ&refcode=em250903-1-b&t=1&akid=10844%2E3935704%2E8F6gNO)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-sep25.LcBf1X&amount=5&refcode=em250903-1-b&t=20&akid=10844%2E3935704%2E8F6gNO)**

Kids shouldn’t have to worry about running for their lives. We must get weapons of war off of our streets and pass comprehensive gun safety laws.
Thank you,
GIFFORDS

**Please, take a second to read this...**
Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives -- making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.

| | **[DONATE $17](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-sep25.LcBf1X&amount=17&refcode=em250903-1-b&t=26&akid=10844%2E3935704%2E8F6gNO)**

clean_body: Team, If you knew that donating $5 could help save a life from gun violence, wouldn’t that be worth it? Last week, the community of Annunciation Church in Minneapolis suffered a deadly mass shooting that killed 2 children and injured 17 others. Even though the news cycle has moved onto the next topic, we cannot let it go. Some families will now be left with an empty seat at the dinner table forever. Thoughts and prayers are not enough. There have been more than 400 school shootings since Columbine — and there will be another, and another, and another until we choose to act. That is our mission at GIFFORDS. We work to communicate with voters, elect gun safety leaders, and pass commonsense gun safety laws to prevent future tragedies. name: Team Taylor
subject: What if we told you…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20250903-516&t=1&akid=522%2E294397%2Eu99Mlq)
Folks,
What if we told you that just **_four quarters_** could stop right-wing special interests from buying a seat on Wisconsin’s highest court?
Last April, right-wing groups spent $54 million trying to elect an extreme candidate, and they lost.
Now, they could target our campaign, but we have something that can’t be bought: **Grassroots momentum** — thousands of people who are determined to secure our progressive majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
And when one person on our team pitches in $1, someone else joins them. And then another. Maybe that includes you.
Together, we create a chain reaction of support strong enough to defeat our extreme opponent and elect Judge Chris Taylor.
[**With that in mind, will you start that chain reaction today with a donation of $1 or more?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250903_1_ak?amount=1&refcode=em20250903-516&refcode2=522_294397_u99Mlq&akid=522%2E294397%2Eu99Mlq)

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Does this sound fair to you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Does this sound fair to you, Peter? **Billionaires in the United States currently pay LESS in taxes than working-class Americans.** It doesn’t sound fair to me. Families all across the country are struggling because Donald Trump and the Republican Party are helping the rich get richer while everyone else gets left behind. Their Big Ugly Bill cut Medicaid benefits for millions of Americans and slashed food assistance for the people who need it most just to give another tax cut to the top 1%. And Trump’s tariffs are raising the prices of everyday goods for Americans who are already feeling the pinch of the high cost of living that the Trump administration refuses to address. The teachers, nurses, small-business owners, and millions of other workers who power our economy shouldn’t be forced to live paycheck to paycheck so that billionaires can save a little more money. **[But this current Senate Republican majority continues to put the wealthy and powerful over working families. If you’re ready to send them packing and elect a Democratic majority that puts everyday folks first, please pitch in to help me support Democratic candidates running to flip the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114554357/567395774/1668912996?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTc4MGY1OC0wNDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SRqugv7iNXU-C03mL2JjLarer3ez8IuT3gqjU-CRpuY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114554358/567395775/1135625285?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTc4MGY1OC0wNDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SRqugv7iNXU-C03mL2JjLarer3ez8IuT3gqjU-CRpuY=)

name: Vincent Dixie
subject: No ask. Only Thanks.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vincent Dixie for Tennessee
body:
I know your inbox is full. I am not writing to ask for anything, just to say thank you.

| | | | | Hi Peter, I know your inbox is full. I am not writing to ask for anything, just to say thank you. I’m running to represent TN-07 because I believe everyday families - not billionaires - deserve a voice in Congress. And today, I just want to pause and say _**thank you.**_ Thank you for believing in me, for standing with me, and for showing up every time our community needed someone to fight for working people. Your support is what makes flipping this district after 40 years of GOP control possible. TN-07 deserves a representative who understands our neighborhoods, our challenges and our families - someone who will fight for us in Washington every single day. Every phone call, every door we knock, every vote brings us closer to victory. Together, we can win TN-07 and send a message to Trump and the GOP that working families matter. I’m grateful to build this grassroots movement with you - and I can’t wait to fight for you in Congress. In solidarity,
Vincent Dixie
Candidate for Congress – TN-07 ****
---
| Paid for by Vincent Dixie for Tennessee
---
Vincent Dixie for Tennessee73 White Bridge RoadSte 103-328Nashville, TN 37205United States

_That’s why he’s wasting HIS time and OUR taxpayer dollars to go after public broadcasting!_

[**Team, we still need 100 signatures from your state to reach conclusive data: Will you add your name to STAND WITH PUBLIC BROADCASTING? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pb/?source=VPP_20250903_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21098%2E878179%2Ebh-382) | [25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: STAND WITH PUBLIC BROADCASTING »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pb/?source=VPP_20250903_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21098%2E878179%2Ebh-382)

_The Voter Protection Project_

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21098%2E878179%2Ebh-382). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21098%2E878179%2Ebh-382).**

| Peter,

This summer on the campaign trail has been filled with high energy and meaningful moments.

I had the chance to join Indivisible Bethlehem’s picnic, spend time at the West End Fair and meet with the Monroe County Democrats, and speak at the Northampton County Democrats’ picnic. Each of these events reminded me why I’m running for Congress in the first place.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114554688/567396944/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-09-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGE3NjZkMTYtMDY4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mzXbcyhHa2xSXpJZ3uocq-xE2oJhxwbxjdF4MRXIPQg=)
| [JOIN OUR CAMPAIGN ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114554689/567396945/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-09-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGE3NjZkMTYtMDY4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mzXbcyhHa2xSXpJZ3uocq-xE2oJhxwbxjdF4MRXIPQg=)
---
Through all these conversations, it was easy to find the common thread: _**people are tired of the politics that put billionaires and special interests first.**_ They want leaders who will focus on bringing prices down, strengthening the middle class, protecting freedoms, and delivering real results for working families.

Every handshake, conversation, and hug on the trail fuels me to keep going. This isn’t just about winning an election. It’s about building a stronger, fairer future here in Pennsylvania’s 7th District. And I’m so grateful to have you with me on this journey.

[_**We’re building a strong foundation of support, but we need to keep pushing forward. _**NEW IN CALIFORNIA**_
**"Top Democrat on Oversight Committee demands Trump Administration account for wildland firefighter vacancies"**
_—Reported by Hey Socal_
As Californians, we know the devastation wildfires can bring. Families forced to evacuate, homes reduced to ash, and lives uprooted in an instant. Our firefighters are heroes — they put their lives on the line to protect us.
**_But Donald Trump has made their job even harder — and more dangerous._**
Through reckless staffing decisions, layoffs, forced retirements, and vacancies, the Trump Administration has gutted the U.S. Forest Service’s firefighting capacity. At the very moment we need every available firefighter, Trump’s mismanagement has left our communities defenseless.
Let me be clear: this isn’t just incompetence. It’s negligence. Trump put politics and bureaucracy ahead of people’s lives. And we are paying the price.
**_If we don’t hold him accountable, he will keep putting American lives in danger._**
**[That’s where you come in. Every grassroots contribution helps us push back against Trump’s recklessness, demand accountability, and fight for the resources our firefighters need to do their jobs. name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Campaign Trail Update from Sen. Graham
body:
Fellow American, I’ve spent August crisscrossing South Carolina, meeting with South Carolinians across our state and listening to what issues are impacting them the most. But, Fellow American, while I’ve been on the road, the loony Left has shown up to PROTEST many of these events. |
---
**CAMPAIGN TRAIL
OFFICIAL UPDATE**
Fellow American,

I've spent August crisscrossing South Carolina, meeting with South Carolinians across our state and listening to what issues are impacting them the most.

We've discussed how the One Big, Beautiful Bill Act is directly helping working families by putting more money in their pockets, how President Trump and I are fighting for peace through strength abroad, and how we are making our country safer while cracking down on crime and illegal immigration.

**But, Fellow American, while I've been on the road, the loony Left has shown up to _PROTEST_ many of these events.**

**_Let me be clear:_** if winning for the American people drives the Left crazy enough to scream, whine, and protest at my events...then **I'll keep driving them nuts!**

Fellow American, it's never been clearer that the Democrat party and their loud, radical activists aren't a good fit for America. **The American people don't want complainers — they want hard workers who will fight for them at every turn.** **That's exactly what I'm doing and why I'm running for U.S. Senate, Fellow American.**

**[Will you please join my team today by chipping in any amount to continue fueling our grassroots movement and ensure our America First, Trump–endorsed message is heard loud and clear by every South Carolinian?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ecdaab1ccc784736866d83b9e0031e2e&_e=a5vFiJT5YpJ2h4F20nOmewsKcd8PzyVaov0F0fOTFixPcjqf7nyo-qFLmz5YLmS_2Ri2jKOG7RrlsumJcA1VPyegr4u4p-CuQGVOUAHEqNpq9ggAl26-w2lLtSuiKbcRw66ALuc3rH6FXxJu9Z1gp0HFGHmFbBmXu9FiszF_Z_4v3df2RMH0q50ZpKN66PjWX-2MUQ_hFie4Mxd7h6YttDKNrDwMVPeL99UGxFPBoUSrZZwIOGGhH7Up_wgLcO_VnhUaWqyHMZFuv85iwoRa56keV51f5kVtXrJtivIO39OtcUoygG4Qr4v0Fezxj2BOcZr5G8JTYJoo_R-h5vv4dNRN19FetWO7PecRKJOGJOUyY9JSgWE3-NlCh0HWdPRCyOEdtS9r3jvhUC-A6NSk7eqfsEjYDEkifIuvUth_Yd1uz62FGUuC_cZ1fxw74bb-IztEveY0YxXaMWn-Blcnj8RhbhLNgsmV1tXCXt_k3QMvTNG43GCWpu2WmwBc0_HkczoVf098Rp7OqlN8KD3xgG7Q43tLFIVSzH8FjQaT-ojhHII36WmGY2vabNu_hiB5ZLjPwq8RfC--RTNWzgoJOA2HQZdkv_uSDF_rpQiTUOW8j1MAY7ZF2z5R-bZpMMAU1YnyJelEEUW-IbURTZQYjJpVnNKVptV6-7sJXcMsB1HnctafpP92D395vIcrL_530LQR88ZzqCBhgn2tEJpw6At9n1e-1WTACB2xtZlTMjU%3D)**

In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

clean_body: Fellow American, I’ve spent August crisscrossing South Carolina, meeting with South Carolinians across our state and listening to what issues are impacting them the most. But, Fellow American, while I’ve been on the road, the loony Left has shown up to PROTEST many of these events. | CAMPAIGN TRAIL OFFICIAL UPDATE Fellow American, I've spent August crisscrossing South Carolina, meeting with South Carolinians across our state and listening to what issues are impacting them the most. We've discussed how the One Big, Beautiful Bill Act is directly helping working families by putting more money in their pockets, how President Trump and I are fighting for peace through strength abroad, and how we are making our country safer while cracking down on crime and illegal immigration. But, Fellow American, while I've been on the road, the loony Left has shown up to PROTEST many of these events. Let me be clear: if winning for the American people drives the Left crazy enough to scream, whine, and protest at my events...then I'll keep driving them nuts! Fellow American, it's never been clearer that the Democrat party and their loud, radical activists aren't a good fit for America. The American people don't want complainers — they want hard workers who will fight for them at every turn. That's exactly what I'm doing and why I'm running for U.S. Senate, Fellow American. | Thank you for your support, Lindsey Graham Republican, Trump -Endorsed U.S. Senator In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

| | We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, **making it easier for voters to participate in our elections**. Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail.Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure, mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. **Mail-in voting has been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic.** There's no good faith reason to get rid of it. **[Opponents of voting rights have proven they'll go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and make sure that they stay in power. Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. clean_body: @JeffMerkley: Why does Trump want to ban Vote by Mail? Because it blocks Election Day interference: closing polling places, long lines, voter suppression. Vote by Mail is the best tool we have to put power where it belongs—in the hands of the people. I'll fight like hell to protect it.| | | | | This is the whole ball game, Team: = This is the whole reason behind President Donald Trump's massive anti-voting executive order. After every election in which he's been a candidate or in power, Trump has raged over the use of mail-in ballots in general and ballot deadlines in particular . He's tried to claim fraud for every single ballot counted after Election Day. It's worth noting that Trump himself has used mail-in ballots to vote , most recently in an election in his now-home state of Florida.This isn't about safety or security. It's a blatantly partisan exercise to suppress the vote and make it harder for you to have your voice heard in our elections. It's about their anti-democratic authoritarian desires and need for total control. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | | We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, making it easier for voters to participate in our elections. Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail.Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure, mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. Mail-in voting has been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic. There's no good faith reason to get rid of it. = | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s manipulation, and they know exactly what they’re doing. If we sit back and play defense, we lose. Period. name: Scott Colom
subject: It’s official, I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I’m stepping up for Mississippi, not because it’s easy, but because too much is on the line to sit on the sidelines.
I’ve got an important announcement to share with you, Peter.
My name is Scott Colom, and I’m a seventh-generation Mississippian running for U.S. Senate because I can no longer sit on the sidelines while our leaders put profits over the people they are supposed to serve.
I’ve spent my career keeping our communities safe, holding the powerful accountable, and delivering justice — and now, I’m ready to take that same fight to Washington to lower costs, save our hospitals, and bring good jobs back home.
**[If you understand what’s at stake in this race, will you split a donation of $10 or more between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to become a Founding Donor to this campaign and help move Mississippi forward?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94412?refcode=em20250903-9369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9369%2E614464%2EA2s_5l)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94412?refcode=em20250903-9369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9369%2E614464%2EA2s_5l)**
Peter, we’re at a pivotal moment in this country where the cost of everyday goods is climbing, hospitals are closing, and working families are being left behind by the very leaders who claim to have our backs.
So we must ask ourselves: _Will we allow them to keep putting profits over people? Or are we going to rise to the occasion and create a future that we all deserve?_
For years, I’ve worked to mitigate violent crime in Mississippi, but I’ve also seen firsthand how investing in the community can turn things around.
This campaign is about doing just that: Investing in our communities. That means fighting for working families — making sure no child goes hungry, no parent has to travel hours for care because too many hospitals have shut down, and every Mississippian has a real chance at bettering their lives.
But it won’t be easy. We’re up against a well-funded incumbent who’s been ranked the least effective Senator in Congress, and has no problem putting billionaires before Mississippi families.
With deep pockets and powerful allies, my opponent will spend whatever it takes to win. But my team has a clear path to win this race.
**Our strategy relies on your help. And if we’re going to build the most competitive campaign possible, we need to make a big push now, from the start.**
**Please.**
**[Can I count on you to become a founding donor of this campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today? It’s not the amount that matters as the donation itself – when we all come together, it’ll make a big difference.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94412?refcode=em20250903-9369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9369%2E614464%2EA2s_5l)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Scott Colom and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94413?refcode=em20250903-9369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=9369%2E614464%2EA2s_5l) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94413?refcode=em20250903-9369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=9369%2E614464%2EA2s_5l) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94413?refcode=em20250903-9369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9369%2E614464%2EA2s_5l) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94413?refcode=em20250903-9369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9369%2E614464%2EA2s_5l) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94413?refcode=em20250903-9369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9369%2E614464%2EA2s_5l) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94413?refcode=em20250903-9369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9369%2E614464%2EA2s_5l) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94412?refcode=em20250903-9369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9369%2E614464%2EA2s_5l)

Thank you for joining this fight,
Scott Colom
Candidate for U.S. Senate
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94412?refcode=em20250903-9369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9369%2E614464%2EA2s_5l)

body:
This is getting out of control.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114555812/567401285/1328794144?refcode=ea.04754582-0a89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.04754582-0a89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0NzU0NTgyLTBhODktZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zGGq79KCZowSS518w6rPH8vlHew3eN9r_sXJpBpIH_w=&emci=01754582-0a89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=04754582-0a89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)
---
Remember when Trump abused his emergency powers to roll back climate protections and force failing coal plants to stay open? 👇 [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114555813/567401286/2105508926?refcode=ea.04754582-0a89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.04754582-0a89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0NzU0NTgyLTBhODktZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zGGq79KCZowSS518w6rPH8vlHew3eN9r_sXJpBpIH_w=) **A new report just revealed that Donald Trump’s toxic coal agenda could cost Americans nearly $6 billion in higher energy bills every year by the end of his term.** Our children deserve to grow up in a world with clean skies, safe water, and a future full of possibilities. That’s why the team here at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is working around the clock to elect climate champions who will make that vision a reality. And with your support, we’ve already elected more than 170 climate champions — to city councils, utility boards, and even Congress — leaders who are challenging the status quo and delivering bold solutions that protect families from higher bills and dirtier air. **[But we can’t do this work alone. This movement runs on people like you who understand the stakes and step up when it matters most. So what do you say? Can we count on your donation today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114555814/567401287/2105508926?refcode=ea.04754582-0a89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.04754582-0a89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0NzU0NTgyLTBhODktZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zGGq79KCZowSS518w6rPH8vlHew3eN9r_sXJpBpIH_w=)** | [**DONATE →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114555815/567401288/2105508926?refcode=ea.04754582-0a89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.04754582-0a89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0NzU0NTgyLTBhODktZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zGGq79KCZowSS518w6rPH8vlHew3eN9r_sXJpBpIH_w=)
---
The price of Trump’s push to keep these dirty, aging coal plants from closing down is staggering.
Texas and Colorado could each be saddled with more than **$170 million** in annual costs. California alone faces **$389 million**. These are states ready to replace outdated plants with cheaper, cleaner energy — but Trump is forcing families to subsidize polluters instead.
And higher bills are just the beginning. Coal is one of the biggest drivers of climate change. It releases more carbon dioxide than any other fuel, poisons our air and water, and puts low-income and working-class communities at greater risk of asthma, heart disease, and cancer.
**That means families will not only pay more each month but also bear the health costs of pollution. This is the reality of Trump’s America.**
**[We need to roll up our sleeves and fight back _now_. In just 62 days, critical elections in Virginia, New Jersey, and beyond will decide whether we elect climate leaders who will stand up to Trump and his toxic coal agenda — or a bandwagon of yes-men who bow to his agenda. This is it. Our candidates need you in this final stretch. Can we count on you to chip in today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114555816/567401289/2105508926?refcode=ea.04754582-0a89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.04754582-0a89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0NzU0NTgyLTBhODktZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zGGq79KCZowSS518w6rPH8vlHew3eN9r_sXJpBpIH_w=)**

clean_body: This is getting out of control. | Remember when Trump abused his emergency powers to roll back climate protections and force failing coal plants to stay open? 👇 = A new report just revealed that Donald Trump’s toxic coal agenda could cost Americans nearly $6 billion in higher energy bills every year by the end of his term. Our children deserve to grow up in a world with clean skies, safe water, and a future full of possibilities. That’s why the team here at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is working around the clock to elect climate champions who will make that vision a reality. And with your support, we’ve already elected more than 170 climate champions — to city councils, utility boards, and even Congress — leaders who are challenging the status quo and delivering bold solutions that protect families from higher bills and dirtier air. = | = The price of Trump’s push to keep these dirty, aging coal plants from closing down is staggering. Texas and Colorado could each be saddled with more than $170 million in annual costs. California alone faces $389 million. These are states ready to replace outdated plants with cheaper, cleaner energy — but Trump is forcing families to subsidize polluters instead. And higher bills are just the beginning. Coal is one of the biggest drivers of climate change. It releases more carbon dioxide than any other fuel, poisons our air and water, and puts low-income and working-class communities at greater risk of asthma, heart disease, and cancer. That means families will not only pay more each month but also bear the health costs of pollution. This is the reality of Trump’s America. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Your support at this moment is more powerful than you might realize. body:
It’s a bold step, but we can’t be timid right now. |
#
---
Hello, it's Mikie Sherrill. I just met with my senior team, and at the end of the meeting, I made a big decision: _**I told my team to place a massive new ad buy across New Jersey — earlier than we originally planned for.**_ I’m going to explain why we took this step, but if you support our decision to be bigger and bolder in our fight to defeat MAGA extremism here in New Jersey, **[I hope you’ll split a few dollars between my team and Fight Like Hell PAC to help close our budget gap and fund this new ad buy →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114555936/567401699/1899267694?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGYyNjcyMWUtMGI4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dhzqXQiAzKitMxFC_tVlIYSCVwTDYMcgW3p1ngxGQPY=)** | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114555937/567401700/1899267694?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGYyNjcyMWUtMGI4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dhzqXQiAzKitMxFC_tVlIYSCVwTDYMcgW3p1ngxGQPY=)

Here’s why we made this choice:
Jack Ciattarelli just made a massive investment in his own TV ads. $2,000,000 to be exact – and you can bet he’ll spend every dollar he can attacking me.
But we also know that when voters learn the truth about who I am, what I stand for, and how my vision for New Jersey differs from Ciattarelli’s, I earn their support.
**And we know that, with the polls this tight and the stakes so incredibly high, we can’t afford to let Ciattarelli’s attacks go unanswered. Now is the time for us to think big and fight back.**
This is how we do it, folks. We’re going to get our message out everywhere. We’re going to make sure every voter knows the truth. And we’re going to do every damn thing within our power to win this fight for New Jersey’s future — and stop a MAGA lackey who takes marching orders from Trump from becoming our next governor.
**[To be candid with you, I made this choice because I believe that our grassroots team will come through the way you always have and help us power this campaign to victory. To close our budget gap and fund this big ad buy, we’ve set a goal of 100 online donations before midnight tonight. If you could step up and split a contribution between my campaign and Fight Like Hell PAC, I would be incredibly grateful.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114555938/567401701/1899267694?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGYyNjcyMWUtMGI4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dhzqXQiAzKitMxFC_tVlIYSCVwTDYMcgW3p1ngxGQPY=)**

clean_body: It’s a bold step, but we can’t be timid right now. | Hello, it's Mikie Sherrill. I just met with my senior team, and at the end of the meeting, I made a big decision: I told my team to place a massive new ad buy across New Jersey — earlier than we originally planned for. I’m going to explain why we took this step, but if you support our decision to be bigger and bolder in our fight to defeat MAGA extremism here in New Jersey, = | | = Here’s why we made this choice: Jack Ciattarelli just made a massive investment in his own TV ads. $2,000,000 to be exact – and you can bet he’ll spend every dollar he can attacking me. But we also know that when voters learn the truth about who I am, what I stand for, and how my vision for New Jersey differs from Ciattarelli’s, I earn their support. And we know that, with the polls this tight and the stakes so incredibly high, we can’t afford to let Ciattarelli’s attacks go unanswered. Now is the time for us to think big and fight back. This is how we do it, folks. We’re going to get our message out everywhere. We’re going to make sure every voter knows the truth. And we’re going to do every damn thing within our power to win this fight for New Jersey’s future — and stop a MAGA lackey who takes marching orders from Trump from becoming our next governor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mikie Sherrill and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you so much for your support. name: Republican Voter Services
subject: Is dpwillis67@gmail.com a Democrat?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2074dl2x818vn6jv9dokpahtaed9exc2p3e0gkw1al894m2yrl8krbbmjms3ykgvuc9ce4wujhbq9hx4l1m&__stmp=t2175c&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2175c&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3m4vvbofqogfksg33d32gvhqah9375z16uq4gmab45qgfc3mfw0k8ouyqwzwrvug37lrgbleii54ivt44j1e4nugey02fhkp3yezmxp1w398n9vq6las7eoxt5dpkmvc2fs8rgpy5o&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2175c&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2175c&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2175c&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2175c&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3m4vvbofqogfksg33d32gvhqah9375z16uq4gmab45qgfc3mfw0k8ouyqwzwrvug37lrgbleii54ivt44j1e4nugey02fhkp3yezmxp1w398n9vq6las7eoxt5dpkmvc2fs8rgpy5o&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2175c&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2175c&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That’s why I’m reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=8f5a6312f2ba482f915f51d974b2c688&_e=gMtzcb3--X_cnLDMlYXwECO9Ts8Iooczy6PEhUCW2-_0h70nPT9W_fDmcJpvNfUTDF6vIOpL3yekKTLYrhM_UPE0OWDiPYICXECUJIdwR7yEdSkljW35d3cu8tVSkJ6GXEiTc5_TIMA6_cnMauEViS6btxB0RTuhy8_O2liQJqPPNxZq4OPDwe46xQA1h05vb1RE-zmu8qs1mw3I4ctmY6tnwrEVfkrnpA0OzyLTGCcK0OcrCo-92R7xqsg5wF0tixRCZjNSljfZloesxzUdxTbEexJUQ6prwCurLch1CTrKm6Byuqg-ICqSBIRt4yNOMqeu7Dc7PrYafHiqk81Lql0qMUgfIIlp4xxe-3Njea-LLmHbqFOp42GRc-HIe7zs6EGc1m5HT7WiQ-ZxqG89IVgrOCb4TYQZtssh-lMcdJOtzXORCuorpxjJjLp7_8CiDZBWe9nv_4iBYIwQwRjM7vLc1zfHao3tQFNpdEYHHYBkOnR3sRAttQN6Zp5WMukRYHZQfDfzdJSqOW23DDmtQMcUDIp6pExt5gfdOqkuS2XB-IcyKrZOt9nNQnP-48XMQFXloTC6UTzy4W2yedcrqyd73H6eC_6O-CcvkCKZ7fTuBQu21jCrhUJRao-0MEyKTQbcJV1oUptMMwAEanJ5m0Sc_fh6bFsMTC-rns-eomn70AfXOhkAvBcNNhn7BOH3a2MNdK2K4vjNUZKWJZAcVQ%3D%3D)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.[LEND A HAND

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I know this team is not intimidated by hard work
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
We have to make each day left in this campaign count.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250903_1_spanberger?refcode=em20250903-4209&refcode2=4209_400544_rMt6GE&akid=4209%2E400544%2ErMt6GE)
Team, we have just two months to go until Election Day!
I'm the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's seat blue, and we're in the homestretch now. **[Before I lay out all we're doing to win the biggest race of 2025, will you consider splitting a contribution between my campaign and Deb Haaland to power our work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250903_1_spanberger?refcode=em20250903-4209&refcode2=4209_400544_rMt6GE&akid=4209%2E400544%2ErMt6GE)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250903_1_spanberger?amount=5&refcode=em20250903-4209&refcode2=4209_400544_rMt6GE&akid=4209%2E400544%2ErMt6GE)**
Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face.
And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources.
My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." _We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here._
I've given voters my word: **As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington.**
We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward.
That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills.
With the days left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to:
✅ Visit every corner of Virginia.
✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks.
✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen.
It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond.
[**Everything depends on us raising what we need from grassroots donors. So, I'm asking: will you pitch in $5 or more to my campaign and Deb Haaland to help us win on November 4th and in the years ahead?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250903_1_spanberger?amount=5&refcode=em20250903-4209&refcode2=4209_400544_rMt6GE&akid=4209%2E400544%2ErMt6GE)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250903_1_spanberger?amount=5&refcode=em20250903-4209&refcode2=4209_400544_rMt6GE&akid=4209%2E400544%2ErMt6GE)**
I'm grateful to have you on my team,
Abigail Spanberger
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=1&akid=4209%2E400544%2ErMt6GE)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=2&akid=4209%2E400544%2ErMt6GE)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

President Donald Trump **[fired back at a Polish reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/614410e0-29ab-4b1d-9550-2c81c981a45e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who claimed he had taken "no action" against Russia since taking office, telling the journalist "you ought to get yourself a new job," during a bilateral meeting with Polish President Karol Nawrocki, Wednesday.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/614410e0-29ab-4b1d-9550-2c81c981a45e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/614410e0-29ab-4b1d-9550-2c81c981a45e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Trump 's Comeback:** Trump defended his Russia policy by citing secondary sanctions imposed on India, Russia's largest oil purchaser outside of China, which he claimed cost Russia "hundreds of billions of dollars" and warned he hadn't implemented "phase two yet or phase three."
* **Criticism of World Leaders:** The exchange occurred after Trump accused Putin, Chinese President Xi Jinping, and North Korean leader Kim Jong Un of "conspiring" against the U.S. during their meetings at China's military parade commemorating Japan's WWII surrender.

* * *
**[Together with Goldco](https://substack.com/redirect/ad1f1ca4-d12b-4806-b6e0-13d758a26088?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

1. **Banking Security and Privacy Under Siege**

_" OpenAI CEO Sam Altman Warns Bankers, Regulators of Coming Fraud 'Crisis' \- Barron's_
_**So what can you do to protect your money and your way of life?**_

With supply still lagging and global demand for precious metals rising, gold and silver are once again being seen as potential safe havens.

body:
Ben will always be my “why." [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114556756/567404723/1248415534?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.03_Disability-Champions_B1_F1_S1_C1_IA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDhmNTJlZS0wZjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ur1NsLTUAYRDIZtDcyA8Q61M6vZ_c7Uoj11Ilrxpszk=) Ben is my 37-year-old son who was born with cerebral palsy. I got my start in public service as an advocate, helping to ensure that children like Ben would be fully included in their communities and have the same opportunities that all parents want for their children.

Now, with extremists like Donald Trump and Robert F. Kennedy Jr. attacking key rights and protections for the disability community, that mission has become more important than ever.

**That’s why I’ve taken on RFK Jr. for his radical conspiracy theories, his anti-vaccine platform, and his blatant attacks on Americans who live with disabilities. And I’ve stood up to Trump’s efforts to slash Medicaid and government services that the disability community relies on.**

Today, more than 70 million Americans report that they are living with a disability. It’s clear: We need leaders in the U.S. House and Senate who will fiercely advocate for disabled folks to have the access to the health care, caretakers, jobs, and _lives_ that they deserve.

[**_So I’m personally asking: Will you please chip in $5 or more to elect a wave of disability champions to Congress in 2026 who will stand up to Trump and RFK Jr.’s attacks?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114556757/567404724/1248415534?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.03_Disability-Champions_B1_F1_S1_C1_IA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDhmNTJlZS0wZjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ur1NsLTUAYRDIZtDcyA8Q61M6vZ_c7Uoj11Ilrxpszk=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114556758/567404725/1248415534?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.03_Disability-Champions_B1_F1_S1_C1_IA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDhmNTJlZS0wZjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ur1NsLTUAYRDIZtDcyA8Q61M6vZ_c7Uoj11Ilrxpszk=)

Today's show is sponsored by:
**Beam**
Are you tossing and turning at night and running on fumes during the day? If so, then you are missing out on the most important part of your wellness, sleep. If you want to wake up refreshed, inspired and ready to take on the day then you have to try Beam's Dream powder. This best-selling blend of Reishi, Magnesium, L-Theanine, Apigenin and Melatonin will help you fall asleep, stay asleep, and wake up refreshed. So if you're ready for the best night of sleep you ever had just head to https://shopbeam.com/SPICER to receive 40% off your order.
**Firecracker Farms**
Everything's better with HOT SALT. Firecracker Farms hot salt is hand crafted on their family farm with Carolina Reaper, Ghost and Trinidad Scorpion peppers. This is a balanced, deep flavor pairs perfect with your favorite foods. Whether it's eggs, steaks, veggies or even your favorite beverage, Firecracker Farms hot salt is what you've been missing. Just head to https://firecracker.farm/ use code word: SEAN for a discount. Unlock the flavor in your food now! Concerned Women For America Concerned Women For America focuses on seven core issues: family, sanctity of life, religious liberty, parental choice in education, fighting sexual exploitation, national sovereignty, and support for Israel. CWA knows what a woman is. CWA trains women to become grassroots leaders, speak into the culture, pray, testify, and lobby. If you donate $20 you will get CEO & President Penny Nance's new book A Woman's Guide, Seven Rules for Success in Business and Life. Head to https://concernedwomen.org/spicer/to donate today! President Trump squashed the propagandist media once and for all about him being dead or unhealthy with an epic press conference on the oval office. Jessica Millan Patterson is taking the fight to Gavin Newsom and his gerrymandering effort in California. The California Citizens Redistricting Commission set the Congressional districts in 2021. Redistricting in California is nothing more than a power grab and as the Chair of Stop Prop 50, Jessica is ready to stop Newsom in his tracks. As Virginia schools struggles with transgenders and bathrooms, Ian Prior is here to fill us in on all the legal matters, including cases taken to the Supreme Court. Will we finally get a definitive answer on Title IX? RFK Jr. is tackling SSRIs as another trans-identifiying shooter tragically shot and injured 21 people at Annunciation Catholic school in Minnesota. Two children, Fletcher Merkel and Harper Myoski lost their lives. Penny Nance and Concerned Women for America are calling for the experts to identify how SSRI's and gender-affirming drugs may play a role in these tragic incidents.
Featuring:
**Jessica Millan Patterson**
Chairwomen | Stop Prop 50
https://stop50.org/
**Ian Prior**
Senior Advisor | America First Legal
https://aflegal.org/
**Penny Nance**
CEO | CWA
https://concernedwomen.org/

name: David Hogg
subject: We need to reset
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
There’s no way around it.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250903-1&t=1&akid=2617%2E587540%2Ec0ZPop)
Peter,
I know a lot of groups are asking you for money right now, even at a time when it seems like the Democratic Party is failing to win or deliver. I know it can be frustrating if you’re chipping in, but you aren’t seeing the results you want to see.
**Here’s what’s different about Leaders We Deserve:** We are recruiting a brand new wave of young leaders to come in and fight the worst of Trump’s agenda AND show the positive, youthful, and modern direction we want for the party’s future.
Think of it this way, Peter — **_this is our chance to reset the Democratic Party._**
But there’s no way around it. We cannot do this work without grassroots support.
Unlike the other side, we don’t have a legion of corporatist billionaires ready to finance our efforts. There is no one waiting in the wings with a $5 million check.
Instead, we’re building this movement with _$5, $10, and $25_ at a time. (Some folks may give more when they’re able — and at the end of the day, it all really adds up.)
That’s why I’m writing to you today, Peter. We need people like you — people who understand that the Democratic Party needs a reset — to join us in the fight.
**[Will you contribute $5 right now to help us reset the Democratic Party?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250903_1_reset?refcode=em20250903-2617&amount=5&refcode2=2617_587540_c0ZPop&akid=2617%2E587540%2Ec0ZPop)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250903_1_reset?amount=5&refcode=em20250903-2617&refcode2=2617_587540_c0ZPop&akid=2617%2E587540%2Ec0ZPop)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250903-1&t=2&refcode2=2617_587540_c0ZPop&akid=2617%2E587540%2Ec0ZPop)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2617%2E587540%2Ec0ZPop)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2617%2E587540%2Ec0ZPop)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Reflecting on Labor Day
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Hi there! I hope you and your loved ones had a great Labor Day. I enjoyed spending the day at the annual Labor Day parade in Downtown Toledo; maybe I saw some of you there!

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250903_mk_LaborDay2_img [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250903_mk_LaborDay2_img]

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250903_mk_LaborDay2_img2 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250903_mk_LaborDay2_img2]

Labor Day is one of our most important holidays, earned by those before us. I'm the daughter of a proud union family; my father worked at Toledo Jeep, and my mother helped organize the first union at Champion Spark Plug. We thank all those in unions who have fought for better working standards, pay, and safety - each of us is indebted to them for their sacrifices and work.

From my very first day in Congress, standing up for working people has been my priority. Ohio's workers make the things that make America, and I'll never stop fighting for you.

Chip in [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250903_mk_LaborDay2_b1]Onward,

— Marcy
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=251a3a9b-1189-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=251a3a9b-1189-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413]
Follow Marcy
https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur [https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur] https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress]
Checks may also be mailed to:
Kaptur for Congress - PO Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697 Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tcAb-PaXtEayL-mWUU_QGw2?unsubscribedata=M%2BqlAcGEgZW96m%2B07%2BS4MUbnaAK6PFwqfa7AMU73pvhaZetevfHBiRUVBrs2Z3pxuSal4HM9DqyeP%2BXuo4SljZeZ78to32%2FHERAOF6kA4Yjqfao1qkESvjbnCdcb7MNsl2KXr%2FkxDb356DhX3RQZUQWVEG0Lo36VN%2FivYLIsHb%2Bt%2F6vKifIATSDtDdAdhVxbVI9F41GTrx8WdvKZzGT90NxpCVVFOH1WbvCs6%2BHXOB0ZU88sD5hQBHPXyT2ClH8Oh8eFcenSWIwHJ1to9z7ZO1fyj%2BNPb1NOm%2BGS4NNXBJc19dcaPoUCyLijp%2FKEg%2BDuSJDhSq6oyJzb9p7%2FeTajJbopibnny9Uoh%2Fht0lWQEPbB8hMuxzDNb8PqHxT46c9ESA0BgGPIAuztgLnG3UBdhxnLB91qPsrfH%2BC8qxvAqrY%3D] . Kaptur for Congress
PO Box 899
Toledo, OH 43697

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Last semester’s already repeating itself...
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | | [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/c4325e385a5440c7b3e96073380178c8-d61b410af2454cfd902f595765648344/63)
---
Friend,
---
Let me tell you what our students are really up against... Because a new semester just started, and it’s already clear: _The Left is back to their unhinged ways._ Just in the first week of school, at Arizona State Poly, one of our student activists was approached by an angry leftist yelling about how much he hates me and Turning Point USA. **Then, this lunatic dumped coffee all over our activist’s table, wagon, and iPad — swiping materials off the table before he left:**
---
---
No conversation. No debate. _Just hate._ But Friend, this latest incident is just a glimpse of what our student leaders face on campus every day. And sadly, it’s nothing new... In fact, it’s becoming a pattern that’s only getting worse. **Let me remind you of what happened just last spring — as the American Comeback Tour was building steam across the country:** 🚨 In March, at the University of Texas at Dallas — our brave chapter president was standing at a table, peacefully speaking with students... When a trans-identifying Leftist stormed up and SLAMMED a metal bike lock into her head — _hard enough to shatter her phone._ **In her words:****_“I think he wanted to KILL me.”_** 🚨 At UC Davis, Antifa mobs descended like vultures — **_stealing iPads and laptops, ripping signs, and shoving students_** at a “Prove Me Wrong” tabling event with Brandon Tatum. 🚨 In Pennsylvania, one of our student leaders was tabling ahead of their event featuring detransitioner Chloe Cole... When a crazed leftist _spit in his face_ — and then **_punched him repeatedly_** in the head. Thankfully, the police quickly arrested the attacker. 🚨 And then there was Seattle... Where Antifa threw **_literal human feces_** at our student check-in table for an event with Riley Gaines. They stalked attendees — even elderly couples — to their cars... screaming horrific obscenities and saying things like: _“You’d look great swinging from a tree” and_ _“kill yourself.”_
---
---
_Above Left: The trans attacker who swung a bike lock at a Turning Point USA chapter president. Above Right: Antifa mobs hauling off our tents and signs after attacking a tabling event at UC Davis._
---
Friend, what the Left is doing isn’t protest. It’s not politics... It’s disgusting. And it’s deranged. **And it’s exactly why I promise to never let our students fend for themselves.** Because they’re doing the hardest thing there is... They’re standing up for truth. For freedom. For America.
On hostile campuses, surrounded by angry mobs, and risking everything. **These are the young patriots who are okay with being “less popular" on campus... who risk their reputations, grades, and future job offers — just to stand for this country.** Every single day, our student activists show up, speak out, face lunatics and mobs... _and refuse to quit._ They are truly the vanguard for saving this nation... But they cannot fight _alone._ **Friend, will you chip in now and join Turning Point USA to have these brave students’ backs?**
Your gift will help provide more activism materials, protect our student leaders, and expand our reach even further this fall to change more young hearts and minds.
---
[ **Send Backup to the Frontlines**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/c4325e385a5440c7b3e96073380178c8-d61b410af2454cfd902f595765648344/63)
---
These aren’t random acts of aggression... **This is the Left unraveling — because they’re LOSING.** Our campus tours are packed... High school and college students are rejecting “Wokeism” in record numbers... Gen Z is swinging hard towards conservatism... And the Left KNOWS it. They can’t compete in a debate. They can’t win on ideas. That’s why they lash out. So they scream. They threaten. They vandalize. They throw punches. They sling feces. _And Friend, I hate to say it, but it’s bound to get worse..._ The more ground we take, the more the Left will become unhinged. But here’s the good news... **They can’t stop us.** The Left tried violence. They tried threats. They tried mobs. And every single time — our students kept showing up.
They walked right back into the fight. Because that’s what courage looks like. Now, it’s our turn. [_**Friend, will you join Turning Point USA and make a generous gift right now to stand with these young patriots who refuse to quit?**_](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/c4325e385a5440c7b3e96073380178c8-d61b410af2454cfd902f595765648344/63)
---
[ **Send Backup to the Frontlines**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/c4325e385a5440c7b3e96073380178c8-d61b410af2454cfd902f595765648344/63)
---
Every dollar you give helps us protect our student leaders... defend free speech... fuel our reach... and sends a message the Left can’t ignore: **We’re not backing down. Not today.****_Not ever._** Our students are the tip of the spear in this culture war. But YOU are the reinforcements that keep them moving forward. **Friend, your support tells our brave young students who face mobs and threats:****_“You are not alone. We’ve got your back.”_** From the bottom of my heart — thank you for standing with them. Together, with students and patriots like you, we’re turning the tide.
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/c4325e385a5440c7b3e96073380178c8-d61b410af2454cfd902f595765648344/63)
---
**P.S.** Last spring, our students were assaulted with bike locks, spit on, punched in the face, stalked by Antifa, and even had feces thrown at them. And yet... they refused to quit. **Friend, this is more than politics — this is a battle for the soul of America.** And the young patriots on the frontlines? They’re STILL standing strong. _**[Let’s show them we’ve got their backs. Join Turning Point USA with your generous gift today.](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/c4325e385a5440c7b3e96073380178c8-d61b410af2454cfd902f595765648344/63)**_
---
[ **Send Backup to the Frontlines**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/c4325e385a5440c7b3e96073380178c8-d61b410af2454cfd902f595765648344/63)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

The more ground we take, the more the Left will become unhinged. But here’s the good news... They can’t stop us. The Left tried violence. They tried threats. They tried mobs. And every single time — our students kept showing up. They walked right back into the fight. Because that’s what courage looks like. Now, it’s our turn. Every dollar you give helps us protect our student leaders... defend free speech... fuel our reach... and sends a message the Left can’t ignore: We’re not backing down. Not today.Not ever. Our students are the tip of the spear in this culture war. But YOU are the reinforcements that keep them moving forward. Friend, your support tells our brave young students who face mobs and threats:“You are not alone. We’ve got your back.” From the bottom of my heart — thank you for standing with them. Together, with students and patriots like you, we’re turning the tide. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA P.S. Last spring, our students were assaulted with bike locks, spit on, punched in the face, stalked by Antifa, and even had feces thrown at them. And yet... they refused to quit. Friend, this is more than politics — this is a battle for the soul of America. And the young patriots on the frontlines? They’re STILL standing strong. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 DCDailyJournal.com This email was directed to dpwillis67@gmail.com only | Our Privacy Policy can be found by . 525-K East Market Street # 114 City: Leesburg State: Virginia Zip Code: 20176 © Copyright DCDailyJournal.com All Rights Reserved.

body:
I promise I’ll be quick.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114557668/567408100/1435897075?refcode=email_090325_notcool&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZThlYzUwNi0xMjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ts-QlrChriTYPDPriskndY7WVh9MMLpYecDwd6q39Ko=&emci=a9307f74-ee88-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=4e8ec506-1289-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715) Folks, can I explain something? I promise I’ll be quick. I was never “cool” growing up. I was the skinny kid with Coke-bottle glasses and a funny last name. After that, I was a geologist. Then I got laid off, and opened my own brewpub — Wynkoop Brewing Company — in downtown Denver. I play the banjo. And I like to make corny jokes (personally, I think they’re hilarious). [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114557670/567408102/-8077494?refcode=email_090325_notcool&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZThlYzUwNi0xMjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ts-QlrChriTYPDPriskndY7WVh9MMLpYecDwd6q39Ko=) So listen, I know I’m not your typical politician. I only ever wandered into politics because I was sick and tired of special interests taking advantage of everyday Americans — and I believed I could make a difference. That’s why we do things a little differently around here. Instead of relying on corporate PACs to fund our campaign, we’re depending on everyday folks like you to power everything we do. **I’ve always believed that politicians should be singularly accountable to the voters,_not special interests looking to buy our support._** **[So today, I’m reaching out to personally ask you to make a donation to help us defend Colorado and stop MAGA Republicans from flipping this seat red on Election Day.
