name: Working Families Party
subject: Amid the chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | **This year’s primary season has unfolded under a gathering storm, Peter.** The Trump administration and its allies are tearing at our democracy, battering our communities, and trying to leave fear in their wake. Families are being raided. Prices keep climbing while public programs are gutted. And around the world, violence and dispossession grind on, and everywhere we look, the sky feels heavy with unrest. Yet even in this storm, our fire burns bright. In _every_ corner of the country, working people are organizing, refusing despair, and daring to believe in something better. **And we’re _winning_.** This primary season, Working Families Party candidates have scored victories from red states to blue ones, sending a clear message: that working people want leaders who _actually_ fight for us. **Now, with fall arriving, the next chapter begins.**[**Chip in today to keep this momentum alive — and to help elect champions to local office this November and to Congress in 2026.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9hLau-elhjaxe4wVok39HtWoduLYLYu7g14sGNx_4QPZaXzDZKDZWVweSXMpfMcs_KskGtXklzL18qhoTF1UC-jcVyeOXcw8q7_-sk6t0y5LUPG98C2YyM10l9evJgUV698ut9cFkePMj4320OyOzcZ4wjKwPthYWVa9DprsKMULK-Ikbq9xCH7J1bFGbAkIS6n5qp-wKBZXCUpmF-UouQWImIvmE_Mb9uDs5ulROST4POIWWrmiNzSzNhonpi_ypk4H3FmCjPO5IBQfoIUowj4kADszJ2mDwVPdeVxiyxmiPLzhX1hcEyoRkFJ8QLkYir2hMVT_Fi_qMTxmoitDutw/4jl/Ps4Xo00KRWCok0-6i8WfHw/h0/h001.-zku4NvN4JGAUCX4wGeqmAhOJ60p3mRRDarj-h3AyA4) **[Donate](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9hLau-elhjaxe4wVok39HtWoduLYLYu7g14sGNx_4QPZaXzDZKDZWVweSXMpfMcs_hrOH9I_B-znX79qBX6XnWTCc7ycm4Q-XQIlokR8uGaFvYvAxezLhOAa2k4pGSesnyQzjIfOABZJ6EbGcfwTnaGQjPOTiDAEXFv-94qhoAbhKFg1NZJ-E_7_bEIwexEFkfq4pLjDM9i_KBl5ok4YiqhlzicQeLmM_wwecwyGBCKBvbJLek9mleNIsSDNRFzYtYBphDJ_jvjid6-G_QezCuBJ6GUC6DZhPCDvAI9GVmd51aBmUCjondyS2tS8xobKcb1j4d9a9WJR00cmtLzSDTQ/4jl/Ps4Xo00KRWCok0-6i8WfHw/h1/h001.DHTl_Ke9NPaOuxl4bvNm7m97ahwAB-i1Gi4UhKTXg0k)** One of our most high-profile victories? **Zohran Mamdani** , who won outright in the primary for New York City mayor, and heads into November with a chance to make history. But he wasn’t alone:
* In Arizona’s 7th Congressional District, we played a key role in propelling **Adelita Grijalva** to victory.
* In Seattle, WFP-backed mayoral candidate **Katie Wilson** led her primary and advanced to the November general election, while WFP candidate and challenger **Dionne Foster** finished 23 points ahead of the incumbent Speaker of the Seattle City Council.
* WFP also won mayoral primaries in three other cities in New York state: **Sean Ryan** in Buffalo, **Sharon Owens** in Syracuse, and **Dorcey Applyrs** in Albany.
* In New Jersey, WFP-backed insurgent candidate **Katie Brennan** won her Assembly primary against county-backed incumbents. **Carolyn Rush** , incumbent **Alixon Collazos Gill** , and **Chigozie Onyema** also secured wins.
* Detroit City Council candidate **Denzel McCampbell** edged out a sitting state representative with WFP’s support.
* WFP-endorsed **Selina Barajas** and **Miranda Schubert** doubled their opponents’ votes in Tucson City Council primaries.
* In Ohio, all five of the WFP’s endorsed candidates won their primaries: **Mounir Lynch** and **Dr. Antoinette Miranda** for the Columbus City School Board; **Ajmeri Hoque** for Franklin County Municipal Court; **Jesse Vogel** for Columbus City Council; and **Fran Wilson** for Akron City Council.
* WFP school board candidates also **won across Oregon** — even flipping a school board in rural Redmond, a district once thought out of reach.

And these are just some highlights. WFP candidates secured victories in many other states across the country as well, including special elections in **Texas** and **California** , and additional primaries in **Pennsylvania** , **Maryland** , and beyond. But these aren’t just election results, Peter. They are proof that even as storm clouds gather, working people are breaking through — block by block, council seat by council seat, community by community. **That’s what WFP exists to do: to fight back against despair by bringing together working people from every corner of the country to take on billionaires, extremists, and the politics of fear. To elect champions who will carry our fight from city hall to Congress in 2026.** And this primary season’s victories are just the beginning. This November, WFP-endorsed candidates will be on the ballot in communities across the country, part of the hundreds of candidates running this year to expand our movement and build toward even bigger wins in 2026. We’re knocking on doors where buses don’t run, showing up in school districts that are underfunded and overlooked, and casting ballots for leaders who don’t just promise change — they fight for it. **This is our chance to build on the victories we’ve won and push even further. Every contribution strengthens our movement and brings us closer to a government that works for all of us.** [**Will you join us? Make a contribution today — of whatever size feels right — to help WFP fight back, lift up working families, and carry this wave of hope into November and beyond.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9hLau-elhjaxe4wVok39HtWoduLYLYu7g14sGNx_4QPZaXzDZKDZWVweSXMpfMcs_a9Qh46e5-r_cYJsUqQ55vIVmcPCZ3efy9b1AC95OWcaBFkX2Ccnm-yxgLtdcP0IdLUD29MilSKKInTA_xAZ0cmXAEe7aWGO-Z09r0FHaVByg66Jn-bnI6MdqTtXbtDVMgZNI7gx7k0JlpwLsHBOid0XyLUVej4a6R2hU6IdGdvWnzHQe4pYxdIrQg84Hp_BwMsPOufkiy0OrmYQwUrtXwxBiHoZZMalqrh99Zo1tHS0S6XCId9VIOTq9zSUAIEjUU3G-F29j3r_Pzl6cAYO6fQ/4jl/Ps4Xo00KRWCok0-6i8WfHw/h2/h001.-gts-YEDCR3yvFVBnSNuoQ5kMuMM7bj4q4jFFo7tPiM) clean_body: | | | This year’s primary season has unfolded under a gathering storm, Peter. The Trump administration and its allies are tearing at our democracy, battering our communities, and trying to leave fear in their wake. Families are being raided. Prices keep climbing while public programs are gutted. And around the world, violence and dispossession grind on, and everywhere we look, the sky feels heavy with unrest. Yet even in this storm, our fire burns bright. In every corner of the country, working people are organizing, refusing despair, and daring to believe in something better. And we’re winning. This primary season, Working Families Party candidates have scored victories from red states to blue ones, sending a clear message: that working people want leaders who actually fight for us. Now, with fall arriving, the next chapter begins. One of our most high-profile victories? Zohran Mamdani , who won outright in the primary for New York City mayor, and heads into November with a chance to make history. But he wasn’t alone: In Arizona’s 7th Congressional District, we played a key role in propelling Adelita Grijalva to victory. In Seattle, WFP-backed mayoral candidate Katie Wilson led her primary and advanced to the November general election, while WFP candidate and challenger Dionne Foster finished 23 points ahead of the incumbent Speaker of the Seattle City Council. WFP also won mayoral primaries in three other cities in New York state: Sean Ryan in Buffalo, Sharon Owens in Syracuse, and Dorcey Applyrs in Albany. In New Jersey, WFP-backed insurgent candidate Katie Brennan won her Assembly primary against county-backed incumbents. Carolyn Rush , incumbent Alixon Collazos Gill , and Chigozie Onyema also secured wins. Detroit City Council candidate Denzel McCampbell edged out a sitting state representative with WFP’s support. WFP-endorsed Selina Barajas and Miranda Schubert doubled their opponents’ votes in Tucson City Council primaries. In Ohio, all five of the WFP’s endorsed candidates won their primaries: Mounir Lynch and Dr. Antoinette Miranda for the Columbus City School Board; Ajmeri Hoque for Franklin County Municipal Court; Jesse Vogel for Columbus City Council; and Fran Wilson for Akron City Council. WFP school board candidates also won across Oregon — even flipping a school board in rural Redmond, a district once thought out of reach. And these are just some highlights. WFP candidates secured victories in many other states across the country as well, including special elections in Texas and California , and additional primaries in Pennsylvania , Maryland , and beyond. But these aren’t just election results, Peter. They are proof that even as storm clouds gather, working people are breaking through — block by block, council seat by council seat, community by community. That’s what WFP exists to do: to fight back against despair by bringing together working people from every corner of the country to take on billionaires, extremists, and the politics of fear. To elect champions who will carry our fight from city hall to Congress in 2026. And this primary season’s victories are just the beginning. This November, WFP-endorsed candidates will be on the ballot in communities across the country, part of the hundreds of candidates running this year to expand our movement and build toward even bigger wins in 2026. We’re knocking on doors where buses don’t run, showing up in school districts that are underfunded and overlooked, and casting ballots for leaders who don’t just promise change — they fight for it. This is our chance to build on the victories we’ve won and push even further. Every contribution strengthens our movement and brings us closer to a government that works for all of us. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114557795/567408492/1631137775?refcode=em-9.3.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDQ5ZmZkZS0xMjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0vcc8f7F-_SE8ywfZrpTQ1smtz3jm6j34eHdVfkdHUg=)

I am reaching out to thank you, Peter. **Your support in August helped us reach our online fundraising goal – and set the stage for this next critical month in our race.** At the end of September, we are required by the FEC to publicly report our fundraising data. In a race as close as this one, all eyes will be on how we perform – from our supporters like you, to our opponents, including Young Kim, and national pundits. I am the only candidate in this race who has a real vision for Orange County and the Inland Empire. The affordability crisis is forcing working families out of our communities. The destruction enabled by Young Kim and the national GOP will rip health care and assistance from thousands in the district. I have gone toe-to-toe with MAGA before, and I am not scared to stand up to far-right extremists. I have the fight, the experience, and with your support, I will have the grassroots power behind me to flip this seat. I hope you are as fired up as I am to flip the House and protect our democracy. name: Mark Warner
subject: Laura Loomer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
I’ll be honest, Derek: I’m livid. And that’s not a statement I make lightly.
The Trump administration is taking its marching orders from a fringe conspiracy theorist who’s associated with white supremacists and 9/11 denialism – and it’s directly undermining our career intelligence professionals.
If you’re as fired up as I am to hold Trump accountable and take back the Senate for Democrats – please join me and Tim Kaine with a contribution today:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
Hear me out:
Weeks ago, I arranged a meeting at the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency’s headquarters in Springfield, Virginia. Engagements such as these are a core part of my responsibility to provide oversight and support to our intelligence community. And they have never been questioned or politicized... until now.
Earlier this week, conspiracy theorist Laura Loomer discovered the unpublicized visit and launched a campaign of baseless attacks against me. And then just last night, Trump’s henchmen canceled my visit.
I can’t overstate how unprecedented and dangerous this is. This administration is taking its marching orders from Laura Loomer – a wackjob with a long history of outlandish fringe views, including 9/11 denialism, anti-Muslim harassment campaigns, and associations with white supremacists.
Let me be clear: I will never be deterred from carrying out my constitutional responsibilities. The business of government and the security of our nation will not be dictated by extremist attention-seekers.
But for goodness sake – I can’t be in this fight alone. And right now, the silence from my Republican colleagues is speaking volumes. It doesn’t matter how dangerous, reckless, or irresponsible the Trump administration acts, too many of my Republican colleagues would rather fall in line than stand up for what is right.
I’ve never been more determined to hold this critical seat for Democrats and flip the balance of power in Congress.
Join me and Tim Kaine with an emergency donation today to help us fight back, defeat Trump’s Republicans in the midterms, and flip the Senate. Your donation will be split between my reelection campaign and Tim's Common Ground PAC. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]

clean_body: I’ll be honest, Derek: I’m livid. And that’s not a statement I make lightly. The Trump administration is taking its marching orders from a fringe conspiracy theorist who’s associated with white supremacists and 9/11 denialism – and it’s directly undermining our career intelligence professionals. If you’re as fired up as I am to hold Trump accountable and take back the Senate for Democrats – please join me and Tim Kaine with a contribution today: [] Hear me out: Weeks ago, I arranged a meeting at the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency’s headquarters in Springfield, Virginia. Engagements such as these are a core part of my responsibility to provide oversight and support to our intelligence community. And they have never been questioned or politicized... until now. Earlier this week, conspiracy theorist Laura Loomer discovered the unpublicized visit and launched a campaign of baseless attacks against me. And then just last night, Trump’s henchmen canceled my visit. I can’t overstate how unprecedented and dangerous this is. This administration is taking its marching orders from Laura Loomer – a wackjob with a long history of outlandish fringe views, including 9/11 denialism, anti-Muslim harassment campaigns, and associations with white supremacists. Let me be clear: I will never be deterred from carrying out my constitutional responsibilities. The business of government and the security of our nation will not be dictated by extremist attention-seekers. But for goodness sake – I can’t be in this fight alone. And right now, the silence from my Republican colleagues is speaking volumes. It doesn’t matter how dangerous, reckless, or irresponsible the Trump administration acts, too many of my Republican colleagues would rather fall in line than stand up for what is right. I’ve never been more determined to hold this critical seat for Democrats and flip the balance of power in Congress. Join me and Tim Kaine with an emergency donation today to help us fight back, defeat Trump’s Republicans in the midterms, and flip the Senate. Your donation will be split between my reelection campaign and Tim's Common Ground PAC. subject: Janelle will always show up for Oregon
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
A few weeks ago, Janelle hosted a town hall in Madras where she warned that the GOP’s Medicaid cuts could devastate healthcare in rural Oregon and cause hospitals to shutter.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114557922/567408996/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGYzYmI2YjItMTM4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zspngItjIMlQgTwyKUIA-5bmj1f2rXrkNjv22F2yrzo=) **_“Bynum warns Medicaid cuts could shutter rural Oregon hospitals at Madras town hall”_** A few weeks ago, Janelle hosted a town hall in Madras where she warned that the GOP’s Medicaid cuts could devastate healthcare in rural Oregon and cause hospitals to shutter. Notably absent from this meeting was Oregon Republican Congressman Cliff Bentz. He was invited, but he didn’t show up! **Unlike her Republican colleagues who are scared to face their constituents after voting to strip millions of their healthcare, Janelle’s not afraid to meet with Oregonians.** That’s why she’s showing up and listening to people like you, and bringing your concerns back to Washington. Janelle knows that our communities depend on Medicaid funding to ensure they’re getting the care they need, and she’s ready to keep working to restore this funding and defend our healthcare. But with National Republicans hell-bent on flipping OR-05 red again, Janelle can’t win this fight alone. **[She’s going to need our support to keep up her critical fight in Congress and ensure Oregonians have a representative who will always show up for them. clean_body: A few weeks ago, Janelle hosted a town hall in Madras where she warned that the GOP’s Medicaid cuts could devastate healthcare in rural Oregon and cause hospitals to shutter. = “Bynum warns Medicaid cuts could shutter rural Oregon hospitals at Madras town hall” A few weeks ago, Janelle hosted a town hall in Madras where she warned that the GOP’s Medicaid cuts could devastate healthcare in rural Oregon and cause hospitals to shutter. Notably absent from this meeting was Oregon Republican Congressman Cliff Bentz. He was invited, but he didn’t show up! Unlike her Republican colleagues who are scared to face their constituents after voting to strip millions of their healthcare, Janelle’s not afraid to meet with Oregonians. That’s why she’s showing up and listening to people like you, and bringing your concerns back to Washington. Janelle knows that our communities depend on Medicaid funding to ensure they’re getting the care they need, and she’s ready to keep working to restore this funding and defend our healthcare. But with National Republicans hell-bent on flipping OR-05 red again, Janelle can’t win this fight alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks, Team Bynum | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. name: Shane Jenkins
subject: Our national anthem began with a patriotic prisoner
body:
---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18052612/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvZzc0Zmd1Wld4Tg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDM/LbmNsejFCdFd6Wg/qP2hpZHM9bmNSdlBTbHA5Q01EbHhscw/gaLi_qQ/scs7b39cb2d)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18052612/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9zdGFuZC1pbi10aGUtZ2FwL3NiLWFjdGlvbi8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDM/LbmNsejFCdFd6Wg/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zaXRnMjUwODAyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cmV2c2hhcmUmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1zYiZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMTQwM193cjEmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9bG9nbw/gaLi_qQ/s6l9a951ad4)
Patriot,

Did you know the Star Spangled Banner was written by a political prisoner?

Francis Scott Key was under guard by the British (_he knew too much_) when the victory of the American patriots at the Battle of Baltimore inspired him to write the lyrics.

_There is a reason that we January 6th hostages sang it while locked in the D.C. gulag._

**You see, I was one of the patriots arrested for being at the Capitol on January 6th. What we suffered through is an experience I will never forget.**

It’s what inspired me to create Stand in the Gap, a non-profit that helps January 6th hostages and others who’ve been affected by our justice system succeed in their second chance at freedom and end the two-tiered system of justice in this country.

Before I tell you more about my experience, I have to ask for your support so Stand in the Gap can provide help, hope, and healing to these American patriots in need.

[Please click below to help us restore the promise of the American Dream today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18052612/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9zdGFuZC1pbi10aGUtZ2FwL3NiLWFjdGlvbi8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDM/LbmNsejFCdFd6Wg/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zaXRnMjUwODAyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cmV2c2hhcmUmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1zYiZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMTQwM193cjEmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dGV4dF9saW5rMQ/gaLi_qQ/scj3a5226f1)
[Donate](https://link.email.america1stwarroom._qQ/sdqaa928d5f) _**“Oh, say can you see, by the dawn’s early light”**_
I will never forget standing behind the bars of the DC jail on the Fourth of July, staring through a narrow window as fireworks burst over the Capitol.

It was a strange and surreal feeling to watch the glow of freedom while being caged by the very government that was supposed to defend it.
_**“What so proudly we hailed at the twilight’s last gleaming”**_
Even in that dark place, even while they tried to strip away our rights, the spirit of America never left us.

On the Fourth of July, something powerful happened.

Men who came from every background stood shoulder to shoulder, pressing against those tiny windows.

**For a few moments, we were not inmates. We were Americans.**

Watching the night sky blaze with red, white, and blue.
_**“Whose broad stripes and bright stars, through the perilous fight”**_
Like my fellow January 6th hostages, I was in the fight of my life.

But even behind bars, even as the government tried to silence me, that banner still flew. A symbol that tyranny might try to break the body, but it cannot crush the spirit.
_**“O’er the ramparts we watched were so gallantly streaming”**_
We watched through concrete and steel as the fireworks filled the air. Proof that freedom still existed out there. That freedom still mattered.

It was a painful reminder that it had been taken from us, but also a promise that it could be reclaimed.
_**“And the rockets’ red glare, the bombs bursting in air,
Gave proof through the night that our flag was still there.”**_
That night in DC, those fireworks were more than a celebration. They were proof.

Proof that no matter how hard they tried to crush us, the flag was still there. _We were still there_.
_**“O say does that star-spangled banner yet wave,
O’er the land of the free and the home of the brave”**_
Even though we are now free, thanks to the grace of God and the bravery of President Trump, the fight is not over.

I want my fellow January 6th hostages to know that Stand in the Gap is still here to help them and their families rebuild what was stolen. From transitional housing to wellness programs, credit repair to employment help, we are proving that freedom is not just an idea. It is a reality worth fighting for.

[You can help January 6th hostages start anew and reintegrate into their communities by donating $100, $50, or even just $10 today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18052612/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9zdGFuZC1pbi10aGUtZ2FwL3NiLWFjdGlvbi8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDM/LbmNsejFCdFd6Wg/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zaXRnMjUwODAyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cmV2c2hhcmUmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1zYiZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMTQwM193cjEmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dGV4dF9saW5rMg/gaLi_qQ/saj75d7b0e4)
[Donate $10](https://link.email.america1stwarroom._qQ/s2teee0348e)

[Donate $35](https://link.email.america1stwarroom._qQ/s1l2ca8190c)

[Donate $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom._qQ/s1lf0d7c482)

[Donate $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom._qQ/sbs7eab842c)

[Donate $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom._qQ/s1q592bc86f)

[Donate $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom._qQ/sbv98b56239)

[Donate $1,000](https://link.email.america1stwarroom._qQ/scv21d818e5)

[Donate Any Amount](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18052612/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9zdGFuZC1pbi10aGUtZ2FwL3NiLWFjdGlvbi8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDM/LbmNsejFCdFd6Wg/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zaXRnMjUwODAyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cmV2c2hhcmUmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1zYiZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMTQwM193cjEmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9YW55X2J1dHRvbjE/gaLi_qQ/sas9e724135)
With Gratitude,

Shane Jenkins
Founder and Executive Director of Stand in the Gap

Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap’s tax identification number is 93-1417599.

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18052612/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDM/LbmNsejFCdFd6Wg/qP2hpZHM9bmNSdlBTbHA5Q01EbHhscw/gaLi_qQ/sbq7a331547)

If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber](https://substack.com/redirect/240f327f-b32f-4477-b974-6102d868f7f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) 👇**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/240f327f-b32f-4477-b974-6102d868f7f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
Unfortunately, **Don Lemon** , couldn't join me for our weekly live today because he's out doing real journalism, on the ground, in D.C. So I went solo--and I went deep.
I addressed the Epstein survivors who courageously spoke out today and why this fight still matters. I gave credit (yes, even to folks I usually can't stand) and broke down exactly _who_ is helping to move this forward--and who's standing in the way.
Don't miss this one:
* **[00:01:15]** Setting the stage: how Trump and MAGA weaponized the Epstein conspiracy--and how Democrats like Ro Khanna and Robert Garcia are forcing a real reckoning.
* **[00:05:00]** The moment survivors finally got to speak, and why their bravery changes everything.
* **[00:10:50]** The DOJ's so-called "documents" and why Robert Garcia is calling out the bait-and-switch.
* **[00:16:25]** Why Garcia, not Jasmine Crockett, was the right pick to lead Oversight right now--and what it means heading into the 2026 midterms.
* **[00:27:00]** Drawing the bigger picture: how systemic corruption protects the powerful and erodes public trust.

This is a must-watch if you care about accountability, justice, and the soul of our democracy. If you believe the survivors deserve more than silence, if you believe the truth should see daylight--this one's for you.
**[If this conversation moves you, if you want to be part of something that keeps pushing for answers, I hope you'll consider becoming a paid subscriber. Your support is what makes it possible for us to keep doing this work--freely, urgently, and unapologetically.](https://substack.com/redirect/240f327f-b32f-4477-b974-6102d868f7f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Oregon Breaking News
subject: What Bakari Sellers just said →
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114558117/567409630/-569431239?refcode=250903EM-bakari&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjU3ZDdmOS0xNDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pPeY09ThdKeoMvhBIpJMy8pdouHBe-Z74Gq1fuj2gDk=)

| | When national leaders talk about the future of American democracy and vote-by-mail, they point to Oregon.
Here’s what Bakari Sellers told CNN: _“Oregon is what we should be talking about, where they have Tobias Read and Automatic Voter Registration. That’s where we should be going with this.”_
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114558118/567409631/-569431239?refcode=250903EM-bakari&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjU3ZDdmOS0xNDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pPeY09ThdKeoMvhBIpJMy8pdouHBe-Z74Gq1fuj2gDk=)
---
He’s right. Oregon has been a national model — from automatic voter registration to secure, accessible vote-by-mail elections.**We’ve proven for more than 25 years that democracy works best when we make it easier for people to participate, not harder.**
**But now, President Trump wants to tear that down. He’s threatening an executive order to ****_end vote-by-mail before the midterms._** It’s unconstitutional, it’s reckless, and it’s an attack on the very progress that leaders like Bakari Sellers are praising.
Oregon won’t back down. We are prepared to fight Trump’s attacks in the courts, in the legislature, and in the court of public opinion. But we need the grassroots on our side to match the resources and power he’s bringing to this fight.
**[Will you answer Bakari Sellers’s call to action and join the fight today? Please, contribute to help Oregon defend our model election system — and show the nation that we will not be silenced.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114558119/567409632/-569431239?refcode=250903EM-bakari&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjU3ZDdmOS0xNDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pPeY09ThdKeoMvhBIpJMy8pdouHBe-Z74Gq1fuj2gDk=)**

name: Shontel Brown
subject: This is not leadership. This is cowardice.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Breaking up unions is all about consolidating power...

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114558397/567410598/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250903Union_SB_90DO_7_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWI5YzQ4Ni0xNTg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-6RkW-42azEHAJxI6YeplJrVYeGdKwUFP2bMLcO5wM=) Peter,

This week marked Labor Day, and just in time for this important holiday, Trump engaged in more union-busting, anti-worker antics.

His anti-labor rights White House has terminated union contracts at more federal agencies, including NASA and the National Weather Service, here in Northeast Ohio. This move strips away the union rights of half a million federal workers.

This follows Trump’s efforts just weeks ago to eliminate collective bargaining agreements for most Veterans Affairs employees. These political attacks on workers’ rights will undermine the morale and mission of these agencies. Not to mention, **Trump’s union busting in the public sector will ripple to the private sector – hurting working men and women everywhere.**

This is not leadership. This is cowardice.

But we have a solution: As Congress returns to Washington, I am calling on my colleagues to pass the **Protect America’s Workforce Act** , which will restore collective bargaining protections and send a clear message that the days of bullying hardworking Americans are over.

[**The union-busting work Trump has been doing deserves a robust response, and I am working to deliver. clean_body: Breaking up unions is all about consolidating power... = Peter, This week marked Labor Day, and just in time for this important holiday, Trump engaged in more union-busting, anti-worker antics. His anti-labor rights White House has terminated union contracts at more federal agencies, including NASA and the National Weather Service, here in Northeast Ohio. This move strips away the union rights of half a million federal workers. This follows Trump’s efforts just weeks ago to eliminate collective bargaining agreements for most Veterans Affairs employees. These political attacks on workers’ rights will undermine the morale and mission of these agencies. Not to mention, Trump’s union busting in the public sector will ripple to the private sector – hurting working men and women everywhere. This is not leadership. This is cowardice. But we have a solution: As Congress returns to Washington, I am calling on my colleagues to pass the Protect America’s Workforce Act , which will restore collective bargaining protections and send a clear message that the days of bullying hardworking Americans are over. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Breaking up unions is all about consolidating power and punishing public servants for daring to speak up. We must fight back. In solidarity, Shontel Brown Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. name: Ghazala Hashmi
subject: This race is TIGHT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
NEW POLL: Roanoke College
Democrat Ghazala Hashmi: 38%
Republican John Reid: 35%
Help Ghazala win this TIGHT race → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-hashmi_em_q32025]
Friends, this race is tightening.
The newest poll of this November’s election for Lieutenant Governor has me up just 3 points against Republican John Reid.
That’s within the margin of error.
There’s no other way to cut it: This race is going to come down to the wire. Can I count on you to split a $20 contribution between my campaign and Jay Jones to help me win this toss-up race? Every grassroots contribution makes a big difference in a race this close, helping us fight back against the big money from Republican special interests. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-hashmi_em_q32025?amount=20]

DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-hashmi_em_q32025?amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-hashmi_em_q32025?amount=100]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-hashmi_em_q32025]
MAGA billionaires are seeing this poll and gearing up to spend millions in the coming months to keep Virginia red.

I’ve spent a lot of time listening to both sides of the abortion debate. | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/4dTxqxMU74yTw8GktP5D6cFG8lRg9qjH1PQi6TgfFYT42vt7tvTG4cFUfM3yB0822hEvbGVjbG1h8_3IOYFnLrkuuq4NTK7wUYKpDumptvvBA6ez6Bn13ZMmUzz9tybhdZLtauAzmAIE5C9bNdzSKDWiU7oBU9d0lgb32NtDzQF6sjWaVTT3Baq-/lMsydQWNGhomLWsF0_bZynVZqGlXI9ap/12)_

| | Fellow American,

I've spent a lot of time listening to both sides of the abortion debate. Here's what I've found:
The left lies to women.
The right too often performs outrage instead of offering real help.
And the voices that can offer support, in many cases, have gone silent. But PreBorn! is different. They are not waiting for permission.
They are not just condemning abortion from a distance.
**They are stepping into the fire.** PreBorn! gives women a real choice rooted in truth.
They offer **free ultrasounds** so a mother can see her child, hear the heartbeat, and make a decision with clarity and hope, not fear and confusion. And when that mother chooses life?
**PreBorn! stays.****
**They walk with her. They support her for up to two years. And they share the love of Christ in word and action. This is what so many defenders of life are getting wrong.
And this is the kind of action I want to be part of.

clean_body: Marlene needs a whole lot of support from folks like you to get all the way to the finish line. | | = It’s Nicole Stanton, and I am reaching out to let you know where I stand on the Congressional District 1 race, one of the most critical districts in the entire country: I’m proud to endorse Marlene Galán Woods to represent AZ-01 in Congress. = Marlene knows how to take on tough challenges. Her family fled a dictatorship in Cuba in search of a better life in the United States. Marlene went on to become a trusted broadcast journalist. She and her husband, Grant, raised 5 kids, putting down lasting roots here in Arizona. Now, she’s running for Congress to stand up to the extremism that’s become all too familiar in Washington and be a voice for all Arizonans. She will be a passionate advocate for our shared values, but also skillfully reach across the aisle to make good things happen. Marlene has the grit and tenacity to defeat Trump loyalist David Schweikert and win this battleground race — but she needs a whole lot of support to get all the way to the finish line. = | If you’ve saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will be processed immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Let’s chart a new path forward for AZ-01! **➤➤ BREAKING: Trump says he plans unconstitutional executive order to mandate ID for voters** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114559387/567414237/55160957?refcode=em-9.04.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjdlM2NiNi0xOTg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bLr0c0PCm0m9wktiTZ_y00GrQYBcwhJlqg-KPhDgIrg=)**
* * *
Friend, Over the weekend, Donald Trump posted on social media that he plans to issue an executive order **requiring voter ID and banning mail-in ballots with almost no exceptions.** Let us be crystal-clear: this policy isn’t just unconstitutional, it’s an assault on voting access itself. Under the Constitution, the right to set voting rules belongs to the states and Congress. **Not the President.** And here’s the truth: voter ID laws do not stop fraud – because the kind of fraud they claim to prevent simply doesn’t exist at any significant level. **In fact, you are more likely to be struck by lightning than to catch someone pretending to be another voter at the polls.** Our Democratic Secretaries of State are the first line of defense against these attacks. They are the ones protecting secure elections, expanding access to the ballot, and making sure every eligible voter’s voice is heard. [**But Trump and his allies are targeting them precisely because they stand in the way of his dangerous agenda. name: Team Katie Porter
subject: 5 reasons for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40105%2E3422442%2EuOowLE)
Peter,
Katie Porter is running to be California’s next governor—and this race is heating up. She’s counting on grassroots supporters to power her to victory, so here are **[5 reasons to chip in $5 today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250903_1_ak?refcode=em20250903-40105&amount=5&refcode2=40105_3422442_uOowLE&akid=40105%2E3422442%2EuOowLE)**
**1\. Katie will lower costs as governor.** She’s spent her career standing up for everyday Californians, and now she’s ready to take that experience to the governor’s office.
**2\. Trump is trying to steal our democracy.** California needs a governor who will stop Trump from tipping the scales in his favor. Katie held him accountable during his first term and she’ll do it again as governor.
**3\. Republicans want to flip California red.** The closest candidates to Katie in recent polls are both Republicans—who will stop at nothing to see us lose.
**4\. Our opponents are spending big.** A billionaire has already spent over a million dollars on campaign ads. Unlike them, Katie relies on grassroots donations to power this campaign.
**5\. Katie’s in the lead—and we need to keep it that way.** Three polls in a row show Katie is the Democratic frontrunner, but we can’t afford to get complacent.
**[Peter, can you pitch in $5 to help us lower costs, protect democracy, and elect Katie Porter as California’s next governor?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250903_1_ak?refcode=em20250903-40105&amount=5&refcode2=40105_3422442_uOowLE&akid=40105%2E3422442%2EuOowLE)**

| The Senate map just shifted. Big changes are shaking up the 2026 Senate map: open seats in Iowa and North Carolina, costly GOP primaries in Texas and strong Democratic recruits in battleground states like North Carolina and Ohio. [**_Every state is in play if we run on all cylinders — but we can’t flip the Senate without you. **Democrats are in our strongest position yet to flip the Senate in 2026.** Senate Republicans are about to face political misery — and we’re going to bring the fire.

* **In North Carolina,** we landed a top recruit in Roy Cooper after Sen. Thom Tillis retired **— and he raised $3.4 million in his first 24 hours.**
* **In Ohio,** we recruited Sherrod Brown for a comeback run, forcing the GOP to defend yet another expensive seat.
* **And now, Iowa** Republicans are facing an open seat after Sen. Joni Ernst bowed out.

**Every one of these changes means Republicans will have to spend more money defending their map** — and that gives us a real shot at exploiting their weaknesses and flipping the Senate.
[**_Can you chip in right now so we can seize every opening, compete in every state and take back the Senate?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114559608/567414864/246949951?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.03_Senate-Maps_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTZkNTdkNC0xYTg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=juLZEBs7ltVbliwemdN93oy__-psmZjSyZQ8W9S_i5k=)

name: Scott Colom
subject: It’s official, I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I’m stepping up for Mississippi, not because it’s easy, but because too much is on the line to sit on the sidelines.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4956%2E35263%2E-UewWc)
I’ve got an important announcement to share with you, Peter. My name is Scott Colom, and I’m a seventh-generation Mississippian running for U.S. Senate because I can no longer sit on the sidelines while our leaders put profits over the people they are supposed to serve. I’ve spent my career keeping our communities safe, holding the powerful accountable, and delivering justice — and now, I’m ready to take that same fight to Washington to lower costs, save our hospitals, and bring good jobs back home. **[If you understand what’s at stake in this race, will you split a donation of $10 or more between my campaign and Senator Tammy Baldwin to become a Founding Donor to this campaign and help move Mississippi forward?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2533?c0=stb-em-colom.PKtlK8&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4956%2E35263%2E-UewWc)** | | [DONATE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-colom.MqXdbq&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4956%2E35263%2E-UewWc)
---
Peter, we’re at a pivotal moment in this country where the cost of everyday goods is climbing, hospitals are closing, and working families are being left behind by the very leaders who claim to have our backs.
So we must ask ourselves: _Will we allow them to keep putting profits over people? Or are we going to rise to the occasion and create a future that we all deserve?_
For years, I’ve worked to mitigate violent crime in Mississippi, but I’ve also seen firsthand how investing in the community can turn things around.
This campaign is about doing just that: Investing in our communities. That means fighting for working families — making sure no child goes hungry, no parent has to travel hours for care because too many hospitals have shut down, and every Mississippian has a real chance at bettering their lives.
But it won’t be easy. We’re up against a well-funded incumbent who’s been ranked the least effective Senator in Congress, and has no problem putting billionaires before Mississippi families.
With deep pockets and powerful allies, my opponent will spend whatever it takes to win. But my team has a clear path to win this race.
**Our strategy relies on your help. And if we’re going to build the most competitive campaign possible, we need to make a big push now, from the start.**
**Please.**
**[Can I count on you to become a founding donor of this campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Tammy today? It’s not the amount that matters as the donation itself – when we all come together, it’ll make a big difference.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-colom.MqXdbq&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4956%2E35263%2E-UewWc)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Scott Colom and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=stb-em-colom.4c0-Nh&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=4956%2E35263%2E-UewWc)
---
[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-colom.759n9c&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=4956%2E35263%2E-UewWc)
---
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3665?c0=stb-em-colom.fclOcm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=4956%2E35263%2E-UewWc)
---
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3666?c0=stb-em-colom.moOCxL&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=4956%2E35263%2E-UewWc)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3667?c0=stb-em-colom.xUVsa1&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=4956%2E35263%2E-UewWc)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2591?c0=stb-em-colom.LrzD1u&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&t=12&akid=4956%2E35263%2E-UewWc)
---
Thank you for joining this fight,
Scott Colom
Candidate for U.S. Senate
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-colom.MqXdbq&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250903_PM1_V1_S1&t=13&akid=4956%2E35263%2E-UewWc)
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4956%2E35263%2E-UewWc) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4956%2E35263%2E-UewWc)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---

name: Costello for U.S. Senate
subject: Costello for Senate Update
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://costelloforsenate.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d37adbc910a9a40e00b14f5&id=2bd9fd328d&e=5d7176e969)
| | | | | | Friends,
Check out our revamped website at https://costelloforsenate.com...
Aside from being more concise, it’s meant to be more user friendly. We’vecontracted with a team to help in raising our profile and money. And we’re workingto inform more Mainers about David and why we believe, given his central Maineworking-class roots and extensive senior-level state, local, and federal governmentexperience, he’s the best candidate to unseat Senator Collins in 2026.
Moreover, we believe that David is the candidate with the ideas and ability to rally thebroadest support among Democratic primary voters. Progressives will appreciatethat he’s laid out and is advocating for the most detailed and substantive reformagenda, and moderates will appreciate that, having managed complex, multi-million-dollar programs and operations both in the U.S and abroad, he has the mostextensive, hands-on government operations and management experience. Davidhas walked the walk, not just talked the talk.
Check out our concerned about Collins video below and let us know what you think: https://youtu.be/5mdAvOope94?si=9bDCwcPsRVKRzvv8
And please share this email with your friends and colleagues.
Thank you and best always,Team Costello

---

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: I’ve seen how labor rights can transform families and communities.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Instead of working to lower costs for working people, Trump is handing tax breaks to billionaires and attacking our immigrant neighbors. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW2llOGpHvCMizA0kwZsxy8dAoUgOdb5ENuFhN1KmgjHdmQTi2ErkQramvW98zGveiA_fxRPoo0ktzF8skqMi3NPHgvg0FpnWMDOv1mDvXVPBAQ1zWHK0ZKFJrMEli2Ys5mnkiuiPQ1HX9GQF_rxAc_IeIfZXTI2-FGqb-CmjSAVu_9-6XZJedHkQT8wbcNe9VGyQo29bXaiRhpm-zokQ5pI5-9FnDzvwaj-TDtvTbKU_CSxivIiE2nBOHhzAClhXj/4jl/lQuPcFw3RUOUC0riDCGggA/h0/h001.XctRP5COWg4AGJTA1jT-Rw_evR0Sa1YIqiamM7Ra6gw)
---
Friend, We’re staying loud and in the streets. And that was the case on Labor Day. I’ve been proud to join striking workers on picket lines who are rising up for safe working conditions, living wages, better benefits, and human dignity. In Congress I will keep pushing for workers’ right to organize without fear of retaliation, paid medical and family leave, affordable childcare, universal healthcare, and higher wages—including raising the tipped minimum wage to a full livable wage. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMctRoxlFO9O82fTB5zU1O8FsSWhSEiiNRz9ux_vCVlRX7ly9DVwD5KYsPP31SB7Lc8U9DmFJmzlXOgxqRoAc3H3jUKA4R8aPfXFln_KmiV2cfWvEmFac5_tghOHE3seMCCz4YRlRkKssU44IwTxo87sQ-nITFx6KcBVD9KruZkFzvVjZgaHXP6cQNAKvZyogBEWi1B_GfS5001HDGOiHfUsYYIMNsYvjR4qY-rD4-tPv2HeW7P8pnalA5GmAxcZeRT43cWsJMaWIHCSs8L8G7TV2lAjTQ3xTQZgPdvy6OZ1mGpQM6n7l-_9vFQz0oAntcCOa8nTXEKlvg5Ctak2DbKI0XzJmia-BI__OysW_vp9sVoN_KE_OU4Yt_OdZ36sWU4-RIzYhPEDf_VB8wwBM0eXCfPtZlADV7rCKXn07qbjvQdFI6mvs0dUujeg_KaTELdyiGr-pnQSbM_5bth97vCCqrN5AaQTkzwt1puGsPDaY/4jl/lQuPcFw3RUOUC0riDCGggA/h1/h001.mZaEqOUCLT_hADgYwIfyzn9z6oTUvBM4S7vlGrkbAoA) But right now, the authoritarian-in-chief is busy firing civil servants and attacking the collective bargaining rights of federal workers. **The AFL-CIO has called this “the single biggest act of union-busting in American history.”** I know how important labor unions are for working people and for building the middle class. **My family received healthcare for the first time when my father joined the United Auto Workers union, so I’ve seen firsthand how labor rights can transform families and communities.** Trump is taking away life-saving programs that working people rely on, all while handing tax breaks to billionaires and attacking our immigrant neighbors. His ICE goons are targeting worksites and arresting construction crews and farm workers. Many immigrants are union members, and we need to stand up for all workers, no matter their race or ethnicity. [**This Labor Day, I was proud to march alongside the SEIU and rally with federal workers, autoworkers, the Teamsters, and the teachers union. Click here to check out photos from Labor Day.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMctRoxlFO9O82fTB5zU1O8FsSWhSEiiNRz9ux_vCVlRX7ly9DVwD5KYsPP31SB7Lc8U9DmFJmzlXOgxqRoAc3H3jUKA4R8aPfXFln_KmiV2cfWvEmFac5_tghOHE3seMCCz4YRlRkKssU44IwTxo87tij2_AycvHcvHqACccKyG7OKNwkAKYlM1gSULBTn7WM-3QGrnioMr_Wi5KDV33Y5e07t5WJsYyWUUNlRjRFqbPk4RVbWN_H8qcoY3dN66JzQTXiJsjujiLAKI3-W1KnIhVGCdWHXDBN4OUsRlHRb829x5mJw3Dca3ImPLygiuusMh3fNLAUk0xzS1kfLfhJICyUR_7qglJnMD3_0cFgh64YrufYzcCDK4yF47SW7aLHT28IXK5xK4DfI3aR_qoA6vHT8GD2uHC6pAtVBcDi-Ek42Tejg2QRlmpFxGdHP9-ct4I0i_rvMZU3Xkv0exjsq6ZY0xjvfN9LgAfd7049pH_/4jl/lQuPcFw3RUOUC0riDCGggA/h2/h001.3Pe5Zn4RjgAwil7i5k-xLzMOH6jN39Ajh4sSdabraXI) | [WATCH & SHARE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMctRoxlFO9O82fTB5zU1O8FsSWhSEiiNRz9ux_vCVlRX7ly9DVwD5KYsPP31SB7Lc8U9DmFJmzlXOgxqRoAc3H3jUKA4R8aPfXFln_KmiV2cfWvEmFac5_tghOHE3seMCCz4YRlRkKssU44IwTxo87sr9DYHauWQir0KGnFP8WpMd6F9qqLdWR3YvYxDsWMHkFmCiXabSW7cjTNxoIOQLHZ8ISUMYT5iP2vec1U7y-jgdtPLyS0Xjtf3UNBTTiBoDOmqWuTV5L7k-mjP7100IfMQigUXnYu97OjJsZivFCrA7yIVB-HQ5kNzfi0E1kxWgaYes4wYlmF82_qbgLwrGB9k5BxvrPwo9_p0r3x10mjhDi3Sr5JPz3Q__lno6YdLX-8ovOMEheYCho_150eBxhYawTeXEohBaP2V_Lrvq0a1ihPFb7u18pCuYaHr_vn8o5KWpVmnqA5qYh1vxsKM5d5dw5vk0MnbSnE86tj7WTCd/4jl/lQuPcFw3RUOUC0riDCGggA/h6/h001.mAd3bEDyQfj5Il6ubkAHxaDcW32fkQIpODOFWaq2nTg)

Together we’re stronger and more powerful than those who want to divide us. We’ll keep demanding rights and justice for all.

clean_body: Instead of working to lower costs for working people, Trump is handing tax breaks to billionaires and attacking our immigrant neighbors. | | | Friend, We’re staying loud and in the streets. And that was the case on Labor Day. I’ve been proud to join striking workers on picket lines who are rising up for safe working conditions, living wages, better benefits, and human dignity. In Congress I will keep pushing for workers’ right to organize without fear of retaliation, paid medical and family leave, affordable childcare, universal healthcare, and higher wages—including raising the tipped minimum wage to a full livable wage. But right now, the authoritarian-in-chief is busy firing civil servants and attacking the collective bargaining rights of federal workers. The AFL-CIO has called this “the single biggest act of union-busting in American history.” I know how important labor unions are for working people and for building the middle class. My family received healthcare for the first time when my father joined the United Auto Workers union, so I’ve seen firsthand how labor rights can transform families and communities. Trump is taking away life-saving programs that working people rely on, all while handing tax breaks to billionaires and attacking our immigrant neighbors. His ICE goons are targeting worksites and arresting construction crews and farm workers. Many immigrants are union members, and we need to stand up for all workers, no matter their race or ethnicity. | Together we’re stronger and more powerful than those who want to divide us. We’ll keep demanding rights and justice for all. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: cozying up to Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
You may be receiving this email because of your previous support for organizations like The Long Run PAC. We need your support, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from us, you can unsubscribe here (https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1001&akid=5598%2E196590%2EKZLa6Z).

It’s Juliana — and I need to be completely transparent with you right now.

We’re pacing behind on our fundraising goals this month.

That’s not the update I hoped to share. But I believe in being honest with the people powering this campaign. Because the truth is: If we don’t catch up, we’ll be forced to scale back our plans.

You’ve probably heard me say this before — but it bears repeating: One of my opponents has over $20 million in his war chest. He’s backed by corporate PACs and special interests. And he’s already using that money to flood the airwaves and drown out our grassroots message before we’ve even had the chance to be heard.

But unlike him, our campaign isn't funded by corporate PACs. I haven’t spent the last decade building a $20 million war chest. What we have is you — and a movement built on $10, $25, or whatever folks can spare.

Every single donation helps us reach voters across Illinois, run ads, hire organizers, and stay competitive in one of the most important Senate races in the country.

But the truth is: I can’t catch up to our goals without your help.

So I have to ask — and I wouldn’t if it weren’t important:

Will you please split a contribution of $10 between my campaign for the U.S. Senate today and the Long Run to help us get back on track? (https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4645?t=1002&akid=5598%2E196590%2EKZLa6Z)

OTHER AMOUNT (https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4652?t=1009&akid=5598%2E196590%2EKZLa6Z)

Thank you for believing in this campaign — and in me. We’re going to do this, together.

— Juliana

Peter, it’s Valerie. I wanted to take a moment to personally thank you for helping us hit our fundraising goal last month. In times as difficult and uncertain as these, I don’t take your support for granted. I know you have many demands on your time and resources, and I’m truly grateful that you continue to stand with me and support this campaign. Despite the challenges we face — and the deep division in Congress — I remain motivated and hopeful for our fight for a better future. What keeps me going is our fight for a future where rights are upheld, families can thrive, and every person has a fair shot at the American Dream. That vision is worth fighting for — and I’m not going anywhere. With gratitude, Valerie Foushee

clean_body: I wanted to take a moment to personally thank you for helping us hit our fundraising goal last month. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, it’s Valerie. I wanted to take a moment to personally thank you for helping us hit our fundraising goal last month. In times as difficult and uncertain as these, I don’t take your support for granted. I know you have many demands on your time and resources, and I’m truly grateful that you continue to stand with me and support this campaign. Despite the challenges we face — and the deep division in Congress — I remain motivated and hopeful for our fight for a better future. What keeps me going is our fight for a future where rights are upheld, families can thrive, and every person has a fair shot at the American Dream. That vision is worth fighting for — and I’m not going anywhere. With gratitude, Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Cindy Hyde-Smith has no business sitting in the United States Senate.
She’s helped pile trillions of dollars onto the national debt while pretending to be some kind of fiscal saint.
She’s turned her back on our hospitals, our schools — _and just about everyone else in the state who can’t afford a lobbyist._
Meanwhile, she’s cashing in with her wealthy donors and trailing Trump like a lost puppy — and Mississippians have had enough.
**Thankfully, Scott Colom has entered this race to give Mississippians a voice in the Senate.** He’s ready to hit the ground running to lower costs for working families, keep our hospitals open, and bring good-paying jobs back home.
We’ve got a real shot to fire one of the worst and most ineffective members of the Senate and send Scott to fight for us in Washington. _So we damn well better take it._
But that only happens if you step up right now to give your immediate support to Scott’s campaign.
**So Peter, we need to pour everything we’ve got into his campaign, because if we don't, Hyde-Smith will continue to sell out Mississippians to the highest bidder.** [Will you split $10 or whatever you can spare between the Democratic Party of Georgia and Scott’s campaign before you close out this email to send Scott to the Senate and put Hyde-Smith out of a job?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114559921/567415873/1953329228?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_090325_COLOMSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWZiZDMxMC0xZTg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jGlDwCdReEPVETiEt3xvXJwQmQnNlu5evf14ynQlp-Y=)

If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, it’s James Carville here, and there’s no time to sugarcoat this, because that’s how serious this Senate race in Mississippi is. If you understand what’s at stake, = | | = Cindy Hyde-Smith has no business sitting in the United States Senate. She’s helped pile trillions of dollars onto the national debt while pretending to be some kind of fiscal saint. She’s turned her back on our hospitals, our schools — and just about everyone else in the state who can’t afford a lobbyist. Meanwhile, she’s cashing in with her wealthy donors and trailing Trump like a lost puppy — and Mississippians have had enough. Thankfully, Scott Colom has entered this race to give Mississippians a voice in the Senate. He’s ready to hit the ground running to lower costs for working families, keep our hospitals open, and bring good-paying jobs back home. We’ve got a real shot to fire one of the worst and most ineffective members of the Senate and send Scott to fight for us in Washington. So we damn well better take it. | | **_Meet Russell:_** Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper.

clean_body: Newsom 2028 liberals would hate to see this on the back of your car... | | | | | | Gavin Newsom’s 2028 momentum is real, Peter. | | Luckily, onlyextreme liberals think that putting America’s worst Governor in the Oval Office is a good idea. So we need to send them an important message from South Carolina, early & often. We will NOT allow Gavin Newsom and the left to | | | | | | | | | Thank you for being loud & proud in your defense of South Carolina’s conservative values. For the Palmetto State, Fry Wokebusters Division | | | | | | | | | Meet Russell: Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper. | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇_ Russell Fry for Congress PO Box 14641 Surfside Beach, SC 29587 | | | | | | | |

name: John Fetterman
subject: we're firing the 🤡 who cashed in on gutting Medicaid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hey Derek,

Remember how I keep saying to get this country back on track, we need to kick extremist Republicans out of office?

Well, it’s go time. 🏁

This week, Scranton Mayor Paige Cognetti jumped into the race for Congress. She’s tough. She’s honest. And she’s not afraid to clean up a mess.

But if she’s gonna flip PA-08 blue in 2026, she needs backup. That means folks like you stepping up early. Will you chip in $5 or more right now, split between Paige and me?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51629?t=1001&akid=10288%2E434096%2E_myode

Here are some “fun facts” about the guy she’s running against, Republican Rob Bresnahan:

👉 Ran for Congress promising to ban congressional stock trading. 👍

👉 ... Became one of the top traders in Congress 🫠

👉 Made more than 600 trades since getting to Washington, worth millions 😧

👉 Trades in the same industries he’s overseeing 😡

Yep. He even dumped stock in a Medicaid provider right before voting for the largest cuts to Medicaid in history. He’s literally making money off of ripping health care away from millions of people.

Paige? She doesn’t play that game. She’s taken on corruption, cut red tape, balanced the books, and cleaned up Scranton. Now she’s running because she can’t sit back while Bresnahan day trades away the public trust.

Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between Paige and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Pennsylvania, and kick this 🤡 out of office?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51629?t=1002&akid=10288%2E434096%2E_myode

Together we can build a Congress that actually serves the people, not their own interests.

Thanks yinz.

John ❤️

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=10288%2E434096%2E_myode

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1004&akid=10288%2E434096%2E_myode

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Team Pappas
subject: What you need to know about John E. Sununu
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Former Senator John E. Sununu is going to run for U.S. Senate in NH.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2187%2E582294%2ESGpJXZ)
🚨 **Former Senator John E. Sununu is going to run for U.S. Senate in New Hampshire.** 🚨
Here’s what you need to know about him:
🚫 Voted repeatedly to block efforts to lower drug prices
🚫 Tried to restrict abortion access
🚫 Backed the privatization of Social Security
🚫 Voted against funding for local law enforcement
🚫 Then joined a lobbying firm that represented corporate special interests
He’s the NRSC’s handpicked candidate to take on Chris Pappas.
_This is one of the most competitive Senate races in the country — and**they’re betting Sununu’s connections and special interest donors will overpower our grassroots movement and boost their chances of flipping this seat for Republicans.**_
[**We cannot let that happen. We need a surge of donations right now to fight back. Please donate $5 or anything you can today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250903_2_sununu?refcode=em20250903-2187&amount=5&refcode2=2187_582294_SGpJXZ&akid=2187%2E582294%2ESGpJXZ)

Thank you,
Team Pappas
